clean_body: The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter | | | | A Fellow Hoosier Jumps In I wanted to use the space here this week to give a quick shoutout to a well-known conservative Hoosier who had himself a big week. Hoosiers will have plenty of solid choices for president next year, there's no doubt about that. But Indiana's own Mike Pence, our former congressman, governor, and vice president, kicked off his campaign this week — on his birthday of all days! Indiana has direct connections to three presidents including William Henry Harrison, Abraham Lincoln, and Benjamin Harrison, and six vice presidents, including Schulyler Colfax in the Grant administration, Dan Quayle in the Bush Sr. administration, and of course Mike Pence in the Trump administration. We're excited for the great state of Indiana to once again be represented on the national stage, and wish our fellow Hoosier the best of luck. As always, we know he'll do Indiana proud. Sincerely, Chairman Kyle Hupfer | Forwarded this newsletter from a friend? | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Building Stronger Partnerships | | Governor Eric Holcomb poses with business leaders in Paris who have ties to Indiana. This week, Governor Eric Holcomb traveled to Europe to foster international ties and pursue partnership and investment opportunities across energy, life sciences, technology, the future of transportation, and motorsports. What he's saying: “Indiana’s economic momentum continues to build, and I couldn’t be more energized to share that message with our friends, partners and new business prospects in Europe,” said Gov. Holcomb. “France and Portugal share similar visions for building global economies of the future, and we see many opportunities for innovation and partnerships across high-tech industries like energy and motorsports that will create new opportunities for Indiana and for Hoosiers.” What this means for Indiana: Indiana is home to more than 1,075 foreign-owned business establishments, representing more than 40 countries and territories — including 57 from France and 3 from Portugal. In 2022, 32 foreign-owned businesses committed to locating or growing in Indiana. Together, these firms plan to invest $7.25 billion in Indiana, accounting for 33% of total capital investments committed in 2022 and creating more than 6,400 new jobs. The cost of the trip is being paid through private donations to the Indiana Economic Development Foundation. | | | More: Gov. Holcomb recently joined 17 Republican governors from across the country to on the Biden administration rule that would force home buyers with good credit to subsidize loans to higher-risk borrowers. "Your actions are threatening the American housing system. By upending the existing financing model that relies on individual financial responsibility, you are increasing uncertainty in the housing market and our nation’s economy." | Details for Tomorrow's Candidate Training We're less than a day away from our all-day municipal candidate training event in downtown Indianapolis. Be in the know: Visit to find all of the details and we look forward to seeing you soon! | RNC Launches 'Bank Your Vote' Initiative This week, Republican National Committee (RNC) Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel announced “Bank Your Vote,” a nationwide campaign focused on maximizing pre-Election Day voting. The details: "Bank Your Vote" will encourage, educate, and activate Republican voters on when, where, and how to lock in their votes as early as possible, through in-person early voting, absentee voting, and ballot harvesting where legal. Building on Republicans' absentee return rate, early in-person voting, and ballot harvesting success in 2022, "Bank Your Vote" is the next step to improve the overall number of pre-Election Day voters to ultimately secure victory in 2024. What they're saying: The effort will be co-chaired by Congressman Byron Donalds(FL-19) and U.S. Senator Bill Hagerty (TN). "With innovative technology to educate voters and safeguards in place to secure the process, Republicans are prepared to win up-and-down the ballot in 2024," said Donalds. "To take back the White House and Senate and strengthen our House majority in 2024, Republicans must play the game by today’s rules, which means maximizing our efforts to bank votes before Election Day," noted Hagerty. Take action: to bank your vote today. | Shop the New 'Hoosier Republican' Collection There's merchandise on our online store! ---
I am excited to announce that **Lara Trump** is joining me at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22520625.12690.1.d347155d6f5dda57bed9a54d1668d6c2) in Tulsa, OK for [IGNITE 2023](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22520625.12691.1.e5e4e0cbf721607ae97131668695ab79)!
[IGNITE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22520625.12692.1.c7cb0003be9f057275cbc7d76ef68cfe) is an annual conference at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22520625.12693.1.85b05495891c85e4edabb391e8aafd1d) with _powerful worship_ , _dynamic speakers_ and a _community of believers on fire for God_.
**Conference Details:**
**Dates** : September 10-13
**Speakers** : TBA
**Location** : [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22520625.12694.1.4ea8b6fc7ef535e5fb35b9daadcc988f) Tulsa
**Cost** : FREE
**Seating** : LIMITED
**RSVP** : [www.sheridan.church/ignite23](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22520625.12695.1.2e2d80ec0d85881811974317ae760f89)
More details will be released here soon. **I look forward to seeing you in Tulsa this September!**
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22520625.12696.1.1c6f0d3efe61747af431360de653b9cc), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22520625.12697.1.72007a26ec6ab8229a78a57f521799ea), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22520625.12698.1.84b01f80e9105f010ca6b90528d0c010), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22520625.12699.1.8cbe0cc8842c43618997824e081915e8), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22520625.12700.1.752d1c30d8ca6b233461f4323936740a), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22520625.12701.1.1fcd3b262e94a4e9283f8d0c82dc73de)).

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots  Action
subject: Watch NOW: ‘Surviving Socialism’ documentary
body:
| | |
---
I am so excited to announce that our documentary _Surviving Socialism_ is being released _**today**_ , and you can [**watch it for free!** **for free!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
[WATCH NOW](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
| |
# **FILM SYNOPSIS**
---
When a recent survey revealed that 70% of young people would support a socialist candidate, older Americans were shocked, like they had been sucker-punched. Why do our young people think socialism only means: “Everything’s free!”? Because schools don’t teach them that socialism consistently results in economic failure, loss of basic human freedoms, and the deaths of tens of millions. This documentary lets you hear the poignant warnings from survivors of socialism. And then meet the young Americans – Candace Owens, Scott Presler, Morgan Zegers, and Maggie VandenBerghe – who inspire us all to courageously fight back.
---
| | The people who survived socialism and escaped from countries like Cuba, the Soviet Union, and Venezuela are the canaries in the coalmine, and they’re worried. They’ve seen this happen before and they know how the story ends. **[You can watch the trailer and access the full film on the website.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)** Be sure to share it on social media and email your friends about it. Better yet, host a watch party and invite them over to watch it together! In fact, **[we have a how-to guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._Q)** for hosting a watch party that will walk you through all the steps – including some helpful resources – so that your event is successful. The more people who see it and truly understand what’s going on in the United States today, the better our chances are to save our country and stop the socialists. In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin

Fellow Patriot, **Did you know that President Joe Biden’s two latest nominations to lead our armed forces are actually _woke generals?_** According to the [Daily Signal](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4z7f3tovo7g6kfd4sdr36kn9ifpi9isj0052evlr8_rp22sh2s8i61o37cjj60pj24no), “Lt. Gen. Kevin Schneider and Brig. Gen. Elizabeth Arledge are two of Biden’s Air Force nominees who have pushed woke policies for the military.” Schneider has advocated for the implementation of Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) programming in the Air Force, while Arledge has taken to social media to complain about the harmfulness of “whiteness.” Our brave men and women serve to keep us safe and protect American values like justice and equality, not to advance the Biden Administration’s preferred political agenda. **When I’m president, the focus of our national security will be just that – _national security_ , not the nonsense that distracts our military from mission readiness. ** It’s time to stop the insanity. By donating to our campaign, you can send a loud and clear message to Washington: we the people are ready to restore common sense to the federal government.
---
[DONATE NOW](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4z0vn1hb1hqrq9alcmut1cv66icf8rlqofnrn3bag_rp22sh2s8i61o37cjj60pj24no)
---
Thank you for your support,Larry ElderGOP Candidate for President
---
[**P.S. Like what you hear from our campaign? Think others will, too? Every donation of any amount helps us earn a spot on the GOP primary debate stage in months ahead. Please hit the tip jar so we can keep the momentum going!**](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4zlm8k6vb2bueee8kpvpept0dmu9gngqtj1jna898_rp22sh2s8i61o37cjj60pj24no)
---
| | |
---
# Meet Larry:
---
| | Larry Elder—the Sage from South Central—is a _New York Times_ best-selling author, award-winning documentary filmmaker, and one of the best-known media figures in America today. His flagship daily radio program, “The Larry Elder Show,” was heard every weekday in all 50 states and on more than 300 stations. Larry’s unique style, personal background, and professional experience combine to inspire, inform, and persuade his listeners, readers, and viewers to embrace the timeless American principles of personal responsibility and public accountability. In his words: _“The question is not which party has my back, but which party can get government off our backs—so that we might all realize our God-given capabilities.”_ Larry was born and raised in South Central Los Angeles, and his family’s story represents every bit of the American Dream. His father was born in Athens, Georgia, served in the U.S. Marine Corps during World War II, and moved to California to open his own restaurant—Elder’s Snack Bar. Larry’s mother, originally from Huntsville, Alabama, was a clerical worker for the U.S. Department of War (now the U.S. Department of Defense) and raised three boys as a stay-at-home mom. After running for Governor of California in 2021 and securing millions of votes, Larry is now ready for the next step in his journey: Winning the Republican nomination for President of the United States in 2024.
---
[**SHOW YOUR SUPPORT**](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4zjtuc7vv8mqidgi58bhijmfq0ft8ms1a9kha3lk8_rp22sh2s8i61o37cjj60pj24no)

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Understand different ways of living
body:
I'm talking about studying American history!

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=72b167ae1c314172b6eb57fb688b7141&_e=2eA1M886YwVavZhCwBEpCN3V1JoOMQu7yJPnMuvYxw1Bfg7mb0cTQlrPiNXPcpWfl6rvJx3L1flwImnwIB7z5X_u445TKYYi8N88qRAX1byHBWFKlQO49r2zvfzDEPeEnopnm3jpmgodCbygo--sOiriUuF8VrYfl-QB5ffZxc3Vgkt3R3utYmgMdE_kfsNmIiXVIeb6oEruxZRJWbDU5fq8pwV2VLZ4BeXiikQ9XfPYOBlMMw6QHROwqOEVqkGdepGtT9eOPuG3r7jskpvBR8fVZUHGIS0KyR2xUxl9aOjHW9YMyLUxinzqGfntBjBqN411k7k2l2F_ba2DL9Tro2g2dyoqKopZRLku0MbYGlR5NfH_jDqXHkhHp7BiOqlM5NsCuisPJHG7cMByP1yJG3RjzM6LxUMBg6LlqoLOTSM%3D) Dear Fellow American, Thanks for opening my email. I hope you're having a great day so far. I'm reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. I'm talking about studying American history! As Hillsdale College professor Wilfred McClay explains in our online course **["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=72b167ae1c314172b6eb57fb688b7141&_e=2eA1M886YwVavZhCwBEpCN3V1JoOMQu7yJPnMuvYxw1Bfg7mb0cTQlrPiNXPcpWfl6rvJx3L1flwImnwIB7z5X_u445TKYYi8N88qRAX1byHBWFKlQO49r2zvfzDEPeEnopnm3jpmgodCbygo--sOiriUuF8VrYfl-QB5ffZxc3Vgkt3R3utYmgMdE_kfsNmIiXVIeb6oEruxZRJWbDU5fq8pwV2VLZ4BeXiikQ9XfPYOBlMMw6QHROwqOEVqkGdepGtT9eOPuG3r7jskpvBR0af-YfG9kGiEUSeGSn886Tv7kDxcGnCe7lpyz0eFGC36qFloPcxtwVQJCK6cN28Ef8Kr8F_zoUKkxQkEVNNQlZTX9o8FCaV2pjvBeN3RZCTHnHd003G0WwQ2cxDeQhCKaEmDtCJ9xcntjPl1QNJoY0%3D)** studying history can broaden your perspective and help you understand different ways of living. Compare that to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," now a multi-part series streaming online. The "1619 Project" locates the founding of America in 1619, the year the first slave arrived on our shores, rather than in 1776, when the **Declaration of Independence declared that all men are created equal with unalienable God-given rights**. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom but slavery--and the project's main goal is to broadcast this false teaching into every home, including yours. We must counter this false and dishonest historical narrative with the truth. **That 's why we've turned our online course, ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=72b167ae1c314172b6eb57fb688b7141&_e=2eA1M886YwVavZhCwBEpCN3V1JoOMQu7yJPnMuvYxw1Bfg7mb0cTQlrPiNXPcpWfl6rvJx3L1flwImnwIB7z5X_u445TKYYi8N88qRAX1byHBWFKlQO49r2zvfzDEPeEnopnm3jpmgodCbygo--sOiriUuF8VrYfl-QB5ffZxc3Vgkt3R3utYmgMdE_kfsNmIiXVIeb6oEruxZRJWbDU5fq8pwV2VLZ4BeXiikQ9XfPYOBlMMw6QHROwqOEVqkGdepGtT9eOPuG3r7jskpvBR6TEqh8Ovehv01d2MkrMvaeJ--Hrd4-hAQ86F401i_coaspL2Q9ySb6Rcjvh5LzHHJbecMf2ERcUiceby2IwZF1PCmqJsIoOuqYuBwTxPssaal22B8yhQMgv7ZANKJXOde3vxJ-lGHUvAA0QqfH-dK8%3D) into a DVD set, and I'd like you to have a copy.** **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** presents a full, unbiased account of America's past. We produced this course to restore the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among our young people--essential to restoring free government. You'll be excited to learn that **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," which tells people, especially children, that America is essentially an unjust nation--the opposite of our nation's unifying principles. Today, you can claim a DVD copy of **["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=72b167ae1c314172b6eb57fb688b7141&_e=2eA1M886YwVavZhCwBEpCN3V1JoOMQu7yJPnMuvYxw1Bfg7mb0cTQlrPiNXPcpWfl6rvJx3L1flwImnwIB7z5X_u445TKYYi8N88qRAX1byHBWFKlQO49r2zvfzDEPeEnopnm3jpmgodCbygo--sOiriUuF8VrYfl-QB5ffZxc3Vgkt3R3utYmgMdE_kfsNmIiXVIeb6oEruxZRJWbDU5fq8pwV2VLZ4BeXiikQ9XfPYOBlMMw6QHROwqOEVqkGdepGtT9eOPuG3r7jskpvBR3mGQxDbmjQQnFeo2WFBVRfyCGK1u4WGtDzoPRkjvWklBDeydOzoa6aG9CxtCBZrQK285Ok-zJVku3KhSS0noDJPL2VAQcvY7bZEsd9HMxYH6Ds_tKJEaks3CklrPAQu39QVV6VLiuQjp6sKFwuFMyI%3D)** for your home library or give it as a gift. **Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty.** Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=72b167ae1c314172b6eb57fb688b7141&_e=2eA1M886YwVavZhCwBEpCN3V1JoOMQu7yJPnMuvYxw1Bfg7mb0cTQlrPiNXPcpWfl6rvJx3L1flwImnwIB7z5X_u445TKYYi8N88qRAX1byHBWFKlQO49r2zvfzDEPeEnopnm3jpmgodCbygo--sOiriUuF8VrYfl-QB5ffZxc3Vgkt3R3utYmgMdE_kfsNmIiXVIeb6oEruxZRJWbDU5fq8pwV2VLZ4BeXiikQ9XfPYOBlMMw6QHROwqOEVqkGdepGtT9eOPuG3r7jskpvBR9htcaQorakSqtmecrljs4eG_jiPD1wx7soFeUrynfOgvr4otyespEz53XaYXc99RD9xmQma7oXYfrB3UxrPHevVLOg3ThzPGMrLdSZmWZMrRcEtOL8hNuxFoCmkR6_7OMM6TZxYCknLl0ysvTxJj_w%3D)** Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and for supporting its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College **P.S.** Despite what _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project" says, our nation's history is unifying. That's why we've produced a full, unbiased account of America's past with **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"** now available on DVD. You can receive your copy with your generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more using this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=72b167ae1c314172b6eb57fb688b7141&_e=2eA1M886YwVavZhCwBEpCN3V1JoOMQu7yJPnMuvYxw1Bfg7mb0cTQlrPiNXPcpWfl6rvJx3L1flwImnwIB7z5X_u445TKYYi8N88qRAX1byHBWFKlQO49r2zvfzDEPeEnopnm3jpmgodCbygo--sOiriUuF8VrYfl-QB5ffZxc3Vgkt3R3utYmgMdE_kfsNmIiXVIeb6oEruxZRJWbDU5fq8pwV2VLZ4BeXiikQ9XfPYOBlMMw6QHROwqOEVqkGdepGtT9eOPuG3r7jskpvBRyZACNLzxAUWfRmaJoVxAhGifxkvh8EFMf2-XCu2i_P7GWYkfAFhq2OhetIJhxFSZwVebVr-FRSKivRo9ulA5XcRgwwM92SxLjWDqB6n7zDna4ewvcfueLgpFTuYHcfHkqtH59dsq06VZShnaiilR58%3D)** Act today because quantities are limited! Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans. |

| Conservative Liberty Wire

name: Priority Gold
subject: Biden to Launch “FedNOW” [Move Your Money Now]
body:
Earlier this year President Biden signed the death warrant for America...

| | |
# ****
---
| | Earlier this year President Biden signed the death warrant for America...

**[Executive Order 14067](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f2c2d36b9cbf42d8807131c60119cef8&_e=cGci_bd1Dt8VQML_yCfzYduD-jYM-0tuU6ErVJcaQ69Ri2KwWE2kc2X82SoNX0Do4_5DUNPTd5YBQ8mM70jW1c_vMMmFu9ajWB3tySUtmggi11MFnLMmhiC8SCOCZ0lGc5vB7LM4L3d_bcBY3wsuR90YfB0lMt_cO5ub3FsksiAHLfpJesKmWFBZFN4afK_Z_yT2PW2BTovuYncLnMB8P-C8aubpcRysRqk-cUbmTmWnHA02dpNsHvvv0I0VRwrZ13BFwFO2xWBv86XgyR3JIA%3D%3D)** will essentially cancel your money.

You see Biden and the Fed have teamed up to create a controllable, traceable, programmable digital currency to replace the dollar...
---
| Giving 'them' full control to:
* Legally spy on how you spend every penny of your money...
* Take control of your bank account and your purchases...
* Silence any political opponents...

It's already all underway...

The first phase launches next May with what they are calling "FedNOW" ...

Where they will start to track all of our payments...
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f2c2d36b9cbf42d8807131c60119cef8&_e=cGci_bd1Dt8VQML_yCfzYduD-jYM-0tuU6ErVJcaQ69Ri2KwWE2kc2X82SoNX0Do4_5DUNPTd5YBQ8mM70jW1c_vMMmFu9ajWB3tySUtmgiMvS8X3x7-3CPNEX2LnPuFYEzITQk4BsgiB213TKw7iNaLwHQ-3ui3KUP5LnpxpS5QQsZakwAq0ZZ7j8NE0t8fmpE06EiFgN9BDabwU5iKwY4mUMCqQ2MzzPtUH2ByJeb9nUypbp6bnQugSdL5rkBt6mrHQJG-il_WJsGDIoKv-Q%3D%3D) **( Taken Directly From The FederalReserve.Gov Website)**
---

# Friday, June 9, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today we commemorate the 80th anniversary of Congress authorizing the withholding of federal income tax as a temporary wartime measure. World War II is long over, but we've been withholding ever since. Today we're talking about Donald Trump's second indictment this year, a new Gallup Poll showing that more Americans identify as conservative, and a carpenter building a working replica of a 1948 Citroen out of fruit trees. Have thoughts on what we can do better? [Please send us a note](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover)**** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! ## Trump Indicted Over Classified Documents
Donald Trump [has been indicted](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vtDAQhH-N6RYZmzNQuHgbunvblMh4l2MTf5zAHLl_H5E60miakUaPno_7dHccOD3-u0i2LHlyvvCLJmlADqD0pCq0C5EiXZFtTG90I_Ugq9W6fu40troZjHPL7Qr2XTto42dvPFZslVRaGjk0UjZ6qJfOI3n0s0ZPqG-ilYRc8lZ_Zk5lpSW884u22udYBbuW8tyF_ifUKNR4nmft0-yvUajxuhZqlOaqXqixbEd8wu7eO6y0w0yUgBOyL4SwHzHmRAglw0JImwvg87EV4ASRXWRI9F3gJPqq1xJDtVl8nhwC76YTrXxEx-GXq_yt6ScAAP__H_xq_Q) by a federal grand jury in connection with his possession of hundreds of classified government documents found at his Mar-a-Lago residence after he left the White House. He's set to appear in federal court in Miami next Tuesday. Trump was the first to announce the indictment, using his own Truth Social social media platform. This is his second indictment this year. He pleaded not guilty in April to charges in New York of falsifying business records. "I never thought this could happen to a former President of the United States," [Trump posted](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGnwRvW-XBIPDB08ZauHS0MR3wVBgto3Lx91c6d_-GXvo_7crccOT3e7U6mhbxY1_hJC2gJk0S1YOdNIEJSHZlB37QaQE3QbcY7NyBSWAHtuNoA-naZJlg1XcGPGjs2CKhAwzQADGrqw9V5ct6tyjvy6iJGIM8tl_4zc2obhfjKTyq9y3sXzdbaUYV6EzgLnM_z7EP-TnTW3y5wPnLkxq4KnEMuOxV5FKrsKTXZytd-yGpfVW62ypUoSU6eXSPfFeOPk2Pkqq9ihMduOf492_8EPwEAAP__tLdgYA) Thursday. "I AM AN INNOCENT MAN!"
## America is Becoming More Conservative
America is turning right: Social conservatism in the U.S. is at [its highest level](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFThDAQhX8NdGE2CRekSGFz3dlaMmGzwGpIbpJ46L930Bkr2_e-4r3v9TbdHAeO64vbydYlTQ4rP2gCI2AUSk-q9XYhUqRbstI8GS1Bj9BuFjWSVIMybuwX6mcYaNDzgpcRpER3adkqUBoMjBJA6rFbBvSEHmftkby-ND2Q55py95Y41o2W8JUelDtMexvsVuu9NPq5UddGXY_j6A5XNo5rTZE-3c7xF23UNdJRTuavF4UwUz3DsiV8F26nzOhE_cixiMzrVgWmWCg_3Pm4iJruIvBM2YUiehDKtNn6-8EhcDFD08O6Ow4_4-r_rr4DAAD__9OYb3w) in a decade, with 38 percent of Americans saying they're conservative or very conservative, according to a new Gallup poll. That compares to 29 percent who describe themselves as liberal, down from 2022. A year ago, the two groups tied at 34 percent each. Gallup's annual Beliefs and Values survey also shows that economic conservatism has grown to its highest level since 2012, with 44 percent identifying as conservative on financial issues. ([Full Survey Results Here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuhSAUgOGngU1zAEEdGLq43a4dDcJBT4NihHrbt2_a-c7_8Cffx2N-OEp0rO9uR1tjnp2vdOMMpoGxkWqWPNiIKFFxtMIMRglQI_DN9kMUfsFFaJTCdYMYPMZFdKMWLpqgOVkJUoGBUQAINbax9wF98IsKHoPSrAMMVPPVfmY66oYx_eQbr9bnnSe71XoWpt6YnJicDnyWdnUpfZ1_ncnpzCkxOWkwvdFMTiV7cqnx-Sh43a5S2ZuN1g1LbQJ6F7B15fzmlw3nk1KiYnrWwbo7Sv_L-lrgNwAA___H-F5r))
## China Building Spy Base in Cuba?
China is [seeking to spy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOqzAQRb_GdKBhHAwULl7jLq_dEjnjcZiVsVHwhs3fr7L1Nre50jnS-bguVy9J8v2_39jWWBZPVZ68gGlhblEv2AQbmZF1w7Y3k9E96Bma1RodKQxDZPAGdX-bKcZ-HCZ9iQNNIzZiEVCDgbkH6PXcxZECU6CbDsRBD-oCHKSWR_dZJNeVY3qVJz86KluT7Frrfij9T6FT6M7z7Cjn96fQvckKHZj3TArdXpJUoUOho6-bb2mV7Ntjf0m-t9GTJKkvhU5y4O9urVtqHjbsp6QkhxnVBe6bl_Srrn-X-AkAAP__w2xfHA) on the U.S. from Cuba, according to reports that have alarmed U.S. government officials, who warn of a return to a Cold War standoff, this time against China instead of Russia. A spy base in Cuba, just 100 miles off the U.S. coast, [would allow Beijing](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO6yAQheGngQ5rAAdCQXEbutx2SwvDOJ4VNpZNYuXtV956m1Md6ZP-r8fwiFRoff6PC_o21SGmRm8cwAhwQulB8ewnRIWao5fmbrQE7YDP3rr7aE2MUSebbS_7LG9OZmOlmxDhxskrUBoMOAkgtesmmzKmnEadE2Z9Yz1gplb37rvS2macyqe-ce9SXXjxc2vbwfQ_pgJT4TzPbquFGqV6HZgKK54HU-FSmApgrrkzFdJMaxTH9hF1Fa9DpNcYBYAEcA747vN2Uil0GMt6eC6Ryq_Y_g7wEwAA__8NHlnv) to collect intelligence on southeastern portions of America, home to many military facilities and major industries. The Pentagon denied the reports, but said they were [closely monitoring](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGSpCAQQL8GMyykR2YMCC4xm0svtFpotK8QLGHG9e-3djfd-L3g1fv3nJ7IkdPyFzeyNeQJXeU3TcpINUgNk268DUSaoCHbmYeBTsGgmtX26mHuA8KsHtqBnnvdo-4IDQAEM_iGrVYalFFDp1QHQxvuzpPzbgbvyEMvboo813y0_zOnulKIV37T0bq8NdGute5FwB-hR6HH8zzbE8vKaak50QdunH5Uocc9R3aX0KOnQKmQTFg5J4yykHsdXL_YTqnikpP0lJiKdCsnKiTda8Yky37JgI4j16s5rN9PjpGLuYubWjbk-F1Vf5_0GQAA__8WpmzU) the growing relationship between Cuba and China.

clean_body: | | | - | | | Friday, June 9, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we commemorate the 80th anniversary of Congress authorizing the withholding of federal income tax as a temporary wartime measure. World War II is long over, but we've been withholding ever since. Today we're talking about Donald Trump's second indictment this year, a new Gallup Poll showing that more Americans identify as conservative, and a carpenter building a working replica of a 1948 Citroen out of fruit trees. Have thoughts on what we can do better? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading The Flyover, and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, - | Trump Indicted Over Classified Documents Donald Trump by a federal grand jury in connection with his possession of hundreds of classified government documents found at his Mar-a-Lago residence after he left the White House. He's set to appear in federal court in Miami next Tuesday. Trump was the first to announce the indictment, using his own Truth Social social media platform. This is his second indictment this year. [More survivors of Veterans eligible for PACT Act benefits](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zoibebc73r15o1cf49dnt97e2eqbj14n15q264ag_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f833cug69pt5mup7add6elp76t5jeup7ctd7mcqq6t9hekp78ctmemij3d5n6ip33d9lkcrr4td0egr32td46oonb8hl6eqj6d5heprq48d245p25oh4cdge6pj4cjh6cpj24no)
The PACT Act, passed in August 2022, expands Veterans' eligibility to benefits based on the addition of new presumptive conditions and toxic exposure locations. Presumptive conditions are ones VA assumes are related to military service, therefore making it easier for Veterans to connect certain conditions to their military service. As a result, more survivors are eligible for benefits than ever before.

name: ICYMI News
subject: George Washington, Winston Churchill, and more
body:
I have a special gift for you

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2alppjklttab36neuk2rner6t7gp9b7eqtec7vg_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpi69oj1chh2bs) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale’s Michigan campus_ —one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkpc83jr0cjq5ashnr4o8ja8m9vjk7lpsfjamor8_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpi69oj1chh2bs) Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty—especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty.** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery—and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K–12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted—out of ignorance—to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away.** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will...**
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of _Imprimis_ ...for life).

* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.

* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”

* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support.** Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. **You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1k1o8pqd4l8e5r814qsvst3p71ll1t3m8set48o_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpi69oj1chh2bs) After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. **Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost.** Warm regards, Bill Gray Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

ICYMI News

It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as The New York Times ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is reaching and teaching millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. Your generous support today will... Expand the circulation of Imprimis , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of Imprimis ...for life). Send millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution. Increase the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.” Launch and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens. One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support. Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below: After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost. Warm regards, Bill Gray Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College ICYMI News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Don’t let them “cancel” American history
body:
I have a special gift for you

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=abdac308a9c046939f2e5c3eb1d89041&_e=gRFTYnaHrwn-8cX26DjBZ43wLjjilG0gc0N48lz9lMAriQ9t6aI8bVCdaTfYO8PKuf9HysPhsz5A3dIZuCjtu3O7FM-wwE8keiwkC86kZNFeRPMSoKVHf8hEerjUS39ZM8jF9VdNWF9BcM6A7g5Arc3Wsc6rWjuWFE9TDGgKkNd3dCRDrA-bigs1RCIi7aDtuTkbkM1slaT8dxhV3qyw5ukN8EktCMs1J9gzJbHaUlSON4AVijBV0znTPsh00QdVWqW8Ko6X8rNzzdc_Zty4WxVsvZbVpt7sck_TxrTfRecsHeG_yOd_0bt7a4fTO2UBbS4cVY51NSpgQaG0mfpWwIxC6pKqBGSTF3xcKo0grHkV74ymDoVFRic2qi2t0yAJ25ky0sXNMO8vR-dehhGUv2UZ5V6SjAMWWn5pAJJtuc4%3D) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you--a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the "Liberty Walk" statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale 's Michigan campus_--one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=abdac308a9c046939f2e5c3eb1d89041&_e=gRFTYnaHrwn-8cX26DjBZ43wLjjilG0gc0N48lz9lMAriQ9t6aI8bVCdaTfYO8PKuf9HysPhsz5A3dIZuCjtu3O7FM-wwE8keiwkC86kZNFeRPMSoKVHf8hEerjUS39ZM8jF9VdNWF9BcM6A7g5Arc3Wsc6rWjuWFE9TDGgKkNd3dCRDrA-bigs1RCIi7aDtuTkbkM1slaT8dxhV3qyw5ukN8EktCMs1J9gzJbHaUlSON4AVijBV0znTPsh00QdVWqW8Ko6X8rNzzdc_Zty4W2RFoXE1riJPhpZVHltwjM8Y2976uB0GmB6vBaCA3vboGaz6u_IzUUkoH7us9jzeP-BYyDpHR92C81LvJtQB-H-zmHCen6ZVytOBcKmX-i5YGZzWrZ9iYSZvDGGh1EF62B5hISUH6caTs_tEF2fr-Ig%3D) Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty--especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. ** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I've been thinking about this for a long time. Here's one primary reason... For decades, the "progressive" leftist academics who became dominant in most of America's colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project" is a prime example. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery--and the Project's main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America's K-12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted--out of ignorance--to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the "progressive" Left's influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of "political correctness." The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of "progress" until it has "canceled" patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past--many of whom are depicted on the cards I'd like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away. ** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you --citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty--we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation's youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _ The New York Times_' "1619 Project" that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America's great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will... **
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of _Imprimis_ ...for life).

* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.

* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale's free online courses such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope."

* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our "Liberty Walk." The cards are a thank you for your support. ** Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. **You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=abdac308a9c046939f2e5c3eb1d89041&_e=gRFTYnaHrwn-8cX26DjBZ43wLjjilG0gc0N48lz9lMAriQ9t6aI8bVCdaTfYO8PKuf9HysPhsz5A3dIZuCjtu3O7FM-wwE8keiwkC86kZNFeRPMSoKVHf8hEerjUS39ZM8jF9VdNWF9BcM6A7g5Arc3Wsc6rWjuWFE9TDGgKkNd3dCRDrA-bigs1RCIi7aDtuTkbkM1slaT8dxhV3qyw5ukN8EktCMs1J9gzJbHaUlSON4AVijBV0znTPsh00QdVWqW8Ko6X8rNzzdc_Zty4Wz0PTysDKBt0L_GToiQDt3KN3gL3S3BsHiNU-RfBl4dBbQS0ut7MZPDRenqqMt6nox1EKUe4nq1lDBmnbBIZ_vMP_EScXOKJe97H_HCN4pHE0IlSSvBlgdg-XCCGbJ06BY16bzSGxlTIstY3IATYrD8%3D) After receiving your notecards, I hope you'll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale's many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project." It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. **Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty --no matter the cost. ** Warm regards, Bill Gray Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

# [Add your name: Tell Special Counsel Jack Smith and the grand jury: “Thank you for indicting Donald Trump”](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tab868063-928c-42be-bd5e-b7244b7b02ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | Donald Trump has been indicted for federal crimes on seven counts, according to multiple sources. The details are still emerging, but it's clear that Special Counsel Jack Smith and the grand jury showed great courage in doing the right thing, in the face of massive pressure and even outright threats from Trump supporters. [**Please add your name, and join us in telling them: "Thank you for indicting Donald Trump"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T84ee25a8-0968-4dc8-99c5-ac8400c3d176/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Exclusive offer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
You may think that “woke” activists recently took over education and children’s books.

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z03n99nt30khvnoa5lbnebhusfhsfahohqa4ll0g_rp22sh2s8i66o73cph62pb4s5h2bs "Tuttle Twins")
Friend,

Over 10 years ago, I wanted to teach my children about the ideas of liberty, free markets, limited government, and personal responsibility.

To my surprise, there were almost no children’s books on these topics!

You may think that “woke” activists recently took over education and children’s books. But I hate to break it to you. The indoctrination has gone on for a lot longer than conservatives, and libertarians realize.

I decided to write my own children’s stories that teach kids the ideas of liberty, so I created the Tuttle Twins. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaa9d0rkgjlh491ruljeh00b9pnbmfun0nt6dk1o_rp22sh2s8i66o73cph62pb4s5h2bs) The Tuttle Twins have sold and distributed over 4 MILLION copies worldwide!

My goal is to distribute another 1 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins to schools and families**.**

**Here’s my exclusive offer happening this month. Thanks to a generous supporter, ALL donations to the Tuttle Twins are being MATCHED! That means your $10 contribution becomes $20.**

It costs roughly $10 to distribute one book. But right now, your $10 contribution will distribute two books.

[Friend, can you donate $10 or more and help me spread the ideas of liberty to children across America?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1gin9ee0m4ifgdljat1gm3j1go3tlk232o168vo_rp22sh2s8i66o73cph62pb4s5h2bs)

| You can be the reason a kid discovers the ideas of liberty by finding a Tuttle Twins book in their library.

Here are some of our popular titles:
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhcdsrtp713g5hjmk8vked3ppnb5khbkseu8aag0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cph62pb4s5h2bs)
---
**The Tuttle Twins Learn About The Law**

What are individual rights, and where do they come from? Should the government help people, or should we? Ethan and Emily explore these and more questions as they learn about the law and help your kids do the same.

Full of bright, engaging illustrations, this unique book introduces your child to fundamental principles that schools no longer teach.
---
| [Donate & Double Your Impact >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm0mh4a3d1kligfd3pkf3pf7ieaoo7k245pr5qf0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cph62pb4s5h2bs "Donate & Double Your Impact")
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrki9v7md3i2c6rhk1anpdfsb1rc4gd1lai2sbb0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cph62pb4s5h2bs)
---
**The Tuttle Twins and the Miraculous Pencil**

What is the free market, and why is it so important? Ethan and Emily embark on a fun field trip to learn how pencils are made using parts from all over the world—and how in an economy, people work together in harmony to produce helpful products that improve our lives.

Leonard Read’s classic essay “I, Pencil” comes to life in this engaging adventure featuring amazing illustrations to help children become immersed in the story.
---

---
**The Tuttle Twins and the Road to Surfdom**

History abounds with examples of government officials making decisions, well-intentioned or otherwise, that harm others. Unfortunately, these unintended consequences are never anticipated and rarely considered once they occur. As the Tuttle Twins find in their latest adventure, central planning can ruin people’s lives.

Nobel prize-winning economist F.A. Hayek’s famous book _The Road to Serfdom_ comes to life in this edition, showing that when people get what they wish for, they often get much more than they bargained. Read along as Ethan and Emily investigate a new road built to take travelers to a beach named Surfdom—and the disruption it brings to the entire community.
---
| [Donate & Double Your Impact >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvgircdsq8o06g4bp2cn5fsk3q7or9n4jpkqo5og_rp22sh2s8i66o73cph62pb4s5h2bs "Donate & Double Your Impact")

---
**The Tuttle Twins and the 12 Rules Boot Camp**

Life doesn’t come with a manual, but there are some helpful rules that one can follow in their life to be set up for success. That’s something that the Tuttle twins have been taught by their parents— and something they teach to their Uncle Brock in their new adventure.

Inspired by the popular _12 Rules for Life_ written by Jordan Peterson, this story sees the twins organize a boot camp for Brock to help him see the power of these ideas — and how each of the ideas is like an ingredient that, when mixed together, can lead to great results!

name: Joe Sweeney
subject: A Historic Victory - Let's Build on Our Success!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
A Victory for NH Taxpayers, and our Plan for the Future.

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/1/01000188a00a0321-ba711002-d74a-41f6-8b04-15445949737c-000000/OTO7PoMosinepmlk-SN912m85Lk=325)
---
| | Derek,

Yesterday, our thinly divided House of Representatives made history. We passed the state budget bills HB1 and HB2 with broad bipartisan majorities, cementing a significant victory for the taxpayers of New Hampshire and setting a new standard for responsible governance. This is a budget that puts Granite Staters first - **without the need for additional taxes.**

One of the standout triumphs in this budget is a clear pathway to making New Hampshire truly income tax-free by 2025. This is a testament to our commitment to fiscal conservatism and our dedication to creating a pro-growth environment that benefits everyone in our state.

While this is a momentous achievement, we cannot rest on our laurels. To build on the successes of this budget and to continue protecting the taxpayers of New Hampshire, [we must expand our majorities in 2024.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/1/01000188a00a0321-ba711002-d74a-41f6-8b04-15445949737c-000000/u5s-00mRat5yQnR0Q29zGqBBQtM=325)

Granite Solutions is at the forefront of this crucial mission. Our organization is dedicated to supporting the election of fiscal conservatives who can continue this legacy of responsible governance. But to make that a reality, we need your help.

Every contribution counts. [A donation of $10, $25, $50, or even $100 can make a significant difference in our campaign to expand our majorities.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/2/01000188a00a0321-ba711002-d74a-41f6-8b04-15445949737c-000000/GRvxNLulbCDxXGCCzLbp34WUMc4=325) Your support will help us engage in effective communication and advertisements targeting the voters most likely to decide our elections.

We've made history once; with your help, we can do it again. Let's continue the mission to keep New Hampshire thriving and prosperous for generations to come.

[Please consider making a contribution today through WinRed.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/3/01000188a00a0321-ba711002-d74a-41f6-8b04-15445949737c-000000/wbB84iUBZfYYGI2iTUZy41TRmps=325)

Thank you for your continuous support.

Best regards,

Rep. Joe Sweeney
Founder and Chair, Granite Solutions

name: Hung Cao
subject: I’ve seen how this ends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
| | | Peter,

I’ve seen the weaponization of law enforcement in communist and authoritarian regimes, and it’s _terrifying._

You can be thrown behind bars or worse for just daring to speak out against those in power.

It’s the kind of tyranny my family put their lives on the line to escape in Communist Vietnam, and it’s something I **never** thought I’d see here in America.

_But with the indictment of President Trump, our justice system has become a tool of the political elite._

This should terrify every freedom-loving American, Peter.

If our land of the free falls, there will be nowhere else to turn.

I’m determined to protect our freedom and fix our justice system, but I can’t do it alone.

[**Please, stand with me today to DEFEND freedom and make sure America NEVER goes down the road of communist tyranny.**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=8c4a6eded317493c8a5356cfb72c5eaf&_e=juGLJlKCP0lA9011ljFLhhvOTHpoUw3BuLFfZsRnsSJtQmTLqyp7spUG5lyjCReqDYiKis2qE1vWnkOdoFcqMX9JrNYcFrZPOQYJn1jfqDX9rl6-PpgQnYOAz7v_yPPJeAuuKYi7R6I8BAHg3_ijxfCfgq8c5zBVoSXknGG2zPiA9wXi5rlr1POhBeE-1mP5bSKUqPh3kUa-HYOMlDU-kvb6u-fObUq5g0x9HLPObdI0q0Opr2qT43BYPLhhHvdj5OAac9DVy2fbhmRZ6k5o-mVLwmRsJ_X66SSz5dswOAi0WgWWUUSBRWguJU8qgWAs0yeHj0OphLYCBkH8f3SocxeEg1gYKQNj1vqvJJsU__ujhqK4EGAK1FV3YsSwr4BZ)

Fellow Conservative,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.**

**I am in Washington to fight for YOU**. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, **this fight has put a HUGE target on my back** , a target that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, **[which is why I am reaching out- I need your help today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1b9627f0e43b4b6ab37e05d827afa76a&_e=auBO9k4H-7xJ1aSF0Eo550qSf2zkRWjtZwsURa1N36mkCWA1UfZQqIgzsJ2KPmXFYhFjMoLCDN5Ucfu9gNoRSLnRWaaqSerM2oqKfkgvA4OjBLmZYOyRajdanYmkWvfRiGdnpETO5PD4ZqVbar0ymZUqaxk7BT3WqcDmuoq8ZBU8p9xggnd6sfMFG6fQ4Nzrlh_f93XCJCTLB3R8s5qekKZ7zmUKuInxo6TmixgIGoVZjgHZK4WDuTfYDhXasIxV-iNy1VI5KdDAMgeMtURiKfVE_6Cd-UqQ9opCw5xVhOuhHKoRF4U6Bc63tstrsM-Odf58TN9ptF0msz4B7a3GAzIQDYB812mqg3DoaYT4DrBwCFulyL3-OeDg2AqbST3djFehG43L81AsogyqUGoEPCrHcR8RGIYIqCD0J2M3Tag0e0jX-I1NU-QYFiYIUYjo)**.

[**CHIP IN $2

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25084%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5ubrTB%2baUR%2biDVRLsWCJyA&sysid=1)
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25095%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9q32nvlYorFqlUkmX6qumg&sysid=1)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25096%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=orzLWo5SZr3asJPNg8pHzQ&sysid=1)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25097%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lCyVnR2c9vQSvQ3MfVIlBQ&sysid=1)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25098%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cIhbBMMeSeL08QyDeZ8WPg&sysid=1)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25099%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uR7QU9nUCBMJZo3pnNZOtA&sysid=1)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25090%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F%2f0MsxxYK872%2f7AydMQ9zw&sysid=1)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25091%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yAUT20ZWjxYWepFam5EM1A&sysid=1)**.

clean_body: 14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. | | | | Dear Friend, Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. You've seen my work. Most Americans have. In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me. It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and no one to stop me. Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned. Those 14 years were formative. When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle. I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership. Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. And leadership has a price." I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded. In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me. And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up that will quickly pile up. As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that the cost will exceed $500,000. Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep. No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me. That's where you come in. ? When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting! A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced. Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer. But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming. . And I'll commit to you that I will NOT let you down. So please, . We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can. Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . and we cannot stop now! Respectfully, James O'Keefe P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, . Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Peter,

SNEAK PEAK... we're sending over the OFFICIAL DONOR WALL UPDATE that our Team DeSantis donors received this morning.

We don't want you to miss out on this, Peter.

The work of hand-writing 100,000 names has officially kicked off at campaign headquarters, and we're pulling out all the stops to make sure our donors feel appreciated.

Wishing you were one of the names on our wall? It's not too late!

We want you to make history with us, Peter. Chip in any amount today to join Team DeSantis and get more updates like the one below!

In freedom,

Team DeSantis

Team DeSantis

Date: June 9, 2023 at 11:26 AM EDT

Subject: Your first donor wall update!

Friend,

Welcome to your first OFFICIAL DONOR WALL UPDATE

Our team is hard at work building our donor wall by hand-writing your name and the tens of thousands of DeSantis for President donors that have supported our campaign alongside you so far.

UPDATE: if you were one of our first 10,000 donors, your name may already be holding up our walls.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f7c54edd48e94a09c274aeb3e9fd28d3f9957049207f0268b059d6e543612bab8933b3caf7807c4679527ca242780cf0fa1742f2da12a2047430fc4d73fa8319

This wall is a work-in-progress, friend, and we want you to know that we're thinking of you every day as we continue this mission.

But, friend, we're not stopping here. We want to make sure you know exactly how much we appreciate you.

Here's what's in the works for our first 100,000 donors:

-
Your personal "Thank You" video ft. Gov. Ron DeSantis
-
A first look at our team building out our logo on the wall
-
Access to Team DeSantis conference calls to discuss the campaign
-
Specialty merchandise items
-
Exclusive previews of upcoming content and events

We can't wait to keep you updated on this project. We're so glad you're making history with us, friend.

In freedom,

Team DeSantis

P.S. Want to make a bigger difference on Team DeSantis? Consider becoming a monthly recurring donor today! Our recurring donors get EXCLUSIVE first-looks and offer at merchandise, news alerts, and more!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=38a7331d5e50ab543a3f5839a1535bef34767fca271d12f0ff92bdfa7c08c73485176cf8f613b319f3283905390754c4563c84b6ed3d6fc5c511f943a4e55439
BECOME A RECURRING DONOR TODAY

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=38a7331d5e50ab54cd9b831c49bf2ff6183240cf4751ad68c083970a5cb5432cd591113ee0de53f006ddddf33e687abbb71a9eaaf7466637b4f5b9fe1ef31d68
Sign up here!

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f7c54edd48e94a09c274aeb3e9fd28d3f9957049207f0268b059d6e543612bab8933b3caf7807c4679527ca242780cf0fa1742f2da12a2047430fc4d73fa8319

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
-
Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,
-
Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,
-
Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,
-
Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,
-
Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,
-
Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,
-
Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,
-
Protecting the unborn,
-
Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,
-
Expanding education freedom,
-
Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,
-
Lowering prescription drug costs,
-
Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,
-
Creating a universal school choice program,
-
Delivering record-breaking tax relief,
-
Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,
-
Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,
-
Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,
-
Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,
-
...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
-
Record tax relief
-
ESG prohibitions
-
Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
-
The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
-
Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
-
Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
-
Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
-
Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
-
The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
-
Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions
-
Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida
No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Peter, SNEAK PEAK... we're sending over the OFFICIAL DONOR WALL UPDATE that our Team DeSantis donors received this morning. We don't want you to miss out on this, Peter. The work of hand-writing 100,000 names has officially kicked off at campaign headquarters, and we're pulling out all the stops to make sure our donors feel appreciated. Wishing you were one of the names on our wall? It's not too late! We will be writing the first 100,000 names that donate to our campaign until June 30th! We want you to make history with us, Peter. Chip in any amount today to join Team DeSantis and get more updates like the one below! In freedom, Team DeSantis ----------- Forwarded message ----------- From: Team DeSantis Date: June 9, 2023 at 11:26 AM EDT Subject: Your first donor wall update! Friend, Welcome to your first OFFICIAL DONOR WALL UPDATE Our team is hard at work building our donor wall by hand-writing your name and the tens of thousands of DeSantis for President donors that have supported our campaign alongside you so far. UPDATE: if you were one of our first 10,000 donors, your name may already be holding up our walls. This wall is a work-in-progress, friend, and we want you to know that we're thinking of you every day as we continue this mission. But, friend, we're not stopping here. We want to make sure you know exactly how much we appreciate you. Here's what's in the works for our first 100,000 donors: - Your personal "Thank You" video ft. Gov. Ron DeSantis - A first look at our team building out our logo on the wall - Access to Team DeSantis conference calls to discuss the campaign - Specialty merchandise items - Exclusive previews of upcoming content and events We can't wait to keep you updated on this project. We're so glad you're making history with us, friend. In freedom, Team DeSantis P.S. Want to make a bigger difference on Team DeSantis? Consider becoming a monthly recurring donor today! Our recurring donors get EXCLUSIVE first-looks and offer at merchandise, news alerts, and more! BECOME A RECURRING DONOR TODAY Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Meet Ron DeSantis A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: - Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, - Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, - Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, - Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, - Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, - Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, - Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, - Protecting the unborn, - Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, - Expanding education freedom, - Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, - Lowering prescription drug costs, - Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, - Creating a universal school choice program, - Delivering record-breaking tax relief, - Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, - Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, - Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, - Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, - ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn’t stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.” Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family.
