name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze14bt2upsqb0h0944ohq7mcsu5v9i12je79n1og_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpj60o31c5h2bs)
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmp1gc0970s44so7eh2itsd33pq68u879q4sck2g_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpj60o31c5h2bs)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvdi1lrci2jissmv5g6j5m4ba5qjfhsg780oqqj0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpj60o31c5h2bs)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvd18ijdf98cgvfu7jr0qhu65u9ne2r7lmpe1030_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpj60o31c5h2bs)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztk1qmvpjk8ksiv0t83ue3274isdm4ropldnmpt0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpj60o31c5h2bs)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6rtdhkn22tcs47bcia27eipo6dinvamojeeqnso_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpj60o31c5h2bs)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk7ff8lfffnffg9en30st1guvfmgjpt9kt240j88_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpj60o31c5h2bs)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbt3n7a4bj18i4hctrqk5dkjloq0gn25lv6pio20_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpj60o31c5h2bs)**.

---

1600 Daily

clean_body: 14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. | | | | Dear Friend, Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have. In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me. It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and no one to stop me. Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned. Those 14 years were formative. When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle. I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership. Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. And leadership has a price.” I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded. In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me. And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up that will quickly pile up. As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that the cost will exceed $500,000. Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep. No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me. That’s where you come in. ? When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting! A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced. Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer. But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming. . And I’ll commit to you that I will NOT let you down. So please, . We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can. Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . and we cannot stop now! Respectfully, James O’Keefe P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, . 1600 Daily 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

This month, we’re celebrating Pride by reaffirming our commitment to dismantling barriers that continue to impact the LGBTQ+ community across Tennessee. Pride should be a month full of celebration — displaying the full depth and diversity of LGBTQ+ Tennesseans. Unfortunately, the reality is, we have a long way to go to ensure that LGBTQ+ Tennesseans can live free and authentic lives with the full protections every person deserves. [**Can you split a contribution today between our team and the Tennessee Equality Project to help us advance protections for LGBTQ+ Tennesseans?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64561163/410495642/1121846682?refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230609_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDYyZThjNi1jNzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Gq5-qOxpXXlMb9WyJ_cT0NBtC2Wn5sMFCEyD6Gf1Rk=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between the Tennessee Democratic Party and the Tennessee Equality Project through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64561164/410495643/1121846682?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230609_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDYyZThjNi1jNzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Gq5-qOxpXXlMb9WyJ_cT0NBtC2Wn5sMFCEyD6Gf1Rk=)

Republicans continue to openly and freely discriminate against members of the LGBTQ+ community both in their words and actions and in the policies they create and support.
Leading organizations agree, we still have a ways to go — the Human Rights Campaign scored Tennessee as a **“******High Priority to Achieve Basic Equality”** **in the 2022 State Equality index report. body:
We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=22087e50958d4df49a534bc3f6b31bca&_t=PQ0y9SkxxlPVW2AHeG75LJxNcytDdKl_MXxvvYZe5RlzP5dtPwYpdHhR8clR8QVKpbk10W495FEgk6_9VrD7e91ZCHzdJpld_wub9J-HAk4%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=22087e50958d4df49a534bc3f6b31bca&_t=PQ0y9SkxxlPVW2AHeG75LJxNcytDdKl_MXxvvYZe5RlzP5dtPwYpdHhR8clR8QVKpbk10W495FEgk6_9VrD7e91ZCHzdJpld_wub9J-HAk4%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=22087e50958d4df49a534bc3f6b31bca&_e=hY-HT2jBPyYeh2sMoPdd3_4w9aWDOBHJ68WR4U2eCFobDgUBM2I5Z3F80-_FtFxtwd_Fy-FwYT-zKVidp2hbTvPk2ol-lvaH8WRWZtXLsyQiHbIlIg47rtPrHvOW6sAapH39mm63BzEa9jT4mm-AW5LxpBnQqfCCpaLygX7b8_WU_hBBg_SPjaXWCuzPN2Se9j5dd2YynUGPzljDB9DDUVGhYBGQ9Gl-rPBaaVosxqWOJrH2sGhRgj2mYZHJk_UHGGSdXM-jN68q5e9TLOmrrhneB_RpL7Iat1zZM95D7583t807WTi2eyYJElo3lbu0fliXRY2Wos-KMRTQk7ybag42-THd-6YSG0DczGDPjoL8dym82a9bC-vuuzQ9_B4XpnutpTpNMwRmlpZACpjGSNFiWx9x0dM5A8SMPeAraGrY3GseJp2HZrhY2gKneLXq)
|

Peter,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.**

**I am in Washington to fight for YOU**. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, **this fight has put a HUGE target on my back** , a target that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, **[which is why I am reaching out- I need your help today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=22087e50958d4df49a534bc3f6b31bca&_e=hY-HT2jBPyYeh2sMoPdd3_4w9aWDOBHJ68WR4U2eCFobDgUBM2I5Z3F80-_FtFxtwd_Fy-FwYT-zKVidp2hbTvPk2ol-lvaH8WRWZtXLsyQiHbIlIg47rtPrHvOW6sAapH39mm63BzEa9jT4mm-AW5LxpBnQqfCCpaLygX7b8_WU_hBBg_SPjaXWCuzPN2Se9j5dd2YynUGPzljDB9DDUVGhYBGQ9Gl-rPBaaVosxqWOJrH2sGhRgj2mYZHJk_UHGGSdXM-jN68q5e9TLOmrrhneB_RpL7Iat1zZM95D758OIezfEo26K9vnoSyJej7bg-318EA5BKYhpGGAft2cGXLL8Q5--GFSBm--zzH4y8fHqFhRhrrdMTrSmIsIjTC90MF7FbnCuaDytO8k3-G-1Hhru38HAs9-Rgawl0XuDGQZBtxDTBY7OqZ70obbbxG5)**.

[**CHIP IN $2
HELP ME HOLD GOVERNMENT ACCOUNTABLE-> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=22087e50958d4df49a534bc3f6b31bca&_e=hY-HT2jBPyYeh2sMoPdd3_4w9aWDOBHJ68WR4U2eCFobDgUBM2I5Z3F80-_FtFxtwd_Fy-FwYT-zKVidp2hbTvPk2ol-lvaH8WRWZtXLsyQiHbIlIg47rtPrHvOW6sAapH39mm63BzEa9jT4mm-AW5LxpBnQqfCCpaLygX7b8_WU_hBBg_SPjaXWCuzPN2Se9j5dd2YynUGPzljDB9DDUVGhYBGQ9Gl-rPBaaVosxqWOJrH2sGhRgj2mYZHJk_UHGGSdXM-jN68q5e9TLOmrrhneB_RpL7Iat1zZM95D758GdXGiJZM8xnv7BWzQrTNtE_jeybgkYMFjk2kCBRcw-89zMnD7MYb__Ht1nuL9Ode8KAKMuCzKziVqphqekmL_f2Yi0PQULGfFuJq543w97sXMQLwulSopcfmGLC2f7GD0c5qHojQvA4YdglE8SLpp)
I’ll never stop standing on the frontlines in defense of our constitutionally enshrined liberties. That said, I need supporters like you ready to do battle along side me - because the Democrats will do whatever they can to boot me out of Washington.

As a personal favor to me, **[would you please make an immediate contribution of $10 or more right now?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=22087e50958d4df49a534bc3f6b31bca&_e=hY-HT2jBPyYeh2sMoPdd3_4w9aWDOBHJ68WR4U2eCFobDgUBM2I5Z3F80-_FtFxtwd_Fy-FwYT-zKVidp2hbTvPk2ol-lvaH8WRWZtXLsyQiHbIlIg47rtPrHvOW6sAapH39mm63BzEa9jT4mm-AW5LxpBnQqfCCpaLygX7b8_WU_hBBg_SPjaXWCuzPN2Se9j5dd2YynUGPzljDB9DDUVGhYBGQ9Gl-rPBaaVosxqWOJrH2sGhRgj2mYZHJk_UHGGSdXM-jN68q5e9TLOmrrhneB_RpL7Iat1zZM95D759t8dP2iVOAtEgjcKxR_Rh0rQl1g1wgmPW9hqMdNFRZVyWvC3uWbfn7h0t-zQCA8dwxL1bA3PPDrCNyVXU8-zuewPK_Vsf3IgLHP-_Dpr6Ybz20ju1Yoy7MtD_AreVzhmCX9wp7jI1vE5YX2nLuWKjV) **

[**IT'S OUR TURN TO FIGHT BACK
JOIN THE FIGHT-> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=22087e50958d4df49a534bc3f6b31bca&_e=hY-HT2jBPyYeh2sMoPdd3_4w9aWDOBHJ68WR4U2eCFobDgUBM2I5Z3F80-_FtFxtwd_Fy-FwYT-zKVidp2hbTvPk2ol-lvaH8WRWZtXLsyQiHbIlIg47rtPrHvOW6sAapH39mm63BzEa9jT4mm-AW5LxpBnQqfCCpaLygX7b8_WU_hBBg_SPjaXWCuzPN2Se9j5dd2YynUGPzljDB9DDUVGhYBGQ9Gl-rPBaaVosxqWOJrH2sGhRgj2mYZHJk_UHGGSdXM-jN68q5e9TLOmrrhneB_RpL7Iat1zZM95D759zXwloHsa0ZPkV3x6gvoR3LQ8ewthw2zZUQ464ftjlCZzhjELu3UDl8THfQLNJKLIp_LO1qWRBUMzTuo11KtJSkCIWeeCKhxFva5PLOxtuBtmc2IEA3Tby7a5peBHbFrbd4xNb7X_6xiHeoYcc0JZg)
Make no mistake, Peter - our way of life is under attack from the Left, and I need my team of top supporters willing to stand by my side to help push back against the assaults on limited government and individual liberty.**I need your help to fight back against those who want to transform our great Republic into a socialist utopia.**

**[If you’re with me, please make an immediate contribution of $10, $50, $100, $25, or even just $2 right now.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=22087e50958d4df49a534bc3f6b31bca&_e=hY-HT2jBPyYeh2sMoPdd3_4w9aWDOBHJ68WR4U2eCFobDgUBM2I5Z3F80-_FtFxtwd_Fy-FwYT-zKVidp2hbTvPk2ol-lvaH8WRWZtXLsyQiHbIlIg47rtPrHvOW6sAapH39mm63BzEa9jT4mm-AW5LxpBnQqfCCpaLygX7b8_WU_hBBg_SPjaXWCuzPN2Se9j5dd2YynUGPzljDB9DDUVGhYBGQ9Gl-rPBaaVosxqWOJrH2sGhRgj2mYZHJk_UHGGSdXM-jN68q5e9TLOmrrhneB_RpL7Iat1zZM95D758mfXRMY5IEh8bjyQiB46IRZSKREnm30J5-ZRSmgxq78uiTlRUng0u2UgPiqHA2SXhYTi6Bw3bcCB7mQGLGcpUKtMWoiVjS63MTGTDbuXy9jJkuxCLNkqaPd-nSUWWKjxe8is_qYslC9yEwB0qEXweQ)**

I'm proud to stand with you as we work to stop the far Left from making our country unrecognizeable.

God Bless,
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=22087e50958d4df49a534bc3f6b31bca&_e=hY-HT2jBPyYeh2sMoPdd3_4w9aWDOBHJ68WR4U2eCFobDgUBM2I5Z3F80-_FtFxtwd_Fy-FwYT-zKVidp2hbTvPk2ol-lvaH8WRWZtXLsyQiHbIlIg47rtPrHvOW6sAapH39mm63BzEa9jT4mm-AW5LxpBnQqfCCpaLygX7b8_WU_hBBg_SPjaXWCuzPN2Se9j5dd2YynUGPzljDB9DDUVGhYBGQ9Gl-rPBaaVosxqWOJrH2sGhRgj2mYZHJk_UHGGSdXM-jN68q5e9TLOmrrhneB_RpL7Iat1zZM95D75_6s3RwnaPEs1yR6BJrFfkrywE4WuU9exeVtREUs8Zxd6HuXZURlQ-6OsDHCAV_QXAIVA8KMvkVXh1UJVcq1qKrdIVFY6YGUbKWUo3Bc-A6FgNET2tlLRR2BPnzvnD1gXlTdI9dPefwoudNHrXYk-BZ)
Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=22087e50958d4df49a534bc3f6b31bca&_e=hY-HT2jBPyYeh2sMoPdd3_4w9aWDOBHJ68WR4U2eCFobDgUBM2I5Z3F80-_FtFxtwd_Fy-FwYT-zKVidp2hbTvPk2ol-lvaH8WRWZtXLsyQiHbIlIg47rtPrHvOW6sAapH39mm63BzEa9jT4mm-AW5LxpBnQqfCCpaLygX7b8_WU_hBBg_SPjaXWCuzPN2Se9j5dd2YynUGPzljDB9DDUVGhYBGQ9Gl-rPBaaVosxqWOJrH2sGhRgj2mYZHJk_UHGGSdXM-jN68q5e9TLOmrrhneB_RpL7Iat1zZM95D75_Lcy8lL73mAjbMPJIFawJV-AxWfCLzXC9rZhvoMu33bs8ts41Dhps2AejsdLEXlRt5EWrJVU_P0rUolI9YN-yss7m9-vfK5SdUOQoZmt6O2hNkjrGaQNZEx5hDWw8S3TKTlKHcVc-z1cMS0a8eYAhl)

body:
He’s indicted! Now what?
| | | | |

| | | | | Peter, **Donald Trump's indictment on seven counts yesterday, including violating the Espionage Act, makes it even clearer what we must do.** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcfae3551-527c-43ca-8572-aacdfe4dfd6b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _First, ignore GOP seditionists attacking our justice system. **Trump stole classified documents. When asked to return them, he lied about having them, then refused to give them back. On tape, he shared the contents of some with someone lacking security clearance. That's treason.**_ _We've reached the point where only a full democratic reset can save us. Luckily that's exactly what we've been doing the past few election cycles. We've shared some of our newest young, diverse & progressive stars, from Maxwell Frost to AOC, Gretchen Whitmer to Eric Swallwell, Stacey Plaskett to Chris Murphy._ **Electing leaders who care about democracy, women's choice, stopping gun massacres, tackling climate change and strengthening working & middle class families has felt like applying disinfectant to a bacteria-caked surface.** _That's why we're asking you to respond to Trump's crimes by supporting Run For Something, an organization begun to elect young, progressive Democrats._ [**_With recent events, including Democratic successes, we have an opportunity to destroy the GOP in 2024, returning sanity to our democracy. Will you join us by giving Run For Something $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to ensure we have great candidates to take advantage of this opportunity?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T33bec55e-eada-4482-a6ff-cf0163eb60f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for standing up and cleaning Republican corruption out of Washington._ Cliff PS - [**Please support Run For Something’s valuable mission, and encourage new, fresh, inspired candidates to jump into races and offices across the country!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5faa5320-8ba9-400d-8ad9-1cca20b20f96/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. Electing leaders who care about democracy, women's choice, stopping gun massacres, tackling climate change and strengthening working & middle class families has felt like applying disinfectant to a bacteria-caked surface. That's why we're asking you to respond to Trump's crimes by supporting Run For Something, an organization begun to elect young, progressive Democrats. Thank you for standing up and cleaning Republican corruption out of Washington. Cliff PS - | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Sign: Demand that this absurdly biased judge be removed from Trump case
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand that this absurdly biased judge be removed from Trump case](https://default.salsalabs.org/T51412982-8781-475f-91ad-067f20f9929a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c3c95a9-2fd0-4c82-9586-e9f71471bcb8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Just hours after news broke that Donald Trump had been indicted on multiple counts for federal crimes, it was revealed that the judge overseeing the case would be none other than Aileen Cannon. This was the judge whose rulings on an earlier Trump issue were so ridiculously biased and untethered to the law, that they were overturned and eviscerated by a higher court. There is no way in hell that she should be overseeing this case. And there is still a chance that she could be replaced. [**Please sign the petition, and demand that she be removed.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0d3c113f-4daf-411f-be35-4963e625c2a5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) How biased is this judge? Let us [count the ways:](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb4035dd5-8710-4a7f-9dcb-0c63dbf782ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _" That would be the same Trump-appointed, Trump-serving Cannon who completely overlooked existing law to appoint a "special master" to help Trump keep documents from being reviewed by the Department of Justice. The same Cannon who supported the most ridiculous claims from Trump's third-rate legal team. The same Cannon who, when the special master made reasonable demands on Trump's team, overruled the judge she had appointed to give Trump gift after gift in rulings so ridiculous even right-wing pundits seemed shocked. It would be the same Cannon whose actions in this case were absolutely shredded in a ruling from the 11th Circuit that tossed out everything she had done, except the two months of stalling she achieved for Trump." (source: Daily Kos)_ Again, there is no way in hell that she should be overseeing this case. [**Please sign the petition, and demand that she be removed.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T157a0b13-a91a-4a38-98cc-ee6d206e68d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---

All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7v8m1q9shodeiinjkhm2b9728a69ls5iso621eg_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpj68o72chh2bs)

* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? name: VoteVets
subject: Trump Indicted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
What we know, what i means, and what comes next.
#
**Here's what we know, Derek.**
Trump has been indicted. A Grand Jury decided that there was probable cause that he committed multiple crimes.
He is reportedly up for seven counts — including willful retention of national security documents and obstruction of justice.
**Here's what that means:**
Trump potentially endangered our national security, our women and men in uniform, and has already personally caused unprecedented damage to our Constitution. This is the first time in history that a former president has faced Federal charges.
**Here's what comes next:**
Trump will have to surrender himself to federal authorities in Miami next Tuesday. He will have to face the consequences of his actions. _And his campaign will raise MILLIONS of dollars._
One of the scariest things about this is that after all he’s done, his campaign is going to continue. His millions of supporters will continue to back him. And if he wins the primary, he will be on the ballot in November of 2024.
We have to be ready for any outcome here. VoteVets ran some of the hardest hitting ads of the cycle in 2020, deployed a crucial peer-to-peer texting program, and played a critical role in defeating Trump. If necessary, we will beat him again. For our rule of law, and the Constitution we swore to uphold — we have to keep up the fight.

Here’s why air quality plunged this week.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64568198/410509130/-1629408698?refcode=EM_PET_230609Wildfires_N_SB4C_90DO_5_NG_TESTB_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjFkMzFjZi1jYjA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SCYbH1PF7-FSEMgP2QnRqZisl2EjqehivaA0pqxVGqw=) Peter,

The toxic air that masked NE Ohio and most of the US Eastern Coast this week is a direct result of climate change.

Air quality levels plunged over the week from raging wildfires in Canada rage on. Air pollution from **wildfire smoke has become a significant health risk,** and it's growing worse.

We're bound to see increased respiratory diseases among vulnerable groups like older people, pregnant people, and our children.

While Democrats in Congress have taken major steps forward by passing our largest investment to combat climate change ever, there's still more to do. **The GOP is working to undermine the EPA as they cozy up to dark oil money, and we need your help to replace them.**

clean_body: Here’s why air quality plunged this week. = Peter, The toxic air that masked NE Ohio and most of the US Eastern Coast this week is a direct result of climate change. Air quality levels plunged over the week from raging wildfires in Canada rage on. Air pollution from wildfire smoke has become a significant health risk, and it's growing worse. We're bound to see increased respiratory diseases among vulnerable groups like older people, pregnant people, and our children. While Democrats in Congress have taken major steps forward by passing our largest investment to combat climate change ever, there's still more to do. The GOP is working to undermine the EPA as they cozy up to dark oil money, and we need your help to replace them. In this together, Shontel Brown for Congress | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. Will you join her and be the change we need? = Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress PO Box 221232 Beachwood, OH 44122 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Understand different ways of living
body:
I'm talking about studying American history!

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9e13bbf9e43a4a7ba6872b98db9a8d54&_e=MwqFe6nTDvNyuVbf8xABNJ9TOKe5fW9d3gw7mDo8pS6nmOIvAH_fX8Tl0InZpubnesQKOSTI2LNdUW7FazrNxqXKt9A_Dj1Y83iJ38HbpTuwFDF1WD1MkVYf7ZDb3qkWUZze4fv1acl4zPDxy6Jvuw99THr-2u6V9M_aB8y-tTCPihClpA3hz0ieqVi9C3YJ8PIQnUSS1CudO0zzsyTYCFjnJZxggdXJJzeBPLW_vXxAi0lHkx3ztlIz1oYBU9H91r1c_QSgasqoTODQ-_PNyiCXg0Q974TOMT3DZeSogUuayZusKvfG95Q4BIylVeO1tK4_4u9PDZ_7Lo6BBPbzyQsZ97KDsggZxek8CxRG0Md-kFlq9bxm0CamO0bvNYguzikwxeaNpzeye7c9rrWT5LSJI8slYuhM_wrMzEQRsZk%3D) Dear Fellow American, Thanks for opening my email. I hope you're having a great day so far. I'm reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. I'm talking about studying American history! As Hillsdale College professor Wilfred McClay explains in our online course **["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9e13bbf9e43a4a7ba6872b98db9a8d54&_e=MwqFe6nTDvNyuVbf8xABNJ9TOKe5fW9d3gw7mDo8pS6nmOIvAH_fX8Tl0InZpubnesQKOSTI2LNdUW7FazrNxqXKt9A_Dj1Y83iJ38HbpTuwFDF1WD1MkVYf7ZDb3qkWUZze4fv1acl4zPDxy6Jvuw99THr-2u6V9M_aB8y-tTCPihClpA3hz0ieqVi9C3YJ8PIQnUSS1CudO0zzsyTYCFjnJZxggdXJJzeBPLW_vXxAi0lHkx3ztlIz1oYBU9H91r1c_QSgasqoTODQ-_PNyvDOKyIEFKPFSjPRtT1t-3Wb5zjNc10xeKgiVT5zkL8zpYYoGMilrYdjMWh87czBx7gnHiB2a0mpfaQUVWv9aGw8sgGi0QmM-F-VbP1XxOznVUTGqI18iTwp-yldfEftSeABfbEvmMh7e10bIyGTjeg%3D)** studying history can broaden your perspective and help you understand different ways of living. Compare that to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," now a multi-part series streaming online. The "1619 Project" locates the founding of America in 1619, the year the first slave arrived on our shores, rather than in 1776, when the **Declaration of Independence declared that all men are created equal with unalienable God-given rights**. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom but slavery--and the project's main goal is to broadcast this false teaching into every home, including yours. We must counter this false and dishonest historical narrative with the truth. **That 's why we've turned our online course, ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9e13bbf9e43a4a7ba6872b98db9a8d54&_e=MwqFe6nTDvNyuVbf8xABNJ9TOKe5fW9d3gw7mDo8pS6nmOIvAH_fX8Tl0InZpubnesQKOSTI2LNdUW7FazrNxqXKt9A_Dj1Y83iJ38HbpTuwFDF1WD1MkVYf7ZDb3qkWUZze4fv1acl4zPDxy6Jvuw99THr-2u6V9M_aB8y-tTCPihClpA3hz0ieqVi9C3YJ8PIQnUSS1CudO0zzsyTYCFjnJZxggdXJJzeBPLW_vXxAi0lHkx3ztlIz1oYBU9H91r1c_QSgasqoTODQ-_PNyhUWDeWh6_Tp-EfMNiabqSkREcXp-DWND6MNZ4abOL4bUepg-m3CRdIUzN0wHp-bxB8XK1gn2B-eyoG70HVrC3GkC2ktTiIoxrabiHJozX5Kw4W2_4UE7LEU231llXIBqAIRKL3XAMBG5NCFKNYwBBM%3D) into a DVD set, and I'd like you to have a copy.** **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** presents a full, unbiased account of America's past. We produced this course to restore the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among our young people--essential to restoring free government. You'll be excited to learn that **" The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," which tells people, especially children, that America is essentially an unjust nation--the opposite of our nation's unifying principles. clean_body: I'm talking about studying American history! This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Thanks for opening my email. I hope you're having a great day so far. I'm reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. I'm talking about studying American history! As Hillsdale College professor Wilfred McClay explains in our online course studying history can broaden your perspective and help you understand different ways of living. Compare that to The New York Times ' "1619 Project," now a multi-part series streaming online. The "1619 Project" locates the founding of America in 1619, the year the first slave arrived on our shores, rather than in 1776, when the Declaration of Independence declared that all men are created equal with unalienable God-given rights. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom but slavery--and the project's main goal is to broadcast this false teaching into every home, including yours. We must counter this false and dishonest historical narrative with the truth. That 's why we've turned our online course, into a DVD set, and I'd like you to have a copy. " The Great American Story: A Land of Hope" presents a full, unbiased account of America's past. We produced this course to restore the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among our young people--essential to restoring free government. You'll be excited to learn that " The Great American Story: A Land of Hope" is a powerful counterweight to The New York Times ' "1619 Project," which tells people, especially children, that America is essentially an unjust nation--the opposite of our nation's unifying principles. Today, you can claim a DVD copy of for your home library or give it as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and for supporting its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Despite what The New York Times ' "1619 Project" says, our nation's history is unifying. That's why we've produced a full, unbiased account of America's past with " The Great American Story: A Land of Hope," now available on DVD. You can receive your copy with your generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more using this secure link: Act today because quantities are limited! | | | _**[Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on Trump 's new federal indictment:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62800869:JDRHbCING:m:1:3299561967:4A3374718F4AB209C49C0FF3195611D7:r "Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on
Trump’s new federal indictment:")**_

**" President Trump is 76 years old. If the Department of Justice gets its way, he will die in federal prison... They don't want to just win elections, they want to take control of this country, they want one-party rule. And they have used the Department of Justice and the FBI to get what they want."**

Mark Levin is spot on.

The Deep State, Radical Democrats, and Liberal prosecutors joined forces to take down President Trump ONCE AND FOR ALL. That's why they're indicting him for:

_Not one... not two... not three... not four... not five... not six ... but SEVEN federal charges!_

They're throwing the book at President Trump to make an example out of him: this is what happens if you want to stand up to the Radical Left.

**Step One:** Put President Trump away for good. **Step Two:** Send a message to every Conservative that they could be next. **Step Three:** intimidate them into silence. **Step Four:** TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL.

That's one path forward. Luckily, we have another option...

We're calling on each and every brave Conservative to join us in standing up to the Radical Left right here and right now.

_**[GO ON RECORD: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62800869:JDRHbCING:m:1:3299561967:4A3374718F4AB209C49C0FF3195611D7:r "GO ON
RECORD: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**_

Look:

It won't be easy going toe-to-toe with the Deep State and the Radical Democrats. It'll take numbers.

We'll need an OVERWHELMING number of brave Conservatives - at least 1,000,000 strong - to speak up and prove that these Liberals don't represent the will of the American People.

**But it will be impossible to make the case without you. **

So if there was ever a moment to act with some haste - THAT MOMENT IS RIGHT NOW.

_**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62800870:JDRHbCING:m:1:3299561967:4A3374718F4AB209C49C0FF3195611D7:r "BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**_

We'll be on the lookout for your name.

Thanks for having the courage to act in these trying times,

- House GOP

That's why they're indicting him for: Not one... not two... not three... not four... not five... not six ... but SEVEN federal charges! They're throwing the book at President Trump to make an example out of him: this is what happens if you want to stand up to the Radical Left. Step One: Put President Trump away for good. Step Two: Send a message to every Conservative that they could be next. Step Three: intimidate them into silence. Step Four: TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL. That's one path forward. Luckily, we have another option... We're calling on each and every brave Conservative to join us in standing up to the Radical Left right here and right now. "GO ON RECORD: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>" Look: It won't be easy going toe-to-toe with the Deep State and the Radical Democrats. It'll take numbers. We'll need an OVERWHELMING number of brave Conservatives - at least 1,000,000 strong - to speak up and prove that these Liberals don't represent the will of the American People. But it will be impossible to make the case without you. So if there was ever a moment to act with some haste - THAT MOMENT IS RIGHT NOW. "BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>" We'll be on the lookout for your name. name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: Shaun Thompson to Listeners: "Filthy Scum, Cockroaches"
body:
Naples-based Chicago Radio Host Shaun Thompson attacks AM 560 Listeners, brands them as "filthy scum, cockroaches," for calling out his weekend rant.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/2760c2c9271a/shaun-thompson-to-listeners-filthy-scum-cockroaches?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fd99ff1040-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_09_01_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fd99ff1040-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fd99ff1040-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_09_01_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fd99ff1040-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Naples-based Chicago Radio Host Shaun Thompson Attacks AM 560 Listeners, Brands Them as "Filthy Scum, Cockroaches," for Calling out his Vile Weekend Rant (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/06/naples-based-chicago-radio-host-shaun-thompson-attacks-am-560-listeners-brands-them-as-filthy-scum-cockroaches-for-calling-out-his-vile-weekend-rant.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fd99ff1040-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_09_01_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fd99ff1040-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
AM 560 radio host Shaun Thompson takes his show on the road, hosting a live show in front of an empty room. Thompson was prepared for 100 people, but less than 20 showed up. (Facebook)

Chicago AM 560 radio host and Florida-based (https://www.homes.com/real-estate-agents/shaun-thompson/l1zkxzg/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fd99ff1040-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_09_01_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fd99ff1040-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) real estate agent Shaun Thompson has a unique setup – hosting his Chicago-based show from Naples, Florida, where he goes on rants talking about the crime plaguing the city; political corruption; and high taxes from 1,285 miles away – far away from the action and five states south from the station’s base of listeners.

In November of 2021, station management flew down to Naples to build a new studio for Chicago Morning Answer host Dan Proft – a full time Florida resident and registered voter, and Thompson – allowing them to speak to their Chicago-based listeners from the comfort of their southwest Florida studio.

But over the weekend, Thompson went on a vile rant (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/06/am-560-radio-host-mark-vargas-resigns-in-disgust-after-weekday-host-shaun-thompsons-vile-rant-calling-black-and-right-co-host-a-moron-with-the-taffy-apple-head-in-racist-h.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fd99ff1040-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_09_01_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fd99ff1040-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , angrily referring to a Black and Right co host – an African American, as a “taffy apple head (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zHh6oFi9JeE&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fd99ff1040-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_09_01_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fd99ff1040-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .”

Taffy apple head?

Thompson then said,
“80 percent of you people (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WomvsWO-6YI&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fd99ff1040-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_09_01_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fd99ff1040-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) are morons; 80 percent of you idiots who pretend to be Republican.”

You people?

“Do me a favor, go back to the Democrats (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Cd0V5yjN9iA&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fd99ff1040-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_09_01_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fd99ff1040-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) where you belong...go back to the Democrats moron.”

Go back?

Then Thompson threatened physical violence, angrily saying, “You’ve got my number, you call me like a man. You’re going to say it on the radio like you’re a tough guy? I’ll shut your mouth in five seconds. Understand me?”

I’ll shut your mouth in five seconds? Understand me?

https://youtu.be/evHvMVJTgz0?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fd99ff1040-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_09_01_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fd99ff1040-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

AM 560 host Shaun Thompson tells Black and Right co host “I’ll shut your mouth in five seconds. Understand me?"

On Wednesday – four days after his vile rant, Thompson went on his AM 560 Facebook page to say, “We said things to each other that we would normally reserve for our conversations at the cigar shop, but they didn’t belong on the radio. It wasn’t a good look for us.”

Whether it’s at a cigar shop or live on-air, these vile, hateful conversations threatening violence should never occur – whether in private or in public settings.

No one should be talking to someone like that – whether a friend, or not – in public or in private. It’s indefensible.

The co host joined Thompson on the air Wednesday afternoon, reiterating that Thompson is not a racist.

On Thursday morning, Thompson went on his personal Twitter page, calling out former AM 560 radio host and Illinois Review editor-in-chief Mark Vargas, an American of Mexican descent, and referencing the popular Mexican folk song, La Cucaracha, tweeting, “The Cockroaches, La Cucaracha ~~ La Cucaracha ~~~ yada yada yada yaa.”

“Cucaracha” is Spanish for “cockroach.”

Late Wednesday, Thompson made a reference to those calling out his vile remarks – many of them AM 560 listeners – referring to them on Twitter as “cockroaches” and “filthy scum.”

Thompson even attacked former Republican attorney general candidate and conservative grassroots leader Tom DeVore – and a frequent guest on AM 560 The Answer, for calling out his vile rant on Saturday, posting from his official AM 560 Facebook page, “It must be hard to accept that you aren’t the center of attention.”

Thompson has a history of making vile and despicable remarks on social media, where he often posts expletive laden tweets and regularly calls people “scumbag,” “scum,” “whore,” “low life,” “stupid,” “moron” and “dumb.”

Illinois Review has chosen not to post Thompson’s
tweets (https://twitter.com/shaunfromep?s=21&t=DeJKPhK5x5ptMnVQaM2A7w&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fd99ff1040-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_09_01_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fd99ff1040-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) because they are vile, despicable, inappropriate and not suitable for publication.

Thompson’s rhetoric on-air and his social media posts are also a direct contradiction of the values of
Salem Media Group (https://salemmedia.com/about-us/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fd99ff1040-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_09_01_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fd99ff1040-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , which owns AM 560 The Answer.

Branded as a family-friendly and Christian media group, Thompson is representative of everything that Salem stands against.

“Salem Media Group is America’s leading radio broadcaster, Internet content provider, and magazine and book publisher targeting audiences interested in Christian and family-themed content and conservative values.”

Salem Publishing is also one of the leading publishers in the country of Christian and conservative-themed books and magazines.

And since Thompson’s vile rant on Saturday, sources confirm to Illinois Review that several organizations will be severing their relationship with the station – disappointed that a Christian conservative station would give an individual like Thompson a platform to spew such hateful and offensive rhetoric on a daily basis.
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fd99ff1040-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_09_01_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fd99ff1040-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

============================================================
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fd99ff1040-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_09_01_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fd99ff1040-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fd99ff1040-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_09_01_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fd99ff1040-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fd99ff1040-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_09_01_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fd99ff1040-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Instagram (http://instagram.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fd99ff1040-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_09_01_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fd99ff1040-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Email (mailto:articles@illinoisreview.com)

| | **We Want The Receipts 🧾 **
---
---
| | The cover-up of the Biden family corruption story continues to trickle down, infiltrating other agencies that are supposed to be in the business of accountability. FBI Director Christopher Wray was just about to be held [in contempt of Congress](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1186f4be26e546619c68207efeefe236&_e=ppiWhjTBB6c7qgIz2MafUMeYouW-kcnybki9Ay6aYVfGGtwCwBYy9X9aFt85faTYnCtfl0MmlXOvjPfiWI3uOzrA1PuQ4g7RK4S-PN6lyhSLiy7uvUEMaCf_YsEITQpOKISfOdE9BLTMZdpwTxMk_WkKngQ5f14UhjWMdkgDsFBAv7ssgwU5Ez0wNzdUPplOGavmyQ5InbS0eiVH_N1YcdgTJYw6yyk5wBOH4slILNYDYc2gOo_DGGTY3R-mS3QtQz8BMWed4C9IPu0PufZd4fGAVzWg3zklYCLV-SkGIUGrpqcHed0dkW1BV45-QFlt3B5q_WoZoGjOI0ls-ada0g%3D%3D) for refusing to produce the documents we need to dig deeper into this issue. Once Director Wray confirmed that [these records exist](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1186f4be26e546619c68207efeefe236&_e=ppiWhjTBB6c7qgIz2MafUMeYouW-kcnybki9Ay6aYVcsV_RtLNe6FFONj28GeIaNocdoW29J0MtdDZbRmqOhqWTStyvfDJ31qRhfvtRuranceYQjPDvIw8AR1uDsLmEJRRWYV-3wkbmjgZRoWjup2yEziDeHfP9a_RJWlknYwJURCbDcqP3B-bWzl1m6aFtILRzGqZQuxaIerFs0Q1g3bC7qED6RhL3p5dF7zOBznEFDbcRk4a_yGVto3B4maBrQ2dJqpXIGs-ahTUkjMjz9Mt32NYh0H1JHpysE9YsZav_IkcqjLOLos0H110cRgNCk8uOsMtfjEG6TfgdHf2pOpL3BztCl7UyjMSmucF2UtuQ%3D), the FBI went into cover-up mode, leaking false narratives to the media and trying to shut the whole thing down—but the case is far from closed. The receipts exist and we’re going to get our hands on them. The FBI created this record based on [details from an informant](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1186f4be26e546619c68207efeefe236&_e=ppiWhjTBB6c7qgIz2MafUOmJ7ogW9ghmtUHxAVUm_RosXO6WJKpuPrbIdMn9ka1sW_gFns2d01QRaSs6in10a8Rw3o20jOfKZgssLjvCnETLoqi7AzzqjixRZwIQljw8FnNfqvl3-NqPAEIFcWAm7D6K4R8joWcMX4GBlkiWGMkmDzq8PiHVhS1pXlB9gGB9y3h5T2UpnyQByhoxZrLN0r51JWa-pO4ETTk9chuXqkUnwGaThWphU2tiU9iAMU1IF2CcBpF_WaTkK7Aj5AC7nPdOClI3cLaEHKpQS4fCE_E%3D) who has worked with the FBI for more than a decade and is paid six figures. This individual had discussions with the foreign national who claimed to have bribed Biden when he was VP. It’s also worth mentioning that the FBI wants more than $3 billion for a [new headquarters building](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1186f4be26e546619c68207efeefe236&_e=ppiWhjTBB6c7qgIz2MafUOu41wv_PGh9eekeQ97U3lxcmsdKYu2FHbblD16-QWHRgsHd8FRN6aA5qYcl9t8pS-OQ7aJLTD3nqRyXsagvl3X5b4M0l6Ff-SmYdKTucpSCpfM6cBPCUi1-2rIUDfxo5AX_W98HWFC5QtjDf9cZDLoTP7cyz1T3Izqp-9J3hHYTR9oMgP9kiNPdkYLaPoGtuw-pfA9e9utkpCSAoqRavia9nKUPvlin-wu0X8TQoX-6qIHsNSVLji4rX3aN5WfbGn53KLzxE9Ia4Imjwp8upJ4%3D) that would be larger than the Pentagon. But guess what? Congress holds the power of the purse. If I have anything to say about it, we won’t be cutting them a check. There’s no reward for putting justice on the back burner. We will get to the truth, no matter how hard the FBI tries to run out the clock. We could have another president by the time we get answers, but dadgummit, we’ll get them. That’s what the American people deserve.
---
| | |
---
| | **D-Day Remembered 🇺🇸**
---
| |
---
This week marks 79 years since the D-Day invasion occurred. It was a significant military success, but it came at a high cost. Thousands of soldiers were killed or seriously injured. My Uncle Roy volunteered to join the fight during World War II, but was too old to go. After being sent home, he was eventually called up later to serve. He fought in the hedgerows of Normandy, where he was killed by Nazis shortly after D-Day. I could not be more proud to display the 48 star flag that draped his casket in our Knoxville office. It’s an important reminder of a generation that gave it all for the promise of freedom and democracy. I am forever grateful for the service and sacrifice of our men and women in the military.

name: WAS THE ELECTION STOLEN?
subject: Do you have the guts to answer this question?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BILLPAC
body:
Or will you let Democrats get away with the biggest election corruption scheme in history?

| |
---
| | | It seems like every day we see more and more news stories showing proof of election fraud in Democrat-run cities across the country. Just this year we've seen:

**1.** Testimonies in AZ election case show proof of **BALLOT TAMPERING**
**2.** Hundreds of **NON-CITIZENS** were found on voter rolls in 2022
**3.** A Pennsylvania judge declared a 2020 election **RECOUNT**

**And now, a Democrat Mayor was just ARRESTED and charged for voter fraud in 2022!**

Patriot, we know this much is true: Democrats took EXTREME measures to tamper with and destroy laws that protected our elections from fraud leading up to the last election.

And now, we have PROOF that their efforts led to the LEAST SECURE election in history.

_**So we just have one question for you:**_

---
| _**DO YOU THINK DEMOCRATS STOLE THE ELECTION?**_ | | [YES](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62800882:JtjuuCINy:m:1:3299561967:737ED892A30F043AE83C4B3300548565:r)
---
| [NO](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62800882:JtjuuCINy:m:1:3299561967:737ED892A30F043AE83C4B3300548565:r)
---

_Not many people will have the guts to stand up for election integrity and give us their honest feedback on this crucial question._

But we're hoping you will.

If not, Democrats get away with the biggest election corruption scheme in history?

_**So, will help us out by giving us your honest opinion?**_

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Answering this call to service
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
Our country is facing crises that only bold action in Congress can resolve

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64573819/410527545/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230609CallToService_DBW_5_TESTA_logo&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTliNTI4ODctZDIwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8a4pNAasJZmpUpV61C99hMGLGsaG3emLWmcQ_JGLCqw=)
Peter,

My parents taught me the importance of putting service above self. Their example led me to join the Air Force to serve my country, and later to pursue medicine to serve my community. Once again, I’m answering the call to serve by running for Congress. In Washington, I will work to create life-saving change by promoting gun safety, and healthcare affordability and accessibility. My life has been about public service, not politics, Peter. I decided to run for Congress after realizing that I could have a greater impact on my community through repairing systemic issues – not in the OR, but through policy. As a political appointee in Dallas, and as a policy advisor in Washington, D.C., I learned firsthand that real change is possible when we have leaders bold enough to take courageous action – and as a Veteran, trauma surgeon, and gun safety advocate, that’s exactly what I’ll do in Congress.

With the many intersecting crises occurring in our country, I’m answering the call to serve. I will bring my frontline experience to Congress to address the source of preventable suffering and violence harming our communities, and to uplift all who seek a better life. [I hope I can count on you to stand with me in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64573832/410527603/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230609CallToService_DBW_5_TESTA_l2&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTliNTI4ODctZDIwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8a4pNAasJZmpUpV61C99hMGLGsaG3emLWmcQ_JGLCqw=)

Onward,

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64573845/410527610/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230609CallToService_DBW_5_TESTA_l1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTliNTI4ODctZDIwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8a4pNAasJZmpUpV61C99hMGLGsaG3emLWmcQ_JGLCqw=)

Brian
Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Academy graduate, a Harvard-trained surgeon, a former congressional health policy advisor, and a nationally recognized leader at the intersection of public policy and structural racism, gun violence, and health equity. Dr. Williams is ready to bring his years of experience to Congress to fix our broken systems and save lives.

name: Juan at United We Dream Action
subject: Before DACA’s 11th anniversary
body:
DACA recipients could be left without work permits or protections from deportation if we don’t act now. | | | Peter, as we approach the 11th anniversary of DACA next Thursday, I’m tired of the instability that comes with temporary protections. DACA recipients like myself find ourselves in a constant state of uncertainty. Our work permits and protections from deportation could be taken away at a moment’s notice by a rogue court or anti-immigrant politician. While Congress and President Biden wait to act, millions of immigrant youth like myself watch in disbelief, knowing that our lives depend on them passing legislation. There’s an urgent need for permanent solutions, Peter: **Judge Hanen could rule any day on a case that threatens the future of DACA.** Attacks against immigrant youth and all undocumented people are nothing new — _my own home state was one of the nine Republican-led states that moved to shut down DACA earlier this year._ Along with millions of ineligible undocumented people, hundreds of thousands of DACA recipients could be left without work permits or protections from deportation if we don’t act now. DACA was won through relentless organizing from undocumented youth and allies across the country demanding basic protections — and it’s going to require even more organizing to demand more. **Before DACA’s 11th anniversary, we need to pick up the fight. Will you donate $11 or any amount today to help UWDA secure permanent protections for immigrant youth and all undocumented people before it’s too late?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $11](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQnDd_Nss4mB9Lx5PfYm8aGC1yRbe857GHCAzUkclVCSoqPOrXg_Cjy2U14zWnU0Lr2uPJTf7qJKDXYpR2ealq87nAonytejRJSYdBW_PJHZ7kdJEAVjT3yi8xSKcOwLp9uH2IwNuWWDiUFyEz-aWCh0UZalKUvXnHPOQXjDXNHKSYD6Pfj241TVRMhYqIB2lvF98OD2ZyKZQrqS-WvRinEKq0eRwKYrfoZ0cHNg-CnOseS_W80PLyA0eBgAQ3_4hvgPTzqHtGceuQj7h8KW9hlXYCkP1SessNMEaHOPYkKfYsqnY6V3mHeKJG2VPjHm3cAGQJaUklW_nVt16l9rmUdVrxR4AMQ8JF3EznHJc3HdpjOhWargcHTDDC0OQtsszOdNjSzql12qk5DdYvTJotVTWgF5EjpKv0GyFfXGSaBh0mDi-7toImHGTqGvnWfrl8CXbDaW4A72ns2w0G7d8V/3ww/SEHHDQXYT5ShwRU_VVGyPQ/h0/UUJqHuJoOqgGiifbOqM3_WbhzmQv-SFt3xekJDVcPo8)

DACA’s anniversary on June 15th is both a celebration of what we’ve achieved, and a reminder that our goals for permanent protections remain unfulfilled. We deserve a future where everyone can not just survive, but thrive.
Thank you for being a part of our movement.
Juan, United We Dream Action

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | DACA’s anniversary on June 15th is both a celebration of what we’ve achieved, and a reminder that our goals for permanent protections remain unfulfilled. We deserve a future where everyone can not just survive, but thrive. Thank you for being a part of our movement. Juan, United We Dream Action

name: Mary Trump
subject: Will you help me defend democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

Friend,
Let me make something abundantly clear...
What the radical Left and the Deep State are doing – this backwards INDICTMENT – is not about truth or justice. _It’s about**FEAR.**_
**The fear that if you stand in the way of their Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for your beliefs.**
**The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their public enemy #1.**
Because the America we once knew and loved is now gone.
It has been transformed into a Third World tin-pot dictatorship where the Democrats have gained complete control through the weaponization of our justice system.
_But even during these darkest times, my resolve to save America does not waiver._
I will never give up, _**and I will never end this campaign.**_
Because YOU – the countless patriots who refuse to even flinch in the face of tyranny – are my hope, my courage, and my strength to **NEVER SURRENDER** our country to the radical Left.
And that UNBREAKABLE resolve is something these sick and twisted radicals will never understand.
Which is why despite all their vicious attacks, their lies, and their witch hunts, I only grow that much more confident that we WILL win back the White House and SAVE our country in 2024!

Fellow American,

We can't have two tiers of justice: one for Trump on government document retention, another for Biden. One for Assange, another for Manning. One for BLM/Antifa, another for peaceful protesters on Jan 6.

I never thought we'd see the day when the U.S. President deputizes the DOJ to arrest his lead rival in the middle of an election. Obama shamefully tried to deputize the FBI to infiltrate Trump's 2016 campaign, but they're leaving nothing to chance this time around: the federal police state is outright arresting Trump.

This is an affront to every citizen: we cannot devolve into a banana republic where the party in power uses police force to arrest its political opponents. It's hypocritical for the DOJ to selectively prosecute Trump but not Biden.

There are also serious legal questions about the President's power to declassify documents and the potential illegality of the over-classification of federal documents in the first place. That's for the courts to decide, but *we the people* decide who governs this nation.

It would be much easier for me to win this election if Trump weren't in the race, but I stand for principles over politics. I commit to pardon Trump promptly on January 20, 2025 and to restore the rule of law in our country.

Thanks,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: FW: Speak out for Palestinian human rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we wanted
to make sure you saw this:

We're calling on the Congressional Progressive Caucus (CPC) to co-sponsor
a bill that will ensure that no U.S. military funding is used to:

* Imprison Palestinian children in the Israeli military detention and
court system.
* Demolish Palestinian homes.
* Further expand settlements and annex Palestinian land.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134914?t=1001&akid=29344%2E1203867%2EqVYN7I ]Let’s show the CPC just how much support this bill has — will you add
your signature to our joint action today?

-----Forwarded Message-----
Date: 6/8/2023
From: JusticeDemocrats.com
Subject: Speak out for Palestinian human rights

Peter, it's time
for Congress to take action to protect Palestinian human rights.

Today, Justice Democrats, Working Families Party, and Jewish Voice for
Peace Action are calling on Congressional Progressive Caucus (CPC) members
to sponsor Rep. Betty McCollum's bill, the Defending the Human Rights of
Palestinian Children and Families Living Under Israeli Military Occupation
Act.

This bill would ensure that no U.S. military funding is used to imprison
Palestinian children in the Israeli military detention and court system,
demolish Palestinian homes, or to further expand settlements and annex
Palestinian land.

The far-right Israeli government is currently planning for massive
settlement expansion, which will displace countless Palestinians from
their homes, so we must take action now. We need widespread support to
show members of Congress that we're expecting them to do the right thing.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134914?t=1002&akid=29344%2E1203867%2EqVYN7I ]Peter, will
you add your name today and call on CPC members to co-sponsor legislation
to hold the Israeli government accountable for violence and protect
Palestinian human rights?

Add your name »

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134914?t=1003&akid=29344%2E1203867%2EqVYN7I ]Progressives in Congress should be fighting for every child to feel safe,
every family to feel secure in their home, and every community to feel rooted in
its land.

When we collectively raise our voices against injustice, we are powerful.

Thank you for taking action today,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you're struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1004&akid=29344%2E1203867%2EqVYN7I ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1005&akid=29344%2E1203867%2EqVYN7I ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230609-29344-footer&t=1006&refcode2=29344_1203867_qVYN7I&akid=29344%2E1203867%2EqVYN7I

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=29344%2E1203867%2EqVYN7I

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Happy Pride! 🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1965?t=1007&amount=25&akid=129%2E52803%2EDm9LTo ][IMG]

There’s no better way to kick off summer than with a beautiful, colorful
celebration of Pride on the Chesapeake Bay!

Throughout my life, I’ve had the privilege of witnessing decades of truly
remarkable progress made by LGBTQ activists. The Maryland of today is a
more accepting, more equal, more compassionate place than the Maryland
where I was born, and that’s something worth celebrating.

We can’t ignore the fact that things aren’t all sunshine and rainbows,
though. LGBTQ Americans face a real threat from political extremists who
want nothing more than to drag us backwards.

So I want to make you a promise: In the Senate, I’ll faithfully defend the
rights of all people to love who they love and to be who they are. I’ll be
a reliable ally in the fight against bigotry, and a reliable vote in favor
of freedom and equality for all.

In love and solidarity,

Angela Alsobrooks

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=1001&akid=129%2E52803%2EDm9LTo ][IMG]

We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

Friend,
---
The radical bureaucrats in Washington DC are at it again – did you know they are now allowing **non-citizens** to vote in elections?

**And to make matters worse, Chinese and Russian embassy staff can also now vote in elections held in Washington.**
---
We should **NOT** be allowing foreign diplomats to vote in elections **ANYWHERE** in the United States – _never mind in our nation’s capital..._
---
So, as you may have seen in the news, I’m taking action alongside my colleagues in Congress like James Comer to _hold DC liberals accountable and protect election integrity_.

body:
Getting out the vote at Pride events to fight for LGBTQIA+ rights.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64577371/410541099/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230609Pride_N_TEAM_90do_6_NG_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM5OTEyOWI1LWQ5MDYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lszzWbrFgJDltBSOZ7uC0LwJar2D2jUzffqetjmQ_vA=)
| Fellow activist – Pride Month is officially underway, and we are more than excited to celebrate with our LGBTQIA+ communities in the face of one of the most hateful years in recent history.

We stand together in solidarity with members of the LGBTQIA+ community and continue to be committed allies in this fight for equal rights.

While we celebrate, team NPP will be attending countless Pride events across the Commonwealth to engage and mobilize our centered communities in the democratic process.

**[We cannot engage voters without your help, fellow activist. Can you pitch in $10 today to help us register voters at community events throughout June?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64577372/410541102/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230609Pride_N_TEAM_90do_6_NG_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM5OTEyOWI1LWQ5MDYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lszzWbrFgJDltBSOZ7uC0LwJar2D2jUzffqetjmQ_vA=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64577373/410541103/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230609Pride_N_TEAM_90do_6_NG_A_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM5OTEyOWI1LWQ5MDYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lszzWbrFgJDltBSOZ7uC0LwJar2D2jUzffqetjmQ_vA=) Just last month, our hard-fought PA House majority passed the Fairness Act to prohibit discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation, gender identity, or expression. This was a historic step forward for PA’s LGBTQIA+ community, but our work is far from over.

**The Republican-controlled State Senate has yet to even move the bill out of committee, where it will likely remain until we win that majority as well.**

This November, it is up to us to elect municipal and local officials, along with a Supreme Court Justice, who will proudly represent our LGBTQIA+ community.

**[The progress we make on expanding the electorate this year will also give us a head start on next year’s many crucial elections. The excitement from launch day and the kickoff of my campaign has proven to me that America is ready for an energetic executive, and my team is dedicated to proving that we're willing to go the distance. I was able to travel across our nation on our Great American Comeback tour because of the grassroots support I've received from American patriots who believe in a better tomorrow.

I want to see your name go up on the walls of our home base, Fellow Conservative. We are embarking on a mission to restore freedom, sovereignty, and sanity to our country, and I want you fighting alongside me. I'd like to see your name go down in history with mine, Fellow Conservative.
