| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
It’s been a thrill to get on the trail and meet so many hard-working Pennsylvanians.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64577799/410542717/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGJhNjk3ZS1kYTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=juT-x0z59V2bo48lWkvNW_1J-pDHbr5_hSHOrFSbUa0=&emci=dbfd5eef-a804-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0dba697e-da06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249) Team,

Just one week ago, I announced my candidacy for Attorney General of Pennsylvania, and the outpouring of support and excitement has been truly overwhelming. As I've traveled across our beautiful state, meeting with Pennsylvanians and sharing my vision for a safer, stronger future, I'm humbled and inspired by your faith in me. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64577800/410542718/-414306994?refcode=email_060923_oneweek&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGJhNjk3ZS1kYTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=juT-x0z59V2bo48lWkvNW_1J-pDHbr5_hSHOrFSbUa0=) I've had some great conversations, and it's clear that our mission resonates with Pennsylvanians: **to protect our communities, defend our freedoms, and ensure that our rights and taxpayer dollars are safeguarded.**

However, this is just the beginning. Our mission is large, and the road ahead is long. While we've made a great start, we need to keep the momentum going. That's why I'm reaching out to you today.

[**The strength of our campaign relies on the generosity of supporters like you. Would you be able to contribute today to help us maintain our momentum? name: News Alert via Courier Newsroom
subject: The charges against Trump
body:
News outlets like us are left to push the truth out to millions of Americans
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1085%2E120351%2Euv4sUl)
Peter —
Yesterday, Donald Trump was indicted for violating the Espionage Act — **making him the first US President in history to face federal charges.**
Trump immediately took to Truth Social to launch his disinformation campaign. Meanwhile, bad actors like Fox News, Sean Hannity, and Stephen Miller acted fast to push Trump’s false, dangerous narrative and antagonize his supporters:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230609?refcode=em20230609&refcode2=1085_120351_uv4sUl&akid=1085%2E120351%2Euv4sUl)
To **millions** of people, online and on cable TV, they’ve spent the last 12+ hours amplifying Trump’s lies. Their goal is obvious. To get Trump elected, they’re trying to create doubt about our legal system and sow distrust in our democracy.
Our dedicated news teams are working hard to counter their bad information in real-time through fact-based news pieces and social posts —**but they can’t do this alone.**
[**At a historic moment like this, our work has never been more important. Will you chip in $5 to power our team?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230609?refcode=em20230609&refcode2=1085_120351_uv4sUl&akid=1085%2E120351%2Euv4sUl)
Peter, the Justice Department can’t — and won’t — wage the kind of massive PR campaign we’re already seeing from Trump and his cronies. Instead, they have to let the legal documents do the talking.
That means that news outlets like us are left to push the truth out to millions of Americans, publishing concise and clear stories that break down the facts of these charges as the case progresses.
We know bad actors like Trump, Fox News, and Stephen Miller won’t let up on their lies. They’re motivated by self-promotion, profit, and power — all at the expense of the truth and our democracy.
At Courier Newsroom, we know the best antidote to their bad information is the truth. That’s why our newsrooms are working in real-time to counter these false claims and spread their trustworthy journalism to as many people as possible — **but they need the resources to do it.**
[**Please help us keep up this important work by contributing $5 today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230609?refcode=em20230609&refcode2=1085_120351_uv4sUl&akid=1085%2E120351%2Euv4sUl)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230609?refcode=em20230609&refcode2=1085_120351_uv4sUl&akid=1085%2E120351%2Euv4sUl)** Thank you,
Courier Newsroom
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1085_120351_uv4sUl&akid=1085%2E120351%2Euv4sUl)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Why we send these emails
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Hi there,
We hope you don’t mind that we’re reaching out to you one more time before the weekend starts.
You may be wondering why we send so many emails. Here’s the truth: our success depends on the donations we receive from emails like these.
It may be hard to believe, but since our founding ten years ago, we’ve received nearly one million individual contributions online, with an average gift of around just $30. There is no greater single source of those donations than emails like this one.
So yes, we know we email you a lot, but we hope you can understand why we have to send them. They are truly an indication of just how important you are to our movement.
[**Friend, will you make a contribution of $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today? Join us as we continue our work to change our nation’s gun laws and fight for a safer future.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230609-1-15&t=1&akid=5937%2E3935704%2EMPsa75)

subject: BREAKING: INDICTED

body:
A BIDEN-APPOINTED FEDERAL PROSECUTOR HAS INDICTED ME.
A BIDEN-APPOINTED FEDERAL PROSECUTOR HAS INDICTED ME.

| | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/save-america-joint-fundraising-committee/oly2706a29b0ad12?utm_campaign=20230609&utm_medium=email&utm_source=CI_B&utm_content=69&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)

Friend,
We are watching our Republic DIE before our very eyes.
The Biden-appointed Special Counsel has **INDICTED** me in yet another witch hunt regarding documents that I had the RIGHT to declassify as President of the United States.
This witch hunt began when the FBI RAIDED my home and then staged it to look like a made-for-TV crime scene with police sirens and flashing red and blue lights.
**This is nothing but a disgusting act of Election Interference by the ruling party to ELIMINATE its opposition and amass total control over our country.**
The Deep State thought they had destroyed our campaign when a Soros-backed prosecutor indicted and even ARRESTED me earlier this year.
_But then, we SHOCKED them as our campaign grew even stronger..._
...We broke fundraising records. 3 independent polls showed us beating Joe Biden by 7 POINTS. In fact, polls show I’m the _ONLY_ Republican who can beat Crooked Joe.
**So, after a _state_ prosecutor _failed_ to break us, the Deep State sharpened their attacks and unleashed a FEDERAL prosecutor to TRY and take us down.**
_But let me be as clear as possible:_
**No matter how viciously they attack me, I will NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER our country to the radical Left – and I will NEVER end this presidential campaign that puts YOU first.**
With YOUR support, we will once again surge even higher and prove that our America First movement truly is UNSTOPPABLE.

In the wake of _Roe v. Wade_ , 12 states have near-total abortion bans on the books, and extremists in 7 more are doing everything they can to place major restrictions on abortion access. What was once a national fight to preserve reproductive freedom, is now dangerously in the hands of your state’s elected officials. We want to know what you think about this, team: **Are extremist officials making targeted attacks on abortion access state-by-state?** [YES →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64578077/410543838/1261050154?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjE4NjI1Mi1kYjA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IzPWWFW14SlpdkAVH4ph93br0gp309Yv6bM6eUFNs2I=&emci=425ed5c9-5305-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=2f186252-db06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) [NO →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64578078/410543839/1261050154?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjE4NjI1Mi1kYjA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IzPWWFW14SlpdkAVH4ph93br0gp309Yv6bM6eUFNs2I=&emci=425ed5c9-5305-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=2f186252-db06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) Nearly 8 in 10 Americans wanted to see abortion remain protected, but now as post-Roe abortion bans continue to come down across the U.S., millions of these very same Americans are left without access to reproductive health care. subject: The weaponized Justice Department has just indicted Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
A blatant effort to knock him out of the presidential race

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25018%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JLazDPjx6qaagpSHLv4tmg&sysid=1)

Friend, this is Ted Cruz:

As I predicted, the weaponized Justice Department has just indicted Donald Trump in a blatant effort to knock him out of the presidential race and protect Joe Biden.

**[This is lawless and must not stand.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25019%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=txnjjbjwrhy35Xuaov5tBg&sysid=1)** 📲

Merrick Garland is the most partisan, most political attorney general in our Nation's history.

_He has fully corrupted the FBI. He has effectively turned the whole DOJ into an arm of the Democratic National Committee._

Merrick Garland is using the overwhelming power of the state to try and crush President Trump and to crush any dissent.

**[We can't allow this - help me fight back right now>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25010%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zC%2bevjmPimaNm5RrUBdeNg&sysid=1)**

To try and STOP voters from enshrining reproductive rights into the state constitution this year, Republicans want to raise the success threshold for citizen-led ballot initiatives to 60 percent. We have to vote NO against their sham proposal on August 8.

Team, this month's anniversary serves as a stark reminder of the ongoing fight for reproductive freedom and access. The Ohio Democratic Party needs your support now more than ever as we face an uphill battle against those who seek to sabotage the reproductive freedom ballot initiative.

The Republican efforts to dismantle reproductive freedom are not only an assault on women's rights — but an attack on fundamental principles of equality and personal autonomy. **We cannot allow extreme politicians to dictate the fate of reproductive freedom in Ohio.**

To gauge the strength of our supporters and gather essential data, it's crucial that as many folks as possible take our short poll. **[Click here to take the poll to let us know if you'll be voting NO on August 8 to save citizen-led ballot initiatives.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64578237/410544536/1127966303?ms=em23_230608_kicker_adv_gq_act___ODP_ettx&refcode=em23_230608_kicker_adv_gq_act___ODP_ettx&source=em23_230608_kicker_adv_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230608_kicker_adv_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=9TrrEb20u2pEStlCqlgXrXG54avY3FlDjNXiel3sI+uyyD0IIkrBexXJiuRak70ehhA9Q64YGSrDm9rMUGZIVKGAXDZA5Jdx6DmUnjOl6SOfIegaXGuBpDCUZKPaacD/tIo+Z8Ep9fXnl04+lR4bLA==&refcode2=24ceb7e0-db06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGNlYjdlMC1kYjA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UWXRlzHEbHWyJopfVlJmqWSXtJRyWXI72FaEdnvWz4w=&emci=6702c951-1f06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=24ceb7e0-db06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25291327)**

Thank you,

Ohio Democratic Party

Thank you, Ohio Democratic Party The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. = = | 697 East Broad Street Suite 101 Columbus, Ohio 43215 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

If you prefer to contribute by check, you are welcome to send a contribution to the campaign at the address below. To comply with Federal law, we must use our best efforts to obtain, maintain and submit the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont Becca for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05302 United States

Listen.

**_I don't know about you, but I'm sick and tired of being sick and tired._**

We've all been hearing about the Chinese national police station that was found operating in New York City. **But our media is only talking about what it means for the two chinese nationalists running the station** -- _and not even how it affects our national security and safety as a country!_

_On top of that, did you know that they found more than a half-dozen of these stations across the country?!**THIS IS A MAJOR ISSUE.**_

**[This is a massive issue, and we need to be talking about what it means for the entire United States.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=969019ddb9e94955a8dbc7e18d7f98dd&_e=cgnBsEcLWXiU_Z_s-IomTrNLS6oGne6n8z_ypdiD0ms3oLNCRrnPYHZR6ZH4PwY0DtJ_RSYR5ipIPRz3QuVU4ekJ-CeaLBlpKo5TM8nuvyvLG-a_7hnGLapJsciGsHlk9MnboMOp1wSH-T7WBGzCRCBTktwLcc7YwGUVWXzMuLaaU7UnsoT4g2jbjyN_xVnaBb86a3MXYHaClZMG16XSQKq524EVqYKhAj8Z3h3gyXmbDyw4qIVILEVCfSd-xDZ0eOlwlfQBohLwTimzK9WknJ_Pto3Cojb1dXDNbeHSDqzxr2PSi5rYED2tXuD_MlCJGxNdWpvNGssWXf6oFXMCvdY5-AclKraUzCLAPmCvU2njocyb-CGWRdN0TAYqLJWc0jxZZYMj0R_uozMI1Ber2dO0JJMSS5GC0LMnfOG9eC0c1cneWjjB93L0Fn708JLOLVOEmgmIOxn_4G8fwPAFMrIHdfo0ZZOW-Q08snlVTgGhpryiA1dwDcsWVvx-nxMM3GmGcMQeboLM4TeiPLgfd9TJmZjci3F9ZrYQkM-5v0J8qBVA48MCuk7WEJsy4KlH)**

These Chinese National Police have been allowed free reign of our streets, collecting who **KNOWS** how much information about private American citizens. **These are not just innocent tourists with no ties to the Communist Party --they're trained spies who are infiltrating our country and gathering information on us at will.**
I know that the last thing on your mind right now is donating money to a political campaign--I get it. _But if you believe in our country's future, then don't let this opportunity pass you by!_

The best way we can fight back against these attacks on our sovereignty is by supporting candidates who will do everything they can to protect us from foreign influence.

And if they aren't willing to stand up for us? Then we need new ones!

**[Chip in HERE to put America FIRST and STOP the CCP from infiltrating our communities.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=969019ddb9e94955a8dbc7e18d7f98dd&_e=cgnBsEcLWXiU_Z_s-IomTrNLS6oGne6n8z_ypdiD0ms3oLNCRrnPYHZR6ZH4PwY0DtJ_RSYR5ipIPRz3QuVU4ekJ-CeaLBlpKo5TM8nuvyvLG-a_7hnGLapJsciGsHlk9MnboMOp1wSH-T7WBGzCRCBTktwLcc7YwGUVWXzMuLaaU7UnsoT4g2jbjyN_xVnaBb86a3MXYHaClZMG16XSQKq524EVqYKhAj8Z3h3gyXmbDyw4qIVILEVCfSd-xDZ0eOlwlfQBohLwTimzK9WknJ_Pto3Cojb1dXDNbeHSDqzxr2PSi5rYED2tXuD_MlCJGxNdWpvNGssWXf6oFXMCvdY5-AclKraUzCLAPmCvU2njocyb-CGWRdN0TAYqLJWc0jxZZYMj0R_uozMI1Ber2dO0JJMSS5GC0LMnfOG9eC2HVwdeMoAnx3jRCJokvsJnXM0OiXzO6Y5bWV4gj6g1KG-BG6w1v1Hn-vaOh5PmCyOfkRAVLlKNKGJV4YO_yvz29hy3ybdDwqqjxaDu3rZ6m5pDHtXHuLrx48CAxlUMT0h3ACpy3moiZP0_K4Nhwuco)**

Thank you,

Team Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance.

_If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation._ | name: Greta for AG
subject: Do you have just two spare minutes?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
body:
Peter – Leadership is about service. That’s why Greta’s campaign to become Mississippi Attorney General centers around people and families, and creating a Mississippi that uplifts each and every one of our incredible citizens.

For far too long, Mississippi has been under the leadership of an AG that is more focused on giving handouts to her wealthy buddies, instead of ensuring we have a state that works for everyone from Tishomingo County to Jackson.

If we’re going to bring real change to the Attorney General’s office, then we need to bring the focus back to you. And the best way to do that is for you to tell Greta exactly what’s top of mind for you and your family.

We need as many supporters as possible to take our issues survey so Greta knows what to focus on to help create a better future for Mississippi families. Can you make your voice heard by taking our survey today?

TAKE THE SURVEY: https://secure.ngpvan.com/o5DqIxBqOUeJa4XTFjCffw2?refcode=EM_PET_230609SWOnboard2_TG_6_PT

Thank you for making your voice heard,
Greta for AG

P.S. – Help us spread the word! Forward this email to any friends and family so they can share their thoughts in our survey.

--

Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state.

DONATE TODAY: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gkm-fr?refcode=EM_PET_230609SWOnboard2_TG_6_bioboxPT&amount=25

Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
Greta Kemp Martin for Attorney General
PO BOX 16402
Jackson, MS 39236
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/c7O9Ucx9VUa_ajDO2m2OGQ2?unsubscribedata=KwXBhimuZXyOC3mOdVIFdPfNh55RLVozW6VUCEL%2B9gF237qxE%2FJvNJmELyMkwh9LYXzo5pBZVdN4%2BUbQ9THOEDousSHok3yb6x%2BvLz%2BZXQJcc95HrysdodWUybogI5QgwUeXvGm7Pq70P4h8QiCIZdKFfUyBioHpSDANGUF2Po2XEiAlc1%2FXvey%2B5ZqxKEAYg7gKIjaMQgu4KhzR6sQvrlivDaL%2FMFGojve67F6FKiwVkeW6XBCjO%2B%2BRJCNq0cNqdfP8gumsYY4huFu%2FB%2BkASCafUDA5yo6VtcZbNkagz4CtT56T1klizEC1BB%2FsXLRHDSDWTe4Q5y18QcLLbWN8xs0ls3ujtm4GhWR3V8DML4sU1UBYoHNDpdGQwCQqxglj6gOIIGdiV1VeB8%2FowYEBOQwR1iltHlIrdtJyY58axuyEbAbv0KDjax1BVyAHJnpY .

Peter,

Twice impeached president, and now twice indicted Donald Trump remains the front runner for the Republican Nomination for President, and we simply cannot believe it.

...wait, actually, we CAN believe it because, over the course of his presidency, **Donald Trump has shown the American people how vindictive, fraudulent, and downright evil he can be.**

We know it’s a painfully low bar, but here at The Collective PAC we think that the President of the United States should NOT be an indicted felon 🤷🏽

[What do you think, Peter? To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from The Collective PAC, please .

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9bc322d922684817ae6194d6f6c8a134&_e=74uU2fvqZuW-_BNQlnUMXZERN3M_Qhu2BPV1t7ziMToWxlH-l4AaQjUpMqUVL8uoKEloGSi2ogptYC4HAZ6NoX0QVWmOy5CpZFz4RuY_-xAB4rLb_jMltipvSZuc1Zc79g7dpkdqTE459LyjP7LGoKSKULNIAt2qmkyq3d-zi9YRQWBcDiADZbGc69hFY3IXemZlz4WbFoTkQQd5jDdSYRwg4MEiZ8D6nOrJMsQdvQsD_eL2JciGGsS_eMw0RFAeulqZkLbbbYoaTpPT8GXoN09bp4tNOLhPT_WyljqTeDQC-aDKQ3MNS3jcnixkOQyFYNnDFKCA5Yv8R7mznQ-xwcDDbkOO8ONUsVQ8KSzuyMIQ9ADp2ehrTBszMAzJefYv)
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9bc322d922684817ae6194d6f6c8a134&_e=74uU2fvqZuW-_BNQlnUMXZERN3M_Qhu2BPV1t7ziMToWxlH-l4AaQjUpMqUVL8uoKEloGSi2ogptYC4HAZ6NoX0QVWmOy5CpZFz4RuY_-xAB4rLb_jMltipvSZuc1Zc79g7dpkdqTE459LyjP7LGoKSKULNIAt2qmkyq3d-zi9YRQWBcDiADZbGc69hFY3IXemZlz4WbFoTkQQd5jDdSYRwg4MEiZ8D6nOrJMsQdvQuQ2dhHHaG4U4myXR83OSIOz0MEwyYy_12vj2V1rgEk424rfdeCCaZw48RKjE2gYolzZ-vq9KgeRvuuQdh9CP8eoi4mAENooRS_C-owTaZeeFEJVzgr0vpimCGCIobNwlDWMpy94tIa_R4gF8NajinM)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You've seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I've chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**."

I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9bc322d922684817ae6194d6f6c8a134&_e=74uU2fvqZuW-_BNQlnUMXZERN3M_Qhu2BPV1t7ziMToWxlH-l4AaQjUpMqUVL8uoKEloGSi2ogptYC4HAZ6NoX0QVWmOy5CpZFz4RuY_-xAB4rLb_jMltipvSZuc1Zc79g7dpkdqTE459LyjP7LGoKSKULNIAt2qmkyq3d-zi9YRQWBcDiADZbGc69hFY3IXemZlz4WbFoTkQQd5jDdSYRwg4MEiZ8D6nOrJMsQdvQvB9Y4BxowUYjk1lwpRKjT7S6qznou3gdvgn5ULULHvC1PDmaZoue-753tggVagt7OMtJWtArm8kMMBdZlDBCx23UP5pjarOLzVJPcTFVWkmrkA0ZuvQBk2kK0YEgAor55T5KjorhvV6t5xXJCPb4YT)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9bc322d922684817ae6194d6f6c8a134&_e=74uU2fvqZuW-_BNQlnUMXZERN3M_Qhu2BPV1t7ziMToWxlH-l4AaQjUpMqUVL8uoKEloGSi2ogptYC4HAZ6NoX0QVWmOy5CpZFz4RuY_-xAB4rLb_jMltipvSZuc1Zc79g7dpkdqTE459LyjP7LGoKSKULNIAt2qmkyq3d-zi9YRQWBcDiADZbGc69hFY3IXemZlz4WbFoTkQQd5jDdSYRwg4MEiZ8D6nOrJMsQdvQu0Dx4e2TG7ikbjNILdgkZ7r9oU58l9Ekg00xyuSe6dOChLLOG3g3FBTTJndytkUU1sOInwN4xmd5XPIZX_emcG0peYnwEFdN0902HcPSlRdHxP3ysG8P26n_Bp5BmWJXrS8wAbw4ea_EEK7y7C3S2a)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That's where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9bc322d922684817ae6194d6f6c8a134&_e=74uU2fvqZuW-_BNQlnUMXZERN3M_Qhu2BPV1t7ziMToWxlH-l4AaQjUpMqUVL8uoKEloGSi2ogptYC4HAZ6NoX0QVWmOy5CpZFz4RuY_-xAB4rLb_jMltipvSZuc1Zc79g7dpkdqTE459LyjP7LGoKSKULNIAt2qmkyq3d-zi9YRQWBcDiADZbGc69hFY3IXemZlz4WbFoTkQQd5jDdSYRwg4MEiZ8D6nOrJMsQdvQtUDqZ0-BaqN9coKKPgKDt9KnjVJ6fY4C7wayWLqdjev1kUQTnHe3YVdmbqEhW8qSDr0bgA9ngaXNmgkwWtS38S-JK9z5-qc9hbRmw536fahO9bxDpVxMX1TZo8C9td1HQ_XXOTbSUwLYVIG8C9h_fu)?**

When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I'm asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9bc322d922684817ae6194d6f6c8a134&_e=74uU2fvqZuW-_BNQlnUMXZERN3M_Qhu2BPV1t7ziMToWxlH-l4AaQjUpMqUVL8uoKEloGSi2ogptYC4HAZ6NoX0QVWmOy5CpZFz4RuY_-xAB4rLb_jMltipvSZuc1Zc79g7dpkdqTE459LyjP7LGoKSKULNIAt2qmkyq3d-zi9YRQWBcDiADZbGc69hFY3IXemZlz4WbFoTkQQd5jDdSYRwg4MEiZ8D6nOrJMsQdvQsJVEACDu0ZmeRsTZ4JOn-J44UtbiPCQbeDStH315hF6xYPSaIsKkoCU3T1B5ETN3OaLMWJFQdU4dEkWa6Iy33V2z9s19CyKQwzQ3kyHOKEJWtd3PKmYpXS2Omwqcl9D7-Q9s40URovCdbBwzKKdfV1)**. And I'll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9bc322d922684817ae6194d6f6c8a134&_e=74uU2fvqZuW-_BNQlnUMXZERN3M_Qhu2BPV1t7ziMToWxlH-l4AaQjUpMqUVL8uoKEloGSi2ogptYC4HAZ6NoX0QVWmOy5CpZFz4RuY_-xAB4rLb_jMltipvSZuc1Zc79g7dpkdqTE459LyjP7LGoKSKULNIAt2qmkyq3d-zi9YRQWBcDiADZbGc69hFY3IXemZlz4WbFoTkQQd5jDdSYRwg4MEiZ8D6nOrJMsQdvQvlhR6rvaEIo_uoJIXN6GfkZnaIWNPEF1Hx_f9-Wq-QEE3Ove9to9tHPX6U18WN5aiKb1RogXfox-3oX9HOjYItHx06FDvhZRTsf2X-OwHZtvfL_qtG2hon3Mi5Eey2zlTW4A0eLGh0fSAxBN25FyEH)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9bc322d922684817ae6194d6f6c8a134&_e=74uU2fvqZuW-_BNQlnUMXZERN3M_Qhu2BPV1t7ziMToWxlH-l4AaQjUpMqUVL8uoKEloGSi2ogptYC4HAZ6NoX0QVWmOy5CpZFz4RuY_-xAB4rLb_jMltipvSZuc1Zc79g7dpkdqTE459LyjP7LGoKSKULNIAt2qmkyq3d-zi9YRQWBcDiADZbGc69hFY3IXemZlz4WbFoTkQQd5jDdSYRwg4MEiZ8D6nOrJMsQdvQtQoA3_WWaqbazXhEClYOWoiurpDlvAfgGOtmoNBSTiCjtBnlDMyC4qn-KSlzxuP9Vf7SzIWcVfp4LF7WgufQYlQr83KJV8NY3VqDvZzAPXhwqnsmwuwNLe7zgAJZeWlVmax6N-yrPhbbJiqWBW78Kb)**.

---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Why am I doing this?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Here in California, a federal judge overturned our assault weapons ban and compared the weapon to a "Swiss Army knife." It's insane.

Friends -
Since I announced our push to pass a Constitutional Amendment on guns, a few folks have asked "why are you doing this?"
Here's why this is important:
States and Congress can pass the strongest gun laws in the world, but when federal courts or the Supreme Court overturn them, then what?
And if you think you're safe from that in a Blue State? Then think again...
Here in California, a federal judge overturned our assault weapons ban and compared the weapon to a "Swiss Army knife." It's insane.
Look at what the Supreme Court did in their most recent major decision on guns. They fundamentally changed the way the 2nd Amendment is interpreted when they overturned a 100-year-old law that required people to have "proper cause" to obtain a concealed carry permit to carry a firearm anywhere they want. This has repercussions in all 50 states.
No gun law is safe — not in the states, not if passed in Congress — until the 28th Amendment is enshrined in the Constitution.
So that is what we must do. And it will start in California.
Now here is my promise to you:
I will use every dollar donated today to help us pass a Constitutional Amendment on guns in the United States and also to take the fight directly to Republican governors on this issue.
Because this is what we have to do to save lives. So I am asking:
[**Can you please contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, to help me organize in California and across the country to pass a Constitutional Amendment on guns?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-june-23?refcode=em230609-1-2m-t&refcode2=1426_4767699_Phdhg2&akid=1426%2E4767699%2EPhdhg2)

---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-june-23?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em230609-1-2m-t&refcode2=1426_4767699_Phdhg2&akid=1426%2E4767699%2EPhdhg2)**

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3a020ba63fa34baa9d42b9df5f401f24&_e=tb5OWg2Zg6ZndSEEGKJaFvPaIGYkiB1KgVNYRbZOXpfeHq-T6dUyiNvQoEdhzugANAprj719u_Zc9qGgzOAcTVawCF8c3tfvvAjVjMYmc-nAYMuD_frSxC6qAEG-2U2xR650y7AT66aX1LUIrZQcKdQHjajlng_wNeklvoh0SlWR9BAFELUPOq4QTWOe0UejhzztLxOT4HbPgC-TYTPeKlCma7xDnAXSEEambvW2vYMK-RcDRUxatj5zzxGOCV3PxIPBMaFUFOdYnrhByGrOqLL-rbLgr_kUlnJbgvv3l1Do6aZVAwfKjjZoYIhxrRUteLz4LYtTNdPc8alYhvDbSbTPMkDUDdhTlBbnzxtzqVZoPmKaFH90LhzgCE7QvLJ5)
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3a020ba63fa34baa9d42b9df5f401f24&_e=tb5OWg2Zg6ZndSEEGKJaFvPaIGYkiB1KgVNYRbZOXpfeHq-T6dUyiNvQoEdhzugANAprj719u_Zc9qGgzOAcTVawCF8c3tfvvAjVjMYmc-nAYMuD_frSxC6qAEG-2U2xR650y7AT66aX1LUIrZQcKdQHjajlng_wNeklvoh0SlWR9BAFELUPOq4QTWOe0UejhzztLxOT4HbPgC-TYTPeKlCma7xDnAXSEEambvW2vYMKerrHwWr3z6CB44h7adGbQ0xtAluGh-GxlB4m_ZBNu53y2rMt9ufgNOjLZpsOpUTRXSMUr68gZw3t7EiaWRYP_yYz7nX_mqCeUigChdVNuk0kmPP4wqIXLexFbqZbD5bVMepq0kgiTzH1QqXxv6yP)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You've seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I've chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**."

I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3a020ba63fa34baa9d42b9df5f401f24&_e=tb5OWg2Zg6ZndSEEGKJaFvPaIGYkiB1KgVNYRbZOXpfeHq-T6dUyiNvQoEdhzugANAprj719u_Zc9qGgzOAcTVawCF8c3tfvvAjVjMYmc-nAYMuD_frSxC6qAEG-2U2xR650y7AT66aX1LUIrZQcKdQHjajlng_wNeklvoh0SlWR9BAFELUPOq4QTWOe0UejhzztLxOT4HbPgC-TYTPeKlCma7xDnAXSEEambvW2vYPLy1KZhdGncQlT1_5vHf4W0gVDE3laEJmiY8LtZDjInVwiIbWHMown0BKNwjSNOydRz0KuPTFGxtWFlflYv4f7g-GzJCcKr6tAZoDI5aW7w6DhBfygeOClNO4trWtjDTQvTponxPE8OmHVDZoNJi96)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3a020ba63fa34baa9d42b9df5f401f24&_e=tb5OWg2Zg6ZndSEEGKJaFvPaIGYkiB1KgVNYRbZOXpfeHq-T6dUyiNvQoEdhzugANAprj719u_Zc9qGgzOAcTVawCF8c3tfvvAjVjMYmc-nAYMuD_frSxC6qAEG-2U2xR650y7AT66aX1LUIrZQcKdQHjajlng_wNeklvoh0SlWR9BAFELUPOq4QTWOe0UejhzztLxOT4HbPgC-TYTPeKlCma7xDnAXSEEambvW2vYOfG0k_QY3oZY0R5p5AKAq6jQ6-8iwVysnK7xcUuo8K_jbgKjp4CpEBkxDB16_yodw8M9T8KkxbHrhRfLYpPHznKxed54kw-9vCG6g9iamrj53WZAIQP5mjuk8uBpV9sTo6fDJ9XXnVrscdGySiK6py)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That's where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3a020ba63fa34baa9d42b9df5f401f24&_e=tb5OWg2Zg6ZndSEEGKJaFvPaIGYkiB1KgVNYRbZOXpfeHq-T6dUyiNvQoEdhzugANAprj719u_Zc9qGgzOAcTVawCF8c3tfvvAjVjMYmc-nAYMuD_frSxC6qAEG-2U2xR650y7AT66aX1LUIrZQcKdQHjajlng_wNeklvoh0SlWR9BAFELUPOq4QTWOe0UejhzztLxOT4HbPgC-TYTPeKlCma7xDnAXSEEambvW2vYNpB49Zn2lBnzDolDVPctbYFow3SD78gizMEthr7I-AFatO6pohywN5zHZlsji1zaovG1QY9Z2sWWxV_r55BmlROUksoxQNGv7DqP0cz5h1VDBPrLPGEx01nZtXgddl3oTpYgrpQApGyalDdCHZcyEk)?**

When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I'm asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3a020ba63fa34baa9d42b9df5f401f24&_e=tb5OWg2Zg6ZndSEEGKJaFvPaIGYkiB1KgVNYRbZOXpfeHq-T6dUyiNvQoEdhzugANAprj719u_Zc9qGgzOAcTVawCF8c3tfvvAjVjMYmc-nAYMuD_frSxC6qAEG-2U2xR650y7AT66aX1LUIrZQcKdQHjajlng_wNeklvoh0SlWR9BAFELUPOq4QTWOe0UejhzztLxOT4HbPgC-TYTPeKlCma7xDnAXSEEambvW2vYNPlBesqD71C-HidWOI9OAQqYOCNDipxFaOuFMdGm-W5H7vwfgwiP4VJsQq9ATb51Q09xV7myw7zgc-F4hFPPDZQ61n0ZdpnduvHYMyPYfpJUmzIvoDA7vFPG5dt_-OyU4rYD3050vBkYaIjkFNodhL)**. And I'll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3a020ba63fa34baa9d42b9df5f401f24&_e=tb5OWg2Zg6ZndSEEGKJaFvPaIGYkiB1KgVNYRbZOXpfeHq-T6dUyiNvQoEdhzugANAprj719u_Zc9qGgzOAcTVawCF8c3tfvvAjVjMYmc-nAYMuD_frSxC6qAEG-2U2xR650y7AT66aX1LUIrZQcKdQHjajlng_wNeklvoh0SlWR9BAFELUPOq4QTWOe0UejhzztLxOT4HbPgC-TYTPeKlCma7xDnAXSEEambvW2vYM8OdSMeJVLK4KBvqY4fr2ybmnuSNdjWq2gWMaXJUBw4lD20NIEzF3Dw4Lg1qVvbca8laW_dKzEpj1RmTZdu7y3wFD_KAs5ix52xtymLPFSwhQSRaxIaGdtbGkB_C2hok2r4PsyBBEB8sez1sx8kDeA)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3a020ba63fa34baa9d42b9df5f401f24&_e=tb5OWg2Zg6ZndSEEGKJaFvPaIGYkiB1KgVNYRbZOXpfeHq-T6dUyiNvQoEdhzugANAprj719u_Zc9qGgzOAcTVawCF8c3tfvvAjVjMYmc-nAYMuD_frSxC6qAEG-2U2xR650y7AT66aX1LUIrZQcKdQHjajlng_wNeklvoh0SlWR9BAFELUPOq4QTWOe0UejhzztLxOT4HbPgC-TYTPeKlCma7xDnAXSEEambvW2vYPwOyZMpMlTQSTWOz6wpJtnZkLUKT7aK-lanoc7z-PjwiPqQzOQuGCssnISRd7vM-9QRK0Y4c_LItd4ZcL8BevUrQeBK825MMr09bWowBZsgHHQQWDCPH3bfac1bLzhTEpjmhdW4YuYbjeB2VHHy2eg)**.

---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---

name: Patton Oswalt
subject: re: air quality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
What we're seeing right now is unprecedented.

| I'm Patton Oswalt, Virginia born and bred, and I don't remember growing up with skies this heavy with smoke, do you? _**What we're seeing right now is unprecedented.**_

Swaths of Canadian forest are ablaze, and the resulting smoke and haze have infiltrated the air we breathe here in the United States, degrading the air quality from South Carolina to Detroit, all the way up past New York City, which for a little while registered among the very worst air quality. Even the skies over my home state of Virginia are filled with an unsettling haze.

The air we're breathing, the atmosphere we're living in — **_it's not what it used to be_**. But this is not a natural disaster or something we can chalk up to “inclement weather.” This is a predictable result of decades of burning fossil fuels. **_This is the climate crisis_**.

These are dark times, literally for many of us, but we still have so much reason to be hopeful – the science says that we still have time to change course and avoid the worst effects of the climate crisis. clean_body: What we're seeing right now is unprecedented. | I'm Patton Oswalt, Virginia born and bred, and I don't remember growing up with skies this heavy with smoke, do you? What we're seeing right now is unprecedented. Swaths of Canadian forest are ablaze, and the resulting smoke and haze have infiltrated the air we breathe here in the United States, degrading the air quality from South Carolina to Detroit, all the way up past New York City, which for a little while registered among the very worst air quality. Even the skies over my home state of Virginia are filled with an unsettling haze. The air we're breathing, the atmosphere we're living in — it's not what it used to be. But this is not a natural disaster or something we can chalk up to “inclement weather.” This is a predictable result of decades of burning fossil fuels. This is the climate crisis. These are dark times, literally for many of us, but we still have so much reason to be hopeful – the science says that we still have time to change course and avoid the worst effects of the climate crisis. = | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = The solutions to this crisis are within reach, but the people in power in this country are choosing to ignore them for the sake of their fossil fuel industry allies. This is why the work of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is crucial – they are committed to supporting candidates who will do more than pay lip service to the climate crisis with bandaid solutions. In the next few weeks, Jane’s team will be reaching out to announce a slate of climate champions they’re supporting in Virginia this year, with more local and state races across the country to follow. clean_body: Do you stand with President Trump during these dark times? | | | Friend, June 8, 2023 will forever go down as a dark day in American history. History books will record it as the day the Biden Administration unlawfully INDICTED the ONE and ONLY candidate beating Joe Biden in the polls. It will be remembered as the day our Free Republic transformed into a Third World Marxist regime run by unelected bureaucrats. But YOU can show these left-wing radicals that their vicious assault on our Republic not only failed – it BACKFIRED. You can show the nation that, during these dark times, you chose to stand up for justice, you chose to STAND with President Trump! | | Our America First movement is oftentimes referred to as the “Silent Majority.” But in the face of the Left’s third-world TYRANNY, we cannot be a “silent” majority.We must stand up for TRUE JUSTICE and peacefully defend our America First Movement. And what better way to show your support for President Trump and our incredible movement during this dark chapter in our nation’s history than to proudly wear the “I Stand with President Trump” T-shirt that features the date of his unjust indictment. Americans are rushing to buy these shirts to show their support for President Trump, but because we know you’re one of the President’s biggest supporters, Friend, we’re holding one just for YOU until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. Donald J. Trump June 8th, 2023
**Top Takeaways**
\- From 2010 to 2015, Smith served under Obama Attorney General Eric Holder, leading the DOJ’s Public Integrity Section.
\- After leaving the DOJ in 2015, Smith served as the first Assistant United States Attorney and Acting United States Attorney for The Middle District of Tennessee.
\- Smith was instrumental in the DOJ’s Lois Lerner IRS scandal targeting conservative nonprofit groups.
\- Smith convicted former Republican Virginia Governor Bob McDonnell, which was later unanimously overturned by the Supreme Court.
\- In 2016, The Supreme Court overturned Bob McDonnell’s convictions unanimously 8-0.
\- In November 2022, Bob McDonnell said regarding Jack Smith, “I think there's a real judgement problem."
\- Smith pursued a case against Democrat Sen. John Edwards, which resulted in a hung jury and mistrial.
\- Smith convicted Republican Rep. Rick Renzi before he was pardoned by President Trump in 2021.
\- Smith attempted to prosecute Democrat Bob Menendez, but it resulted in a mistrial.
\- This month, Rep. Jim Jordan launched a probe to conduct oversight over Special Counsel Jack Smith’s probe into former President Donald Trump for the handling of papers at Mar-A-Lago.
\- Jack Smith is trying to hide who is on the team targeting President Trump.
\- This month, Judicial Watch sued the Biden Justice Department for refusing to reveal names of special counsel Jack Smith’s staff.
\- In November 2022, Jim Jordan revealed that Jack Smith tried to find ways to target conservatives during the Obama era and released a report in 2014.

**Chief Justice Roberts Wrote, “There Is No Doubt That This Case Is Distasteful; It May Be Worse Than That. But Our Concern Is Not With Tawdry Tales Of Ferraris, Rolexes, And Ball Gowns. It Is Instead With The Broader Legal Implications Of The Government’s Boundless Interpretation Of The Federal Bribery Statute.” Adding, “A More Limited Interpretation Of The Term ‘Official Act’ Leaves Ample Room For Prosecuting Corruption, While Comporting With The Text Of The Statute And The Precedent Of This Court.”** “The court’s opinion, written by Chief Justice John Roberts, rejected the government’s position that simply agreeing to meet with someone on account of such largesse could be enough to constitute an official act that could trigger a corruption conviction. “There is no doubt that this case is distasteful; it may be worse than that. But our concern is not with tawdry tales of Ferraris, Rolexes, and ball gowns. It is instead with the broader legal implications of the Government’s boundless interpretation of the federal bribery statute,” Roberts wrote. “A more limited interpretation of the term ‘official act’ leaves ample room for prosecuting corruption, while comporting with the text of the statute and the precedent of this Court.” ( [Politico](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kMFu8yAQhJ8G37BgsTE-cPjzR-4hUq9tjw7ghgZ7EeBYefuKqupltdr9NDOaeY3BL09NhhMBuHmbCQAR_wjApTu9v8rL2-VMP477Cz3LvjvqF_4TgPKM7g_9VWndOvtQr8O5sbqHhbPGaS6VFCCVkM1NcyWYBcON7RUsIJalH2frQLq5F5wNjdfAQDDJRi7ZwLvWwnUQA-9HxUbuRkU6Zl2-42Jxm4P9KmlfY2twbYK-lRLzT6aJwHQcRxsx-OINVoDAlAumJ4EJGJcEJlZH3mNyq6MG91QoPlwqe9oyveKVrsbitrkQMjWY0h6Lx40a3B7e1DVTgE4J0SRt4-FD8FkOpGOftYnq-R0AAP__EVdsVg) , 6/27/16)
**Roberts Added, “The Government’s Position Could Cast A Pall Of Potential Prosecution Over These Relationships If The Union Had Given A Campaign Contribution In The Past Or The Homeowners Invited The Official To Join Them On Their Annual Outing To The Ballgame.** **Officials Might Wonder Whether They Could Respond To Even The Most Commonplace Requests For Assistance, And Citizens With Legitimate Concerns Might Shrink From Participating In Democratic Discourse.”** “Conscientious public officials arrange meetings for constituents, contact other officials on their behalf, and include them in events all the time. The basic compact underlying representative government assumes that public officials will hear from their constituents and act appropriately on their concerns—whether it is the union official worried about a plant closing or the homeowners who wonder why it took five days to restore power to their neighborhood after a storm,” Roberts wrote. “The Government’s position could cast a pall of potential prosecution over these relationships if the union had given a campaign contribution in the past or the homeowners invited the official to join them on their annual outing to the ballgame. Officials might wonder whether they could respond to even the most commonplace requests for assistance, and citizens with legitimate concerns might shrink from participating in democratic discourse,” the chief justice added. ( [Politico](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kMFu8yAQhJ8G37BgsTE-cPjzR-4hUq9tjw7ghgZ7EeBYefuKqupltdr9NDOaeY3BL09NhhMBuHmbCQAR_wjApTu9v8rL2-VMP477Cz3LvjvqF_4TgPKM7g_9VWndOvtQr8O5sbqHhbPGaS6VFCCVkM1NcyWYBcON7RUsIJalH2frQLq5F5wNjdfAQDDJRi7ZwLvWwnUQA-9HxUbuRkU6Zl2-42Jxm4P9KmlfY2twbYK-lRLzT6aJwHQcRxsx-OINVoDAlAumJ4EJGJcEJlZH3mNyq6MG91QoPlwqe9oyveKVrsbitrkQMjWY0h6Lx40a3B7e1DVTgE4J0SRt4-FD8FkOpGOftYnq-R0AAP__EVdsVg) , 6/27/16)

**Smith Pursued A Case Against Democrat Sen. John Edwards, Which Resulted In A Hung Jury And Mistrial.** “The scheme was related to more than $900,000 going from backers of Edwards to Rielle Hunter, a filmmaker hired for his 2008 campaign and with whom he was having an extramarital affair. The money was allegedly used to help cover up the affair Edwards was having in 2008 as his wife, Elizabeth, was dying of cancer. The jury deadlocked in May 2012 after a five-week trial and more than a week of deliberations. Some officials inside the Justice Department reportedly had initial misgivings about the case before getting on board with the prosecution. After the mistrial loss, Smith said at the time that “our job is to look at the facts and then look at the law and apply the facts to the law.” The Justice Department soon announced it wouldn’t attempt to retry Edwards. Jurors said on TV after the trial that a majority didn’t think the DOJ had proved its case beyond a reasonable doubt and that the evidence simply wasn’t there, while a minority wanted to convict Edwards. ( [Washington Examiner](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kL-O4yAYxJ8Gd1jw2cG4cHG5yFdEuvZuS2Ig_hL-yWCRvP3Kq9W2Mz_NjEb55NC-JzKcCcCKOhMA0v0iANf-_P-vuP67XuhHff6hF3Hq6-HCbwJQ3sn8oN8prfEK3aEOl0ZPJ7CcNWbiQooOhOxEs079qLqRWyuACybFwrWQikuwFqTqhluDEzDomGAjF2zgfavhNnQDP42SjdyMkvRMm_yMVsegnH6UbfepXaJv3LSWkvLXppnAXGttq8orhnuJwbyUx2C2AyUwB1Mzgfmx54KLITDnZBZUji5xD9k4-lDLk2aPZaUeX0bTFXOJ25umfcs7hjtN0WHBBVXIzTbpVNE5zGIgPbsfTxxNnwEAAP__sGhvAA) , 6/5/23)
**Smith Convicted Republican Rep. Rick Renzi Before He Was Pardoned By President Trump In 2021.** “Smith’s unit did successfully prosecute Renzi, who was convicted in 2013 for extortion, bribery, insurance fraud, money laundering, and racketeering. clean_body: Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | ---|---|--- | | | | | ---|---|--- Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump June 8th, 2023 Top Takeaways \- From 2010 to 2015, Smith served under Obama Attorney General Eric Holder, leading the DOJ’s Public Integrity Section. \- After leaving the DOJ in 2015, Smith served as the first Assistant United States Attorney and Acting United States Attorney for The Middle District of Tennessee. \- Smith was instrumental in the DOJ’s Lois Lerner IRS scandal targeting conservative nonprofit groups. \- Smith convicted former Republican Virginia Governor Bob McDonnell, which was later unanimously overturned by the Supreme Court. \- In 2016, The Supreme Court overturned Bob McDonnell’s convictions unanimously 8-0. \- In November 2022, Bob McDonnell said regarding Jack Smith, “I think there's a real judgement problem." \- Smith pursued a case against Democrat Sen. John Edwards, which resulted in a hung jury and mistrial. \- Smith convicted Republican Rep. Rick Renzi before he was pardoned by President Trump in 2021. \- Smith attempted to prosecute Democrat Bob Menendez, but it resulted in a mistrial. \- This month, Rep. Jim Jordan launched a probe to conduct oversight over Special Counsel Jack Smith’s probe into former President Donald Trump for the handling of papers at Mar-A-Lago. \- Jack Smith is trying to hide who is on the team targeting President Trump. \- This month, Judicial Watch sued the Biden Justice Department for refusing to reveal names of special counsel Jack Smith’s staff. \- In November 2022, Jim Jordan revealed that Jack Smith tried to find ways to target conservatives during the Obama era and released a report in 2014. \- Jack Smith’s wife, Katy Chevigny, is a Biden donor. She produced a documentary about Michelle Obama, and worked on an anti-Citizens United film titled, “Dark Money.” \- Andrew Weissmann, former lead prosecutor and President Trump hater on special counsel Robert Muller’s team, has openly praised Jack Smith on Twitter. \- Deputy AG Lisa Monaco is a longtime Obama loyalist and an architect of the Russia collusion hoax. She is also handling January 6 related cases. Smith Previously Served Under Obama Attorney General Eric Holder, Leading The DOJ's Public Integrity Section From 2010 To 2015 From 2010 To 2015, Smith Served Under Obama Attorney General Eric Holder, Leading The DOJ's Public Integrity Section. “Smith served under Obama Attorney General Eric Holder, leading the DOJ's Public Integrity Section from 2010 to 2015. Smith led a team of 30 prosecutors in conducting public corruption cases throughout the United States, including a mixed track record of going after high-profile politicians. He also inserted the DOJ into what would become the Lois Lerner IRS scandal targeting conservative nonprofit groups during the Obama years, which Trump has criticized him for since he became special counsel.” ( , 6/5/23) Smith Was Appointed By Garland To Lead The Investigation Against President Trump. “Chevigny married Smith, who was appointed by Attorney General Merrick Garland last week to complete the Justice Department’s two investigations into former President Donald Trump and weigh potential criminal charges, in 2011. Garland appointed the veteran prosecutor in an effort to insulate the Justice Department from accusations of it not being impartial in its investigations now that the 76-year-old Trump has announced his 2024 candidacy. Trump is under investigation for his efforts to overturn the results of the 2020 elections and for his handling of classified presidential documents after his presidency.” ( , 11/23/22) After Leaving The DOJ In 2015, Smith Served As The First Assistant United States Attorney And Acting United States Attorney For The Middle District Of Tennessee. “After leaving the DOJ in 2015, Smith headed to Tennessee, where he served as the First Assistant United States Attorney and Acting United States Attorney for the Middle District of Tennessee.” ( , 11/18/22) Smith Was Instrumental In The DOJ’s Lois Lerner IRS Scandal Targeting Conservative Nonprofit Groups Lerner Led An IRS Effort Targeting Tea Party Groups And Similar Conservative Nonprofit Organizations And “Smith’s Push For DOJ Officials To Contact Lerner And The IRS In Order To Get The DOJ Involved Seemed To Be The Impetus Behind The IRS Sending The FBI Reams Of Nonprofit Tax Records.” “Lerner, director of the IRS's Exempt Organizations Unit, led an IRS effort targeting Tea Party groups and similar conservative nonprofit organizations. Smith’s push for DOJ officials to contact Lerner and the IRS in order to get the DOJ involved seemed to be the impetus behind the IRS sending the FBI reams of nonprofit tax records. An IRS watchdog and the DOJ later admitted the IRS committed wrongdoing, although not of the criminal variety. Lerner would apologize. Republicans unsuccessfully sought a special counsel to investigate the IRS scandal at the time, with Smith’s actions cited as one reason.” ( , 11/25/22) Jim Jordan: “Jack Smith Was Looking For Ways To Prosecute The Innocent Americans That Lois Lerner Targeted During The IRS Scandal.” “Jack Smith was looking for ways to prosecute the innocent Americans that Lois Lerner targeted during the IRS scandal,” Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH), expected to lead the House Judiciary Committee next year, told the Washington Examiner. Jordan and Rep. Darrell Issa (R-CA), who led House Oversight, sought Smith’s testimony in May 2014, saying, “It is apparent that the Department’s leadership, including Public Integrity Section Chief Jack Smith, was closely involved in engaging with the IRS.” Smith testified that month that he spoke with the FBI about these nonprofit groups. “We had a dialogue with the FBI. Never opened any investigations, Public Integrity [Unit] did not. But we did have a dialogue with them over time following this [Oct. 8, 2010, meeting with Lerner].” ( , 11/25/22) Jim Jordan: “The Fact That Richard Pilger And Jack Smith Had Interaction With Lois Lerner In 2010 And 2013, That You Had A Data Base Of 1.1 Million Pages Of Taxpayer Information, Donor (C)(4) Information, You Had It For Four Years, And Some Of That Information Was Confidential — All That Fact, All That Cries Out For A Special Prosecutor.” ( , 11/25/22) Lerner Admitted In 2013 That “We Made Some Mistakes. Some People Didn’t Use Good Judgment. ... For That We’re Apologetic.” “Lerner admitted in May 2013 the IRS had scrutinized nonprofit groups that used terms such as “Tea Party” or “patriots” in their applications but claimed it wasn’t a political decision, saying, “We made some mistakes. Some people didn’t use good judgment. ... For that we’re apologetic.” ( , 11/25/22) The Treasury Department’s Watchdog Concluded In 2013 That “The IRS Used Inappropriate Criteria That Identified For Review Tea Party And Other Organizations.” “The Treasury Department’s watchdog concluded in 2013 that “the IRS used inappropriate criteria that identified for review Tea Party and other organizations.” ( , 11/25/22) DOJ In 2015: “Our Investigation Uncovered Substantial Evidence Of Mismanagement, Poor Judgment, And Institutional Inertia." “The DOJ said in 2015: “Our investigation uncovered substantial evidence of mismanagement, poor judgment, and institutional inertia." ( , 11/25/22) In 2017, Jeff Sessions Announced That The DOJ Entered Into Settlements With Conservative Groups Targeted By The IRS During The Obama Administration And The IRS Admitted Its Actions Were Wrong And Also Issued An Apology. “Then-Attorney General Jeff Sessions announced in 2017 that the DOJ entered into settlements with conservative groups targeted by the IRS during the Obama administration. The IRS admitted its actions were “wrong” and “for such treatment, the IRS expresses its sincere apology.” ( , 11/25/22) Smith Has A History Of Targeting Republicans, While His Democrat Targets Have Received Mistrials Smith Convicted Former Republican Virginia Governor Bob McDonnell, Which Was Later Unanimously Overturned By The Supreme Court. “Smith’s DOJ biography in 2015 touted that while chief of the Public Integrity Section, Smith helped with the prosecution against McDonnell, who was indicted and convicted on federal corruption charges related to bribery in 2014. The case was being prosecuted by Smith’s deputy in the Public Integrity Section. McDonnell was investigated while governor, indicted shortly after leaving office in January 2014, convicted in September 2014, and sentenced to two years in prison in 2015. The Supreme Court unanimously overturned McDonnell’s conviction in the summer of 2016.” ( , 6/5/23) In 2016, The Supreme Court Overturned Bob McDonnell’s Convictions Unanimously 8-0, Ruling That Federal Prosecutors Relied On A “Boundless” Definition Of The Kinds Of Acts That Could Lead Politicians To Face Criminal Charges. “A unanimous Supreme Court has overturned the corruption convictions of former Virginia Gov. Bob McDonnell, ruling that federal prosecutors relied on a “boundless” definition of the kinds of acts that could lead politicians to face criminal charges. The decision from the eight-justice court could make it tougher for prosecutors to prove corruption cases against politicians in cases where there is no proof of an explicit agreement linking a campaign donation or gift to a contract, grant or vote.” ( , 6/27/16) Chief Justice Roberts Wrote, “There Is No Doubt That This Case Is Distasteful; It May Be Worse Than That. But Our Concern Is Not With Tawdry Tales Of Ferraris, Rolexes, And Ball Gowns. It Is Instead With The Broader Legal Implications Of The Government’s Boundless Interpretation Of The Federal Bribery Statute.” Adding, “A More Limited Interpretation Of The Term ‘Official Act’ Leaves Ample Room For Prosecuting Corruption, While Comporting With The Text Of The Statute And The Precedent Of This Court.” “The court’s opinion, written by Chief Justice John Roberts, rejected the government’s position that simply agreeing to meet with someone on account of such largesse could be enough to constitute an official act that could trigger a corruption conviction. “There is no doubt that this case is distasteful; it may be worse than that. But our concern is not with tawdry tales of Ferraris, Rolexes, and ball gowns. It is instead with the broader legal implications of the Government’s boundless interpretation of the federal bribery statute,” Roberts wrote. “A more limited interpretation of the term ‘official act’ leaves ample room for prosecuting corruption, while comporting with the text of the statute and the precedent of this Court.” ( , 6/27/16) Roberts Added, “The Government’s Position Could Cast A Pall Of Potential Prosecution Over These Relationships If The Union Had Given A Campaign Contribution In The Past Or The Homeowners Invited The Official To Join Them On Their Annual Outing To The Ballgame. Officials Might Wonder Whether They Could Respond To Even The Most Commonplace Requests For Assistance, And Citizens With Legitimate Concerns Might Shrink From Participating In Democratic Discourse.” “Conscientious public officials arrange meetings for constituents, contact other officials on their behalf, and include them in events all the time. The basic compact underlying representative government assumes that public officials will hear from their constituents and act appropriately on their concerns—whether it is the union official worried about a plant closing or the homeowners who wonder why it took five days to restore power to their neighborhood after a storm,” Roberts wrote. “The Government’s position could cast a pall of potential prosecution over these relationships if the union had given a campaign contribution in the past or the homeowners invited the official to join them on their annual outing to the ballgame. Officials might wonder whether they could respond to even the most commonplace requests for assistance, and citizens with legitimate concerns might shrink from participating in democratic discourse,” the chief justice added. ( , 6/27/16) In November 2022, Bob McDonnell Said Regarding Jack Smith, “I Think There's A Real Judgement Problem." ( , 11/22/22) Smith Pursued A Case Against Democrat Sen. John Edwards, Which Resulted In A Hung Jury And Mistrial. “The scheme was related to more than $900,000 going from backers of Edwards to Rielle Hunter, a filmmaker hired for his 2008 campaign and with whom he was having an extramarital affair. The money was allegedly used to help cover up the affair Edwards was having in 2008 as his wife, Elizabeth, was dying of cancer. The jury deadlocked in May 2012 after a five-week trial and more than a week of deliberations. Some officials inside the Justice Department reportedly had initial misgivings about the case before getting on board with the prosecution. After the mistrial loss, Smith said at the time that “our job is to look at the facts and then look at the law and apply the facts to the law.” The Justice Department soon announced it wouldn’t attempt to retry Edwards. Jurors said on TV after the trial that a majority didn’t think the DOJ had proved its case beyond a reasonable doubt and that the evidence simply wasn’t there, while a minority wanted to convict Edwards. ( , 6/5/23) Smith Convicted Republican Rep. Rick Renzi Before He Was Pardoned By President Trump In 2021. “Smith’s unit did successfully prosecute Renzi, who was convicted in 2013 for extortion, bribery, insurance fraud, money laundering, and racketeering. The DOJ said the evidence at trial showed the congressman “promised in 2005 to use his legislative influence to profit from a federal land exchange that involved property” owned by real estate investor James Sandlin. Renzi was convicted on 17 counts and sentenced to 36 months in prison in 2013. Trump pardoned Renzi on his final full day in office, before President Joe Biden’s inauguration, with the former congressman saying he had been “wrongly convicted by a Department of Justice that engaged in witness tampering, illegal wiretapping, and gross prosecutorial misconduct.” ( , 6/5/23) Smith Attempted To Prosecute Democrat Bob Menendez, But It Resulted In A Mistrial. “Smith also helped lead the investigation into Menendez, although he left his post just a few months before the Justice Department announced in April 2015 that it had indicted Menendez and Florida ophthalmologist Salomon Melgen in New Jersey “in connection with a bribery scheme in which Menendez allegedly accepted gifts from Melgen in exchange for using the power of his Senate office to benefit Melgen’s financial and personal interests.” “According to allegations in the indictment, between January 2006 and January 2013, Menendez accepted close to $1 million worth of lavish gifts and campaign contributions from Melgen in exchange for using the power of his Senate office to influence the outcome of ongoing contractual and Medicare billing disputes worth tens of millions of dollars to Melgen and to support the visa applications of several of Melgen’s girlfriends,” the Justice Department said at the time. Menendez pleaded not guilty, proclaimed his innocence, and said he and Melgen were just longtime friends. Following an 11-week trial, the federal judge overseeing the case declared a mistrial in November 2017 after the 12-person jury said it was deadlocked on the charges. One of the jurors told reporters that the jury was split 10-2 on all of the counts, with the large majority voting to acquit the senator. “The way this case started was wrong, the way it was investigated was wrong, the way it was prosecuted was wrong, and the way it was tried was wrong as well,” Menendez said outside the courtroom at the time.” ( , 6/5/23) This Month, Rep. Jim Jordan Launched A Probe To Conduct Oversight Over Jack Smith’s Probe Into Former President Donald Trump For The Handling Of Papers At Mar-A-Lago Jim Jordan Launched A Probe To Conduct Oversight Over Jack Smith’s Probe Into Former President Donald Trump For The Handling Of Papers At Mar-A-Lago. “House Judiciary Committee Chair Jim Jordan (R-OH) launched a probe to conduct oversight over Special Counsel Jack Smith’s probe into former President Donald Trump for the handling of papers at Mar-a-Lago. name: Katie Porter
subject: Didn't get the invite
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Jamie Dimon was back on Capitol Hill this week.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=24463%2E3422442%2EJWEbTL)
Derek, I wasn't invited to this meeting ⬇️
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230609-1-b?refcode=EMAI09_1_WLS_20230609_V2_F&refcode2=24463_3422442_JWEbTL&akid=24463%2E3422442%2EJWEbTL)
When Jamie Dimon came to Capitol Hill in 2019, I questioned him about the massive pay disparity between him and his bank's lowest wage workers. When I did the math, there was no way a single person here in Southern California could survive on the starting salary. **I asked him about it, and while he made $31 million, he couldn’t tell me how he would recommend his bank tellers make ends meet.**
Wall Street has enjoyed a close relationship with lawmakers for decades. And in exchange for campaign contributions, too many politicians have been all too eager to let Big Banks “regulate themselves,” take advantage of consumers, and make astronomical profits while paying little in taxes.
**I’m one of just a few lawmakers who doesn’t accept a dime from Big Bank CEOs like Jamie Dimon.** I’ll always stand up to Wall Street and executives who think they can cheat taxpayers, employees, and customers.
I’m running for the U.S. Senate to hold Wall Street accountable and our campaign is powered by the working people I’m running to represent. **[Can you make a donation today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230609-1-b?amount=3&refcode=EMAI09_1_WLS_20230609_V2_F&refcode2=24463_3422442_JWEbTL&akid=24463%2E3422442%2EJWEbTL)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230609-1-b?refcode=EMAI09_1_WLS_20230609_V2_F&refcode2=24463_3422442_JWEbTL&akid=24463%2E3422442%2EJWEbTL)**
Thanks!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAI09_1_WLS_20230609_V2_F&t=5&refcode2=24463_3422442_JWEbTL&akid=24463%2E3422442%2EJWEbTL)**

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Before we head into the weekend, I wanted to reach out personally to ask:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Team,
Yesterday, my team reached out to you about our big 10,000 donation milestone. Before we head into the weekend, I wanted to reach out personally to ask:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to help us reach our 10,000 donation goal before we head into the weekend?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jun23.F10pcU&refcode=em230609-1-t45&t=1&akid=4508%2E196590%2E7-SWQ3)
This is a huge milestone for this team. Because when I launched The Long Run in February, I wasn’t sure of the response we were going to get or if folks were still going to believe in our mission to bring progressive change to our country.
But this grassroots team surprised me over and over again. Once with the outpour of support we got when we launched, again when we helped Judge Janet win the Wisconsin Supreme Court Race, and more times over as we’ve kept our momentum going throughout this quarter.
So today, I am hoping you can step up to give your first contribution today and bring our movement to heights no one thought we could reach this early in the cycle.
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to our movement and help us reach our 10,000 individual contribution goal?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jun23.F10pcU&refcode=em230609-1-t45&t=2&akid=4508%2E196590%2E7-SWQ3)

[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-jun23.OkZxWE&refcode=em230609-1-t45&t=24&akid=4508%2E196590%2E7-SWQ3)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-jun23.iH2dpA&refcode=em230609-1-t45&t=25&akid=4508%2E196590%2E7-SWQ3)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jun23.F10pcU&refcode=em230609-1-t45&t=26&akid=4508%2E196590%2E7-SWQ3)
When we hit that 10,000 goal, the country will know _just how powerful_ our movement is. The press, pundits, and naysayers will see how people around the country stepped up to support races big and small to protect our democracy. They will know what strength a team of grassroots donors and supporters brings. And they will watch us continue to make a big impact throughout this upcoming election cycle.
Thank you for being a part of this team, and our powerful movement.
Mandela

|

Peter,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.**

**I am in Washington to fight for YOU**. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, **this fight has put a HUGE target on my back** , a target that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, **[which is why I am reaching out- I need your help today](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5b31cd9463414bfab80db1d46f4b6bd9&_e=rCBgrP1YXAAJ98-IUB7eWd63f_jZOYqCaXqHIQTdVDeHZPP2yYc7EFR-mqtL3mKsl9QKOUMf84a4yKfEwLm2UKw_U8vxiJF8gHRBjWRGIak-w6H9OLCUMvEaGCFCj9UFfqGPycTmHGdjUdMvVabHisGJUJFpKC57hSi4IgR_OO5dsZPMG5zi8WwkohzEO4J_NbovXD2cIsH-rRn_xxedLmtta5sFddPUL0sDnpxyGCoMkn-o-Il_UWcvsANIxRcw3YstcYqcDyYTyDuGjEmBqGmJmgsYwDnD1hqPKGB3Hjwjeyx-rqCXbVDih7nZVB5LrEF7J-HCDJIWiB6UvSK8b9tIZW2X07ofDU7-gNj_pqk-DhavKCHhXJ9igo_FbTe3CWXja8ynfSxHf78ApopcCDL9QY1CyF2ILbsLQTEZMwzELXubglcE81gI7DLofQKDWSN0mHKjxSWuIbunXKc_iQ%3D%3D)**.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ac0232a87284d35aa3989513234590f&_e=BurbMRLYDuaIys2LGXVn_rQYSM9JfTIr7mdtmbiOOXNPLBq-6IWP48zzSnWRoW0XPMEvs14XQCWpe4R09n8_vckh8ThE7yDkkrQhlRewqgBD1nww9pBfBSAyZ-P9gL8a-ZLFIpRAJHtbG-vSnCL_JdN7n8cJtqL31K2RBceCAKnOYNFuqfyqYUppVRg8rSGlk41HEyExTh_kj6lcdvrWsfcIaBGENjQmDiYmM5kaLsCEJ_GWBJ2HbXLRPTAdSkXeaRbrfXUSUFFEJeFLFsQuDlDHJynz5VcK1ZEPkZVYV74%3D)
