_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ac0232a87284d35aa3989513234590f&_e=BurbMRLYDuaIys2LGXVn_rQYSM9JfTIr7mdtmbiOOXNPLBq-6IWP48zzSnWRoW0XPMEvs14XQCWpe4R09n8_vckh8ThE7yDkkrQhlRewqgBD1nww9pBfBSAyZ-P9gL8a-ZLFIpRAJHtbG-vSnCL_JXePPiv4lJ4pQFh2yKelAgJ4DMixMbU7TMT53_LLKZr9UwTyKvs7s7hAW36RnlbOInDC0__p4JipjB5Qes2ZCtUiGgPj10Rua2MUr5xKtsOtmhQN1u-pGIhvzt6CiOVwgyHPK7GSw73dlJX0sKLiSos%3D)
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ac0232a87284d35aa3989513234590f&_e=BurbMRLYDuaIys2LGXVn_rQYSM9JfTIr7mdtmbiOOXNPLBq-6IWP48zzSnWRoW0XPMEvs14XQCWpe4R09n8_vckh8ThE7yDkkrQhlRewqgBD1nww9pBfBSAyZ-P9gL8a-ZLFIpRAJHtbG-vSnCL_JfkEERPXDUDArM7Vwr4g_FyNBrnUol5MPZcmD7OOezmni6mBj9Du8RtKsTNdT--gAz1StiDZu5dSwPEfiATHTmFoePSzaGpWZWTe9RcKgjqxh20_Zf0nR6KJuTei-xIurJ3kqciT33upsqVSbOIN4VM%3D)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ac0232a87284d35aa3989513234590f&_e=BurbMRLYDuaIys2LGXVn_rQYSM9JfTIr7mdtmbiOOXNPLBq-6IWP48zzSnWRoW0XPMEvs14XQCWpe4R09n8_vckh8ThE7yDkkrQhlRewqgBD1nww9pBfBSAyZ-P9gL8a-ZLFIpRAJHtbG-vSnCL_JTLox9jp3FQM3To8pJi1-ZdHEOeXDAnKVIUIh-zBBmOlxzXUAb_-Y-i8Nt61D6x6pIvaT0HeyqxcBv06qiiIuwSgwWBtm3q0cdf5myuKf5FW7VhpuSBtZS7xsUHR4GuRJHcJSVHTkag64OtsonZl3Bs%3D) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ac0232a87284d35aa3989513234590f&_e=BurbMRLYDuaIys2LGXVn_rQYSM9JfTIr7mdtmbiOOXNPLBq-6IWP48zzSnWRoW0XPMEvs14XQCWpe4R09n8_vckh8ThE7yDkkrQhlRewqgBD1nww9pBfBSAyZ-P9gL8a-ZLFIpRAJHtbG-vSnCL_JTgFRHPfrmmKNei0f3KPzOZnTUp2l3j-VPY5EIk-vxCk29oodnE3yfCfG7NUqYe99ttCI_X8xkWx_DKd5kfH8yl-mmfJC7XmsUoXTjTca5dSmfnJI-RbJBG9gAnbqb14_udQvRTaqY89Kr_m0c1haI8%3D)

In states across the country, these kids are being attacked by legislators and politicians—with both words and harmful new laws.

Here’s what I know: I will stand up for trans kids today, because they are the ones being attacked—I will not stop fighting, even if it’s not the popular or politically expedient thing to do.

And whoever the next target by dangerous, unhinged political forces is, I will stand up for them too. Because I am a scientist and a doctor, but more importantly because my default mode is compassion and empathy.

Look, I’ve been attacked by my former political opponent and current representative in Congress on this very subject. Here’s what those attacks amounted to: scare tactics to bring out the extremist members of her base.

The GOP does not care about transgender people, transgender kids, or gender-affirming care. They care about winning elections. They understand the political power of “othering” the most vulnerable in society, and, right now, that is trans kids.

clean_body: | | | If you'd like to unsubscribe, | | Earlier this week I wrote to you asking for your support for trans kids this Pride. In states across the country, these kids are being attacked by legislators and politicians—with both words and harmful new laws. Here’s what I know: I will stand up for trans kids today, because they are the ones being attacked—I will not stop fighting, even if it’s not the popular or politically expedient thing to do. And whoever the next target by dangerous, unhinged political forces is, I will stand up for them too. Because I am a scientist and a doctor, but more importantly because my default mode is compassion and empathy. Look, I’ve been attacked by my former political opponent and current representative in Congress on this very subject. Here’s what those attacks amounted to: scare tactics to bring out the extremist members of her base. The GOP does not care about transgender people, transgender kids, or gender-affirming care. They care about winning elections. They understand the political power of “othering” the most vulnerable in society, and, right now, that is trans kids. ** | | Have a good weekend, Annie | | PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE PAC If you need to you can unsubscribe by . | | Sent via . It’s about time we stop putting Donald Trump ahead of the interests of our party and our country. – he’s the man who cost Republicans, conservatives, and all commonsense Americans the White House in 2020, and the Senate in 2022.
Chris Christie, who has a proven track record of calling Trump out, is the man for the job.
But the only way he’s going to be able to call him out for all Republicans to see is on the Presidential debate stage...
And the only way to get on the stage is to amass 40,000 unique donors.
There’s no way around this rule – it’s an official rule, set by the Republican National Committee.

The good news is, you don’t have to give much – even just $1 gets the job done!
But the bad news is, we’re in a time crunch with less than 50 days to reach our goal – and so no matter what you’re able to spare, the most important thing is that you give as soon as possible.

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

clean_body: | | | | The proof is in the headlines. | The Official Super PAC Supporting Chris Christie for President Friend, Chris Christie doesn’t back down from bullies - he confronts them head on. For the past few years, too many politicians have been afraid to offend him even in the slightest - that’s not Christie. Unafraid and bold, Christie has been standing up to Trump, calling out his flawed character and lies. Check out the headlines for yourself: It’s about time we stop putting Donald Trump ahead of the interests of our party and our country. – he’s the man who cost Republicans, conservatives, and all commonsense Americans the White House in 2020, and the Senate in 2022. Chris Christie, who has a proven track record of calling Trump out, is the man for the job. But the only way he’s going to be able to call him out for all Republicans to see is on the Presidential debate stage... And the only way to get on the stage is to amass 40,000 unique donors. There’s no way around this rule – it’s an official rule, set by the Republican National Committee. The good news is, you don’t have to give much – even just $1 gets the job done! But the bad news is, we’re in a time crunch with less than 50 days to reach our goal – and so no matter what you’re able to spare, the most important thing is that you give as soon as possible. | | | | | | Thank you, Mike Press Team Tell It Like It Is PAC | Why Chris Christie: Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. name: Ro Khanna
subject: Tell Congress: Pass the Equality Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Everyone, no matter who they are or who they love, deserves to be their true selves. But state legislatures across the country have introduced hundreds of bills [https://www.hrc.org/campaigns/the-state-legislative-attack-on-lgbtq-people] in 2023 attacking the very existence of the LGBTQIA+ community, particularly trans youth. As it stands, there are no federal statutes explicitly protecting LGBTQIA+ individuals from discrimination.

As a member of both the Congressional LGBTQ Equality Caucus and the Transgender Equality Task Force, I work hard every day to end workplace discrimination, school bullying, healthcare disparities, and other barriers that stand in the way of the LGBTQIA+ communtiy’s well-being. That’s why I support the Equality Act, to make sure that everyone, regardless of their gender identity or sexual orientation, can live their life fully, without fear of discrimination.

Tell Congress: Pass the Equality Act. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-to-congress-outlaw-discrimination-against-the-lgbtq-community-pass-the-equality-act-4?source=2023EqualityAct_RK&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdk-equality-act-petition-swap]

The Equality Act is the only legislation that explicitly protects LGBTQIA+ individuals from discrimination in a wide variety of settings, including:

* Healthcare
* Education
* Employment
* Housing
*Family planning

The rights of LGBTQIA+ Americans cannot be left up to state legislatures. The comprehensive protections enshrined in the Equality Act are necessary to safeguard the LGBTQIA+ community from discrimination.

This Pride Month, let’s uplift the LGBTQIA+ community and urge Congress to pass the Equality Act. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-to-congress-outlaw-discrimination-against-the-lgbtq-community-pass-the-equality-act-4?source=2023EqualityAct_RK&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdk-equality-act-petition-swap]

Onward,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ngp-email-footer?refcode=20230609-equality-act]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20WAGOP?=
subject: Take our Washington State Presidential Preference Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Select your pick(s) NOW!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

body:
This Pride Month...| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64584095/410566126/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjVhMWMyZi1lODA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LygXBJg7HvNIiOLgSEQJM9WBcf5ndF2A3HffPbUXOeE=&emci=a96ba343-fe05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8f5a1c2f-e806-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1486204)
---
| | Peter, This Pride Month, we joyously celebrate the dynamic, diverse, and cherished LGBTQ+ communities across Wisconsin and America. And I am proud to continue the treasured tradition of marching in Pride parades! But while we revel in our accomplishments, let us not forget that we must persist in our call for action. So far this year alone, over 520 anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced nationwide, including more than 220 bills that specifically target the rights of the transgender community, including our friends and family members. Such an outrageous wave of discrimination reminds us of the imperative to guarantee equal rights and protections for _everyone_. [**Therefore, we must fight harder and louder for equality and justice for all members of our LGBTQ+ family – not just in Congress, but in every community across the nation. Chip in to help me keep up the fight!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64584096/410566127/-2143774832?refcode=0608&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjVhMWMyZi1lODA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LygXBJg7HvNIiOLgSEQJM9WBcf5ndF2A3HffPbUXOeE=)

Together, #WeRepresent everyone!

Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender
---
|
---
The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

clean_body: This Pride Month...| | | | | Peter, This Pride Month, we joyously celebrate the dynamic, diverse, and cherished LGBTQ+ communities across Wisconsin and America. And I am proud to continue the treasured tradition of marching in Pride parades! But while we revel in our accomplishments, let us not forget that we must persist in our call for action. So far this year alone, over 520 anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced nationwide, including more than 220 bills that specifically target the rights of the transgender community, including our friends and family members. Such an outrageous wave of discrimination reminds us of the imperative to guarantee equal rights and protections for everyone. = = Together, #WeRepresent everyone! | | Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender | The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92. = | | | =| =| = ---|---|--- Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress P.O. | | Peter, **My brother Nick has always been by my side**. Sure, when we were young, it was maybe because he forced me to play with him, but recently it's been because he's got my back. **We walked side-by-side in the Pride Parade in West Hollywood soon after I came out over 10 years ago.** **And when my husband and I got married, Nick was my best man.** **** Nick has always accepted and loved me for who I am. **I wish every LGBTQ+ person could have had Nick as a brother — but electing him as our Congressman is the next best option.** June is Pride Month, when we're encouraged to celebrate and when corporations turn their logos into rainbow flags, without much recognition of what it means. We know that this month is only possible because of the decades of advocacy, from Stonewall to Harvey Milk to Edie Windsor, and we must stay vigilant as we face the radical rollback of rights around the country. We can trust that Nick will be a fierce advocate for the LGBTQ+ community. Just this week, on the heels of an act of hate with the burning of a Pride flag outside an elementary school, he brought a resolution ensuring that the nation's second largest school district affirms their support for LGBTQ+ students and families. In passing the resolution, Nick said that "schools make our kids' worlds bigger, and that's what scares a lot of intolerant people, they want the world to be small. But we have a responsibility to prepare students for the realities of the world they live in. And it's a world that includes different types of families and people, and that's what makes it so wonderful and beautiful. And that's what we'll teach and celebrate not just in June but all year." **As Congressman, Nick will always be a vocal supporter of LGBTQ+ rights, and his words will continue to be backed up with action.** There's no one I'd rather have fighting for what's right than my brother. _Charlie_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: My debt ceiling vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
D.C. must stop making policy this way. | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64585130/410569877/-730477937?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230608debtceiling_gv_actives_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjEyZDliMS1lYTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Qy8Os9FESVdVWrZBT6MVE4A5I2psXIJTyYXGg-anJI=)
---
Last week, I had to cut my district visit short and hop on a plane back to D.C. to vote on the debt ceiling bill before extremist Republicans caused a global economic crisis.
This bill is far from perfect, but the alternative of defaulting was not an option.
I want to be clear: There are things I disagree with in this bill that out-of-touch Republicans insisted on. Namely – making it harder for New Mexicans to put food on the table by restricting access to the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program, limiting renewable energy development that would create jobs in our state, and giveaways to fossil fuel corporations.
At the end of the day, we were able to protect veterans' health care, Medicare, and Social Security from $130 billion in cuts that would have hurt countless working families if we didn’t reach a deal.
**But D.C. must __stop__ making policy this way.** We shouldn’t have to be on the brink of disaster for Democrats and Republicans to work together.
**I’m trying to show my colleagues there’s another way to lead.** I’ve worked across the aisle to introduce bipartisan bills to address opioid trafficking at the border, increase investments in our regional airports, support ranchers who have lost cattle, and reform the H-2A visa so New Mexico farmers have employees and workers have fair wages and adequate housing conditions.
We _can_ work together to deliver for our constituents. But it’s going to take a major culture shift in Congress — I’m pushing for change, but I could use your help. [**I’m up for re-election in 2024 in a TOSS UP race against a far-right extremist who doesn’t believe in bipartisanship. Can you help me protect this seat by donating today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64585131/410569878/-730477937?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230608debtceiling_gv_actives_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjEyZDliMS1lYTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Qy8Os9FESVdVWrZBT6MVE4A5I2psXIJTyYXGg-anJI=)

clean_body: D.C. must stop making policy this way. | | = Last week, I had to cut my district visit short and hop on a plane back to D.C. to vote on the debt ceiling bill before extremist Republicans caused a global economic crisis. This bill is far from perfect, but the alternative of defaulting was not an option. I want to be clear: There are things I disagree with in this bill that out-of-touch Republicans insisted on. Namely – making it harder for New Mexicans to put food on the table by restricting access to the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program, limiting renewable energy development that would create jobs in our state, and giveaways to fossil fuel corporations. At the end of the day, we were able to protect veterans' health care, Medicare, and Social Security from $130 billion in cuts that would have hurt countless working families if we didn’t reach a deal. But D.C. must stop making policy this way. We shouldn’t have to be on the brink of disaster for Democrats and Republicans to work together. I’m trying to show my colleagues there’s another way to lead. I’ve worked across the aisle to introduce bipartisan bills to address opioid trafficking at the border, increase investments in our regional airports, support ranchers who have lost cattle, and reform the H-2A visa so New Mexico farmers have employees and workers have fair wages and adequate housing conditions. We can work together to deliver for our constituents. But it’s going to take a major culture shift in Congress — I’m pushing for change, but I could use your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for listening, and for being the change you want to see in the world. Sincerely, Gabe Vasquez | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

clean_body: Biden’s DOJ has launched another despicable witch hunt. | Friend, Yesterday, President Trump was informed that he will be indicted by Biden’s DOJ. That happened on the EXACT SAME DAY that members of the House Oversight Committee were finally granted access to review FBI documents tying Joe Biden to a $5 million bribery scheme with a foreign national. Coincidence? You don’t still believe those exist under this administration, do you? Biden, Garland, and this entire administration have become drunk with power, and they will pursue every avenue available to them to destroy President Trump. Even if it means taking an open flame to the Constitution! Remember, it was Joe Biden who was illegally in possession of numerous boxes of classified material he obtained both as a Senator, and as Vice President. Material that he had no ability to declassify. Yet President Trump is the one being indicted by the DOJ! Talk about a double standard... This blatant election interference persists because the Biden Administration and their radical Left-wing backers are terrified of President Trump, Friend. He represents an existential threat to the status quo, a system that has failed America, and to the most unpopular, unqualified, and unfit President to hold this office in a century. Unlike the vast majority of politicians, he fights for the American people – something that disgusts the corrupt establishment in Washington. But WE THE PEOPLE will not be deterred, we will not be fooled, and we will continue to stand firm in support of the man who has sacrificed everything to restore our nation to the glory she deserves. This is yet another soiled chapter in the great American decline, but it's always darkest before the dawn, and the dawn is coming. True Americans will NEVER SURRENDER to this tyranny. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Congressman (TX-38) U.S. Army Captain Paid for by Hunt for Congress. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eca2ccca9770407ebba15ea124072f93&_e=lWWsZUWMt60EUH58GQPkZEj8A0gKnd5Js9xJMnt84gViCff6ewc0sHk9whSH4OqTMtQeOWF3VFIQids3yqengg3FW65z7DVOEamQSErt27vRPYQQvDXlfQLd9dp3BddY3XZ3LWMG5umpUC9VjTvhNga-vJf32j7XQa9uglBZY3TqMVlq5fC9UzgQxX09TSMA9ZeNleHDwGGnyP3NxmQUNF4k3JkXgBBSj_1txMkuZmnKGxoSghdC2_BN8czzg1HlURWK_NEQucZIJ9zV-ApaXuneWGZGap8jvQQEMQw12jP30rcTps_wXfZuqqB1tWiBUSZWqrMNaKumV3R8y95byFSqebH7M8PxwRwBv6rcymGdRvPSCHVZONhPTiIXeuVJUnTDCbvYo1kZzTPiTzIkqGE4CLycHcpMjtVBJtYwUbM%3D)

---

| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eca2ccca9770407ebba15ea124072f93&_e=lWWsZUWMt60EUH58GQPkZH8Ef-oW1AoCdUHqAbtI2IMG9y_VxFlo5U6QaSio_Dra99jpCxSFIH21U6CFZLvZG3IbcdgoUw7xhjWxDp8pSeGGXxU8bMMoekvFOd-mwZTXmifNlsW7-RSmJ7Kf_qOy0ky-9HWQ0cBTBgJHYE6RGaMvkEoRGu-Bw11tHrW7EgOSARZoDOCSVi0UM8dk-ohyrdsfrm7lJ_8pWEuvZeIFlqw%3D)| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eca2ccca9770407ebba15ea124072f93&_e=lWWsZUWMt60EUH58GQPkZJeL9ox3zmwjh0yTkyW4IS8B-S0DxBxNImqkYL7LwC3DgtA-r0ByEosM-BRdM603_KPHlLY4soOVPtAcCg3Bfi8XGRRV_tITjvsfKUcJav-ej2iARSalKBNVVd2xZEYyLH494vSTTKp_ehtGMADiFRmoKgsQCGOpIKoHWMkYVC5TmCN8IBtKyxppkNNg0_TVUw%3D%3D)| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eca2ccca9770407ebba15ea124072f93&_e=lWWsZUWMt60EUH58GQPkZL5gH8uouvkJ-HiV1-SKXNG57Gc6K49mPVJCzt_7yFcrrm3JsCVX2kXVWuBh8wGjof38qxxmDpm3q8fQjOBfdvHmwJ4k-fJ3pjCd8x07f5HSJJVddBYeMlw0qNiOKRxd4UHSTcjI6Ls-4yW7cGRrZTts4tBTEwpiHqcelG3vHKqOEW5_6Q10XlwzNdrRWFRKCzuUujhydDHfREPdadeQ7C8%3D)

body:

| | |
---
| | | [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ca497a549edd443583c34e7a0752dff6&_e=lYSqK36f7K0qskrGN-D4IXOUKnXjVJ-CQNt0SaQb6WnOLhzLzv5QeTIMokrAEyC7iC2eeER9B_-hiebJBGbbCdsWhZ8XYnu6odh7lbsMfBg4-J1_dipBgjcIPbgq7PbNjVcp4iLP7ZwkYK3Y34UWmnypG_JyADYDRkkolQVxVoj4no6M6zvNJ3aYxGx48GYAt4vKcEgvxVK8FodoTDtDqfc3pZAaYVsOlO4BeWJFpC0MAQWUZxmtU_fNceA8GckEYzIX64fpNIlX9fwXLUSIxQ%3D%3D)

|
# $1 for 1 Debate
---
|
---
| | |
---
| You deserve to hear ALL the voices in the Republican debates later this summer. Right now, you're only going to hear from a select few candidates. That is because the RNC is expected to institute both polling and fundraising benchmarks to guarantee candidates an opportunity to be on the debate stage. [**We are hitting our polling numbers but are falling behind in our donation requirements. A donation of even $1 or more will help me get onto the debate state. Please contribute to help me reach that goal.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ca497a549edd443583c34e7a0752dff6&_e=lYSqK36f7K0qskrGN-D4IXOUKnXjVJ-CQNt0SaQb6WnOLhzLzv5QeTIMokrAEyC7iC2eeER9B_-hiebJBGbbCdsWhZ8XYnu6odh7lbsMfBg4-J1_dipBgjcIPbgq7PbNMsGiauMaOmClft0rGw6d8l-oTgbYKxFvPMdx-pJRrZl24e-Rn3rZTZQ3YzfRxXV2JLbO_l5GpmzIZq1b46-lowQmYw5iD9VO_mu9uOBLJekKBXiDvEPPrOYLMfaFRX2wfXFRixkSQ6mBTRecvPzFmA%3D%3D) I've spent years commentating on conservative politics, written books about American life and even stood up against Gavin Newsom in California. I want to continue to spread my message on the presidential debate stage later this year **But I can 't do that if I do not qualify. ** [**So please, contribute $1 or more to my campaign TODAY, so I can get on track to hit the requirements necessary to make it to the first Republican debate.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ca497a549edd443583c34e7a0752dff6&_e=lYSqK36f7K0qskrGN-D4IXOUKnXjVJ-CQNt0SaQb6WnOLhzLzv5QeTIMokrAEyC7iC2eeER9B_-hiebJBGbbCdsWhZ8XYnu6odh7lbsMfBg4-J1_dipBgjcIPbgq7PbNpfKVpWTVolNARY_xYVPLXYfmo1WaLj4thtxBHG-Kbnx_i_aRra65MgYUgg8icXROCl2D3__9oCX7CA0jFHKx1dUKVV1g9gBZeX9L04o06VVnRCle2zMxq7-ctfAMfAZ64jBNZa9As7gIe69AwbKJ8g%3D%3D)**** $1 for one debate, that is all I need today. Thank you, **Larry Elder

clean_body: $1 will get me on the debate stage! | | | | | | | $1 for 1 Debate | | | | | You deserve to hear ALL the voices in the Republican debates later this summer. Right now, you're only going to hear from a select few candidates. That is because the RNC is expected to institute both polling and fundraising benchmarks to guarantee candidates an opportunity to be on the debate stage. I've spent years commentating on conservative politics, written books about American life and even stood up against Gavin Newsom in California. I want to continue to spread my message on the presidential debate stage later this year But I can 't do that if I do not qualify. ** $1 for one debate, that is all I need today. Thank you, Larry Elder Republican Candidate for President | "CONTRIBUTE NOW →" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24 | 650 Town Center Drive, Suite 1500 Costa Mesa, CA 92626 USA |UNSUBSCRIBE|* Copyright(C) 2023 , All rights reserved. name: =?utf-8?Q?GNGP?=
subject: Meet the Candidates! June 14- 7PM zoom!
body:
Read for even more upcoming events.

** We've Got Candidates for 2023!
------------------------------------------------------------

** JUNE 14 GNGHP MEETING -Weds 7PM
Please join by Zoom for this important meeting!
------------------------------------------------------------

** AGENDA
------------------------------------------------------------
1. Meet David Agosta, candidate for Mayor of New Haven!
2.. Meet Jordan Werme, candidate for Town Council in East Hampton!
3. Approve Bylaws and Hold Officer Elections.
4. Treasurer's Report
5. Recent Events
6. Upcoming Events and Plans (including June Social Event)

** REGISTER HERE (https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZcscuigqjkrGdGl9Vf0x0Godup8SoJcb8eq)
------------------------------------------------------------

** Past Events
------------------------------------------------------------

** Our table at the Q-River Fest was a success - our Mayoral Candidate got to speak to several locals including some who want to volunteer for the campaign.
------------------------------------------------------------

** Upcoming Events
------------------------------------------------------------

** Sunday 6/11 - 1PM on the New Haven Green!

GNHGP will be represented in the speaker lineup! Justin Paglino (chair) will introduce David Agosta (New Haven Mayoral Candidate! Come join (https://www.facebook.com/brian.donahue.9465/posts/pfbid0fuLWsCrPUFgNGzKwnaCCMBxxb5ybr2ToKXaUtk6u29BDKnxHExWoqNFWiaa1Eu4yl) us!!
------------------------------------------------------------

https://guilfordlandtrust.org/articles/annual-meeting-june-11th-at-400/?fbclid=IwAR315Xl44jS-Q_5sfjJCdgJq_jAADV4KLUMhjKenkbcGg6FpXa4MC8NC2N4

** Sunday 6/11 - 4PM Guilford. Bishop's Orchards, Little Red Barn- a discussion of Sea Level Rise on the shoreline!
------------------------------------------------------------
Author Patrick J. Lynch will discuss "“What Does Sea Level Rise Look Like on a Familiar Shoreline?” Click here (https://guilfordlandtrust.org/articles/annual-meeting-june-11th-at-400/?fbclid=IwAR0g95zr5eV8_fWY6VBI72uzB-sLXdYecvlutmq_1NOMc26VhZX8QLHLKyY) .

** We are the Party of People, Planet, and Peace!
------------------------------------------------------------

** The need for an independent left party is clear. We are an ecosocialist peace party who fight for social, economic, electoral, and environmental justice. Come to our meetings and events to meet us and get involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
The Greater New Haven Green Party is a chapter
of the Green Party of Connecticut!
Find our chapter Bylaws HERE (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1RdZ-DjmwN76_XrktMoS83csmQ4zukzDZ?usp=share_link) .
Read minutes of our past meetings HERE (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1QeCwDL4ybnWA2GIhE2ka7_6s2PFjsYo-?usp=sharing) .
Follow us on Facebook HERE (https://www.facebook.com/GreaterNewHavenGreenParty) .
Follow us on Twitter HERE (https://twitter.com/nhvGreens) .

============================================================
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/profile?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=926d0d6192)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=926d0d6192)
.

subject: A View from the Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d5aa86884c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Throughout my campaign for Governor, I have been blessed to meet and share my vision for Indiana with Hoosiers. We are hitting the ground running with so much support across the state. This week, I am honored to share five endorsements I received...
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d5aa86884c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"Indiana needs a decisive leader who has the ability to lead our state on day one. Suzanne Crouch's expansive experience in local and state government has prepared her to govern our state in order to ensure that Hoosiers are thriving and businesses are growing for the betterment of our children's and grandchildren's future."
State Senator Liz Brown, SD-15
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d5aa86884c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"As a former Congressman, Indiana State Representative and State Senator, I know what it takes to be a leader. I wholeheartedly support and endorse Suzanne Crouch as our next Governor. She has the passion, commitment, courage and experience to deliver results for Hoosier families and businesses."
Dan Burton, Former Congressman, IN-6/IN-5
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d5aa86884c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"As a former Marion County GOP Chairman and City Councilman, I recognize and appreciate Suzanne's experience from the local courthouse to our statehouse. Her experience at many different levels and capacities has given her the knowledge, skills and vision to govern our state. As an advocate of transparency in government, I appreciate that we will be able to trust her to look out for the best interests of Hoosiers rather than seeking personal gain. I am pleased to endorse Suzanne Crouch to be our next Governor."
Michael McQuillen,
Former Marion County GOP Chairman & Indianapolis City Councilman
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d5aa86884c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"I’ve known and worked with Suzanne Crouch for nearly 25 years. Her public service has always been to benefit the people and serve with integrity. I fully support her election to lead Indiana as our first female Governor."
Tom Wyss, Former State Senator, SD-15
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d5aa86884c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"I am honored to endorse Suzanne Crouch for Governor. Not only is Suzanne paving the way for conservative women everywhere, she is doing it with grace and dignity. She is approachable and transparent. Her passion for improving the mental health of our citizens is commendable and needed. Her accolades are many, and her experience is unmatched. I am so excited to see Indiana’s future with Suzanne at the helm."
County Councilwoman Polly Chesser, Owen County
https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-suzanne-crouch/web?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d5aa86884c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT!

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Major corporations want our kids working in dangerous meatpacking facilities and construction sites
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Both the Labor and Justice Departments can and must sue the state of Iowa and other states that are rolling back laws meant to protect our children from unsafe work conditions. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvPpEcIw2pfy3l_OFlP1CIfLzAUaCgWRzQJ_w7V07mejPpE2pRiYz52bnZ1Y3g96O2z6oVx1xkDRuYiPbZmrRAuzqJ0JYgpvTapfTAi1rGJDfAAGIDAkx6sqBVjs1pVNLSvurdG3SfMAXEeEFy4fY-rtw63EdwJAAeabqRI1eXLsRcJKSMOa4TYCrLWHmvvI1FYpyb2XcxU7YyjIW2MaVLfvvLncC7nmMiwwwZ-TGdumPSmC2qKAYYI99aHVm9vFG9PCQBpXsy-cYNpsOdJZj8KikxKAAbXc5Fc9M1r7SH7E4/3ww/ChZJEzNXTPKDlaOQPujBKg/h0/K_nRZSBN4CTMiOyX75FyRJiBw_WZ1RbPZOMFQvILVMc)

Friend, Across the country, workers are rising up demanding fair pay with benefits. But instead of paying workers fair wages, greedy corporations are instead weakening child labor laws. Why? Because corporations can pay children less than average workers, thus exploiting young people in the workplace and driving down wages for all workers. **Iowa’s Republican governor recently signed into law one of the most exploitative roll backs of child labor laws we’ve seen in decades.** When journalists asked one Iowa lobbyist who was behind this bill, he responded, “The bill was really spearheaded by the Restaurant Association.”1 Restaurants are particularly eager to hire kids because they will work for lower wages and are less likely to question unsafe working conditions. But they’re not alone. There are more. **27 major corporations including PepsiCo, General Mills, Frito Lay, and Cargill, which have all been accused of exploiting children workers, are also lobbying to weaken the very rules they are already breaking.** 2 The U.S. Department of Labor has already found multiple instances where the Iowa law conflicts with federal law, such as expanding hours that children can work both during the school year and during their summer vacations. **But these corporations also want to allow kids into ultra-dangerous meatpacking facilities, high-volume Pepsi bottling plants, and building demolition and construction sites where more than 5,000 workers died last year.** We demand action to protect our kids from greedy, exploitative corporations. [**Both the Labor and Justice Departments can and must sue the state of Iowa and other states that are rolling back laws meant to protect our children from unsafe work conditions. clean_body: Both the Labor and Justice Departments can and must sue the state of Iowa and other states that are rolling back laws meant to protect our children from unsafe work conditions. | | | Friend, Across the country, workers are rising up demanding fair pay with benefits. But instead of paying workers fair wages, greedy corporations are instead weakening child labor laws. Why? Because corporations can pay children less than average workers, thus exploiting young people in the workplace and driving down wages for all workers. Iowa’s Republican governor recently signed into law one of the most exploitative roll backs of child labor laws we’ve seen in decades. When journalists asked one Iowa lobbyist who was behind this bill, he responded, “The bill was really spearheaded by the Restaurant Association.”1 Restaurants are particularly eager to hire kids because they will work for lower wages and are less likely to question unsafe working conditions. But they’re not alone. There are more. 27 major corporations including PepsiCo, General Mills, Frito Lay, and Cargill, which have all been accused of exploiting children workers, are also lobbying to weaken the very rules they are already breaking. 2 The U.S. Department of Labor has already found multiple instances where the Iowa law conflicts with federal law, such as expanding hours that children can work both during the school year and during their summer vacations. But these corporations also want to allow kids into ultra-dangerous meatpacking facilities, high-volume Pepsi bottling plants, and building demolition and construction sites where more than 5,000 workers died last year. We demand action to protect our kids from greedy, exploitative corporations. | Thank you for fighting for the rights or our kids and for working people across the country. In solidarity, Rashida 1 2 Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: (R-FL) Sen. Rick Scott
subject: Why I did this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
I’m asked often why I got into politics, so I want to take a moment to tell you a little bit about my story.

I grew up in public housing. My parents both worked hard, but it was difficult to make ends meet.

Still, they instilled the values of hard work and faith in me, and those values were able to propel me to business success later in life.

_But as I continued in my career, I noticed that the Left was trying to take away those opportunities for the next generation._

After I lived the American Dream, I knew I had to do _**EVERYTHING**_ I could to pay it forward for the next generation.

Now, we’re up against the farthest Left administration in history, and my motivation to fight back is just as strong as it was from day one in politics.

But I haven’t come this far on my own. None of it would be possible without you, and that’s why I’m reaching out to you today.

[**Will you pitch in now to fuel our fight and help us DEFEND the American Dream from the socialist Left?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=847ccf15871a444d85c0e3d61fd63bc9&_e=82pRY2AfRvuEHalgerPc7QNAoLfLvxUBLOgd16n90mj_VQCOtvih7VTwZ602pxyzUoSHu9wpwnP1XQf0UVjArCm1TwetyARfsJltVpIi7z-Fy7m7mMJCRbrDrz4dMRHZT8DJ5GPWcwdQK2Gd21L8ua6o--IltOUVehYoYY7VHjUeAoAt9Ltb63ZjpmrOA_56G8AX5_HmGVSPMT2i7wzUD3DpPO9zA56yIsTcTgdW0-xcR2XBF9hSOVbO6ApXmNen6sJKVMCOYHTsIb_uT7-lKgUNt6Z1anM1EPBK7-gtbCuFbSHRfb4E_lSncVl4NNkTopVtOSyEXguYFSWMMVHuzN00oi6-jPB96JYuyL3E4eaEHs6lMd6Q-QSMLBFyMg9y)

body:
Tell It Like It Is PAC Releases First TV Ad: “Qualified” | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/92ff1099ed97/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13529033?e=d0a9afa930)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** June 9, 2023
Contact: [press@tellitlikeitispac.com](mailto:press@tellitlikeitispac.com)

**Tell It Like It Is PAC Releases First TV Ad: “Qualified”
** On Heels Of Indictments, Spot Directly Calls Out Former President
**ARLINGTON, VA —** Today, Tell It Like It Is PAC released its first television ad of the 2024 presidential election. Entitled “Qualified,” the 30 second spot will air statewide on broadcast and cable in New Hampshire and across digital platforms.
The ad features clips of former New Jersey Governor Chris Christie at his kickoff town hall in New Hampshire taking direct aim at former president Donald Trump. Christie argues that it’s time for Americans to elect a serious president who is qualified to confront the challenges facing our nation.
“The latest round of indictments serve as another reminder that the Republican Party needs a new direction,” said **Colin Reed, senior adviser for Tell It Like It Is PAC**. “To turn the page on the Biden presidency, the GOP needs a qualified leader. Governor Christie is ready to serve the American people on day one, and Tell It Like It Is will be making that case directly to voters.”

**“Qualified”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=81c1135ec6&e=d0a9afa930)
| [DONATE](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=be8c51f864&e=d0a9afa930)
---

**SCRIPT FOR “QUALIFIED” (TV:30)**
Governor Chris Christie: _It's time for us to stop believing that Donald Trump is qualified to be president of the United States._
_These are real problems that real serious people need to solve by putting your interests first, not their own._
_I promise you, I will always show up. And I will always listen._
_But you'll never, ever, ever, ever have to wonder whether I hear you. And whether everything I do, I believe, is in my heart, and in my mind, is the best thing for our country._
VO: _Tell It Like It Is PAC is responsible for the content of this advertising._

-###-

body:
10-MINUTE POLL:

| |

---
| | | **BREAKING : PRESIDENT TRUMP INDICTED IN FEDERAL INVESTIGATION**

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: SURVEY: Farm bill priorities.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64586542/410574203/-665437442?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGYyMGZmNi1lZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLW2CLNgZIa8DhbrbVfAuAyQz3QX2dq-KZQpgz2saXQ=)
Peter,

As a member of the House Committee on Agriculture, I’ll play a major role in negotiating the upcoming Farm Bill. It’s a responsibility I take seriously, especially given the importance of farming in my home state and because tens of thousands of families in my community depend on food stamps through the SNAP program -- which is funded through the Farm Bill.

In case you missed it, I recently discussed the Farm Bill in _Politico’s_ Weekly Agriculture newsletter.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64586547/410574206/1623892051?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGYyMGZmNi1lZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLW2CLNgZIa8DhbrbVfAuAyQz3QX2dq-KZQpgz2saXQ=&emci=80f20ff6-ee06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=84f20ff6-ee06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18052858)
Here are some of the key points I made about my priorities for the bill:
* **We need to protect food assistance programs.** SNAP benefits help feed some of the most vulnerable in our community and Republicans want to make cuts. There are already work requirements in place for recipients which is likely to hurt overall food security.

* **We need to help farmers prepare for a more volatile future.** Increasingly frequent extreme weather is adding pressure for lawmakers to boost crop insurance – a measure I would fully support.

* **We need to protect farmers’ well-being.** The suicide rate among family farmers is extremely concerning, and it’s imperative that the Farm Bill include provisions that help address that crisis while laying the groundwork to set up the next generation of farmers for success.

**Those are my thoughts, Peter, but I also want to hear from supporters and constituents. What are your Farm Bill priorities?**

**[Fill out our brief one-minute survey and let us know which issues you think deserve attention in the Farm Bill negotiations.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64586548/410574213/1623892051?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGYyMGZmNi1lZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLW2CLNgZIa8DhbrbVfAuAyQz3QX2dq-KZQpgz2saXQ=&emci=80f20ff6-ee06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=84f20ff6-ee06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18052858)**
| [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64586549/410574214/1623892051?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGYyMGZmNi1lZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLW2CLNgZIa8DhbrbVfAuAyQz3QX2dq-KZQpgz2saXQ=&emci=80f20ff6-ee06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=84f20ff6-ee06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18052858)
---

I always appreciate your input.

– Eric

P.S. – While I have you: It’s going to be another close election in IL-17, and grassroots fundraising will be a critical factor for us to come out on top next year.

**[I would really appreciate it if you made a contribution to our re-election campaign. Any amount helps, but $3 would make a real impact.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64586550/410574215/-665437442?refcode=em-6.9.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGYyMGZmNi1lZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLW2CLNgZIa8DhbrbVfAuAyQz3QX2dq-KZQpgz2saXQ=)**
| [Donate $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64586551/410574216/-665437442?refcode=em-6.9.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGYyMGZmNi1lZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLW2CLNgZIa8DhbrbVfAuAyQz3QX2dq-KZQpgz2saXQ=)

He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. | | Peter, we wanted to make sure you received this invitation to the Rock the Ride event, a benefit ride and walk for gun violence prevention, on Saturday, June 24th. See details below and please join us if you're able!
* * *
**_Forwarded Message:_**

Mike is a huge advocate for Gun Violence Prevention. As a lifelong hunter and gun owner himself, he knows firsthand the obligation to ensure firearms are used responsibly. That’s why he’s introduced a bipartisan bill to expand background checks and close any loopholes that might lead to devastating shootings.

While Mike is working with his colleagues to enact common-sense gun reform into law, there’s a way you can get involved! Join Mike in the sixth annual Rock the Ride Napa Valley which will be held on Saturday, June 24!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64586805/410575477/313167857?source=EM_NBI_MT_20230602_INV_RTR_0_ID_TeamThompson_NA_NA_RocktheRidebump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjQ2NWE2ZS1lZjA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Um7XgHFy1nd6BdE_tPfBcZUHWnGzfUleH1OOpIxZbhw=&emci=4d2d8699-1c06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0b465a6e-ef06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)
Rock the Ride USA was created to raise funds for local and national nonprofit organizations working to end gun violence. Every day in our country 30 people are killed with a gun, with hundreds more injured. Communities across our country are devastated all too often for us to stay silent.

**_[Will you take part in making a difference on June 24, 2023? Click here if you or anyone you know might be interested>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64586806/410575478/313167857?source=EM_NBI_MT_20230602_INV_RTR_0_ID_TeamThompson_NA_NA_RocktheRidebump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjQ2NWE2ZS1lZjA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Um7XgHFy1nd6BdE_tPfBcZUHWnGzfUleH1OOpIxZbhw=&emci=4d2d8699-1c06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0b465a6e-ef06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)_**

clean_body: | | | Peter, we wanted to make sure you received this invitation to the Rock the Ride event, a benefit ride and walk for gun violence prevention, on Saturday, June 24th. See details below and please join us if you're able! Forwarded Message: Mike is a huge advocate for Gun Violence Prevention. As a lifelong hunter and gun owner himself, he knows firsthand the obligation to ensure firearms are used responsibly. That’s why he’s introduced a bipartisan bill to expand background checks and close any loopholes that might lead to devastating shootings. While Mike is working with his colleagues to enact common-sense gun reform into law, there’s a way you can get involved! Join Mike in the sixth annual Rock the Ride Napa Valley which will be held on Saturday, June 24! Rock the Ride USA was created to raise funds for local and national nonprofit organizations working to end gun violence. Every day in our country 30 people are killed with a gun, with hundreds more injured. Communities across our country are devastated all too often for us to stay silent. ** — Team Thompson | Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress Mike Thompson for Congress PO Box 10541 Napa, CA 94581 United States

| You deserve to hear ALL the voices in the Republican debates later this summer. Right now, you're only going to hear from a select few candidates. That is because the RNC is expected to institute both polling and fundraising benchmarks to guarantee candidates an opportunity to be on the debate stage. [**We are hitting our polling numbers but are falling behind in our donation requirements. A donation of even $1 or more will help me get onto the debate state. Please contribute to help me reach that goal.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=533978952415405b95531ac61f404af1&_e=0tQ6u-rkqEEok0p7mG9h_YOY79wDejuw2fzs4oYKyRTxlKaZgDVQbeoxbUyJPmuKTybYxRXCieoSVTrxzJ9F8H8jA2P0UsbxbVwxVkT6Sbn4N7L1-CLnX6FmUwwtxmudEM9LzLCPaZXuq8lf6xxqMxsye5ICO_Fjk5jT9Zma1xeLHEgM2YD1GiWkodJ4xhohV-7Ih4MgWnVKuihlh6Rxf8GZT0LrJw5TQk_EFlGCzICa3-4PuRBA_2XHvR0ZPuTbfjyEIMXnAEbyaMmPKuLXjw%3D%3D) I've spent years commentating on conservative politics, written books about American life and even stood up against Gavin Newsom in California. clean_body: $1 will get me on the debate stage! | | | | | | | $1 for 1 Debate | | | | | You deserve to hear ALL the voices in the Republican debates later this summer. Right now, you're only going to hear from a select few candidates. That is because the RNC is expected to institute both polling and fundraising benchmarks to guarantee candidates an opportunity to be on the debate stage. I've spent years commentating on conservative politics, written books about American life and even stood up against Gavin Newsom in California. I want to continue to spread my message on the presidential debate stage later this year But I can 't do that if I do not qualify. ** $1 for one debate, that is all I need today. Thank you, Larry Elder Republican Candidate for President | "CONTRIBUTE NOW →" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24 | 650 Town Center Drive, Suite 1500 Costa Mesa, CA 92626 USA |UNSUBSCRIBE|* Copyright(C) 2023 , All rights reserved. subject: Have you seen this billboard?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Friend —
Last year, our campaign was outspent 6:1. While our opponent was getting big checks from Kevin McCarthy’s PAC and other Republican groups, we relied on a network of grassroots supporters.
Even against all that money, we still came within one percentage point of winning.
We proved that with more support, Kirsten could win this race.
The DCCC took notice. They’re already funding billboards in AZ-06 calling out Juan Ciscomani for picking Donald Trump over our district. You can see a picture below!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_060923_EOQ_A_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_060923_EOQ_A_act]
Kirsten is the right leader for AZ-06— and she can win in 2024.
But we can only do that with the support of folks like you behind us.
Our first quarterly deadline is three weeks away, and it’s really important that we hit our goal. Will you rush a donation now so we can elect a candidate who will fight for our working families, not a political agenda? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_060923_EOQ_A_act]

— Team Engel

She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_060923_EOQ_A_act]

name: Team Nguyen
subject: Kim needs your response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | Right now, CA-45 is represented by a Republican who repeatedly failed to protect LGBTQ+ Americans and refuses to acknowledge their rights.

This Pride Month, Kim is recommitting to the fight for LGBTQ+ rights, but she wants to hear from you on these issues. [Click here to complete the survey today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64588227/410580032/2044703550?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230609_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTcwNGI0ODktZjEwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VNamThjVneWNzkVPPcbKaN8MYtJol15JbBWTH3OtLZc=&emci=abb7350c-4f06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9704b489-f106-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)

* * *
**_Forwarded Message from Kim Nguyen:_**

**June is Pride Month – and right now, the fight for LGBTQ+ equality has never been more important.**

Republican-led legislatures are passing an unprecedented number of anti-LGBTQ+ bills that target transgender Americans, drag queens, and more. MAGA extremists are whipping up fear and paranoia targeting LGBTQ+ youth. And far-right activists are hijacking school boards and pushing for bans on LGBTQ+ curricula.

**The GOP’s anti-LGBTQ+ agenda is dangerous and wrong. We believe in true _equality_ for everyone, and we don’t tolerate transphobia, homophobia, or hate in any form.**

[There’s so much at stake in this moment, which is why I want to hear your thoughts on the fight for LGBTQ+ rights. Take our quick survey to share your input →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64588228/410580033/2044703550?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230609_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTcwNGI0ODktZjEwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VNamThjVneWNzkVPPcbKaN8MYtJol15JbBWTH3OtLZc=&emci=abb7350c-4f06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9704b489-f106-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971) | | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64588229/410580034/2044703550?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230609_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTcwNGI0ODktZjEwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VNamThjVneWNzkVPPcbKaN8MYtJol15JbBWTH3OtLZc=&emci=abb7350c-4f06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9704b489-f106-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)**

Kim

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Working for Wisconsin, every single day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=391%2E35263%2Er8U8QV ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Hi Peter,

Since announcing her reelection campaign, Tammy has spent the last couple
of weeks meeting with folks across Wisconsin, discussing what’s on their
minds and how she can best serve them in the Senate. [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=391%2E35263%2Er8U8QV ]Read on below
about what Tammy has been up to, and chip in if you can so she can stay
out on the road!

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=391%2E35263%2Er8U8QV ]DONATE

Tammy was recently endorsed by the Wisconsin State AFL-CIO, which is a
huge honor. She’s ready to stand alongside workers to fight for more jobs,
higher wages, and better benefits for everyone.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=391%2E35263%2Er8U8QV ]Tammy Baldwin at the Wisconsin State AFL-CIO

Tammy knows that Wisconsin workers are the backbone of our state. She’s
always laser-focused on delivering to their needs. That’s why she will
take any chance to stand by their side, fighting to keep good paying union
jobs here in the Badger State.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=391%2E35263%2Er8U8QV ]Tammy Baldwin at the Badger State union strike

Tammy also loved meeting with small business owners in Beloit last month!
Small businesses keep our economy running strong 💪

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=391%2E35263%2Er8U8QV ]Tammy meeting with small business owners in Belo

Meeting with Wisconsinites from across the state and hearing their stories
firsthand is why Tammy loves campaign season.

But she knows that it’s not possible to meet and chat with each of her
wonderful supporters, which is why she set aside time to call and surprise
our donors to say thank you.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=391%2E35263%2Er8U8QV ]Tammy calling her supporters

Tammy is eternally grateful to be able to meet, hear from, and advocate
for each and every one of you. You make a real difference in this
campaign, and with you on our side, we know anything is possible.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=391%2E35263%2Er8U8QV ]So Peter, will you add a donation to help us keep reaching
out to folks in every corner of Wisconsin?

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-jun23.0mNvpg&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=391%2E35263%2Er8U8QV ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-jun23.gK03B0&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&t=1012&akid=391%2E35263%2Er8U8QV ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-jun23.JbTJlr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&t=1013&akid=391%2E35263%2Er8U8QV ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-jun23.1iZx5Q&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&t=1014&akid=391%2E35263%2Er8U8QV ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2158?c0=tbe-em-jun23.S4-TCr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&t=1015&akid=391%2E35263%2Er8U8QV ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&t=1016&akid=391%2E35263%2Er8U8QV ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks for being a part of our team!

— Team Baldwin

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1002&akid=391%2E35263%2Er8U8QV ]www.tammybaldwin.com | [ mailto:INFO@tammybaldwin.com ]INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM | [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=1003&akid=391%2E35263%2Er8U8QV ]Privacy Policy

The IL and Lake County GOP chose McCarthy, knowing that he would be an event and fundraising draw, despite his shameless antics to hold our economy hostage for a political win. By all accounts, the event was a huge success, raising in the **hundreds of thousands of dollars.**

By all accounts, the event was a huge success, raising in the hundreds of thousands of dollars. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = = Thank you, Dan Kovats Executive Director | | | | GET TEXT UPDATES FROM THE IDCCA! | | | | | | = = | | | | Contributions or gifts to the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association are not tax deductible. The Center for Election Innovation & Research (CEIR), founded by David Becker, organized and hosted a secret Elections summit in Washington DC from May 8-9 called "Summit on American Democracy". This conference consisted of a small group of some of the nation's most notorious election fraud deniers and election officials, including Secretaries of State, election officials, and the media.
[](https://substack.cc/redirect/9d368e7b-8aef-4bc9-9274-644768aeb42f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
CEIR was founded in 2016 by David Becker, who also founded the Election Official Legal Defense Network (EOLDN). Becker previously worked at Pew Charitable Trusts, a George Soros affiliated organization, where he organized the creation of the Electronic Registration Information Center (ERIC). Prior to working at Pew, Becker was the Director of People for the American Way (PFAW) and also worked in the U.S. Department of Justice as a litigator.
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..TWsSacOJjvPm646bzmHab07Oe1JEZVAGtBSs6nrQKLA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=125821658)
However, in 2005, a formal ethics complaint was filed against Becker when he was a trial lawyer in the Civil Rights Division of the DOJ. At the time, Brad Scholzman, was the acting head of the Department of Justice's Civil Rights division, and he said Becker did one of "the most unethical things I've ever seen" and called Becker "a hard-core leftist and a classic case of someone who should have been disbarred." Scholzman also added that Becker "couldn't stand conservatives."
David Becker reportedly received funding from George Soros to start CEIR. He also received $69.5 million dollars in funding during the 2020 Presidential election from Mark Zuckerberg. According to Becker's own book, "The Big Truth", Zuckerberg had an assistant personally call Becker to ask for his guidance on how Zuckerberg's $400 million dollars in political donations for 2020 alone should be spent in order to create the best outcome for the 2020 election and the Democrat Party.
[](https://substack.cc/redirect/9d368e7b-8aef-4bc9-9274-644768aeb42f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Major Garret and David Becker wrote "_The Big Truth: Upholding Democracy in the Age of 'The Big Lie'_" where they claimed the 2020 election was the "most transparent, verifiable, and well-held election to date." In his book, Becker quotes many of the main nefarious actors who recently attended this secret Soros-tied, Zuckerberg-funded, Trump hating election summit at the Spy Museum in Washington DC. Some of the most notable are Arizona's Secretary of State Adrian Fontes who called all Trump supporters "MAGA Fascists" for questioning the results of the 2020 and 2022 elections, and Brad Raffensperger, Georgia's Secretary of State.
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..TWsSacOJjvPm646bzmHab07Oe1JEZVAGtBSs6nrQKLA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=125821658)
I ran into David Becker while he was leaving the Washington DC National Mall Hilton Hotel on his way to dinner. He was surrounded by a security detail and tried to dodge my questions by running into oncoming traffic. Apparently answering my questions terrifies election fraud deniers so much that running into traffic feels safer and more pleasant in comparison...
I am honestly not sure if that says more about them, or if it says more about me. But, radical Leftists running into traffic to avoid addressing voter fraud is a titillating thing to think about either way.
For 10 minutes, my team and I asked Becker about the 2024 election fortification summit he organized, and the many hyper partisan and anti-Trump statements he made in his book.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
Seth is running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=MczQ438R07YeRXo%2BiFSVcowLA7UsjriCKYo7kR9ulC6HcB5Ftnh%2FoTBCi%2BQvw0SsXENfkvT1%2BQt1RkI3fgtYDM%2Fsl%2FGvs9PguOujxUjfHtxUDAaZ7LYyv5VTZN1t3f0CJ80NQP6b3nAG%2F66p%2FGXfTHjMRficNMPVpozLDTcpjTXKFlUyPoR23qnBB2WiQVnPtWFlXJHy7fY9nCTneugrxLbR4%2FkW9t9%2FTOIkriNsyhk4epA57zEU1aWJ3L1xGZ8W8PMgnWRQc4SqygTfQ9P4fvrIMlQvSKq5uJDzMLhP4uFRFOCjikxufAhmaJe69FduA0B6ZIBeY5Y3TOQePXqApZQveGKvO3QhCH0FPzNTdjqrJrwEfWVYfN7E3ROp0u6jocTjafIBnK2YjrOUu8e8QoYRhGPxNGfZWbXPKYU2fBByL9lqs8K2ysOdNeV57nyX)
---
| |
---
Peter,

We’re sick and tired of the richest millionaires and billionaires across the country who use their money and connections to trade stocks and make investments based on information not yet available to the public.

Just last month, ahead of the final passage of the debt ceiling bill, a Wall Street trader earned $7.5 million on an investment in a project approved in the bill by investing before it was publicly known that the project would be included. **The mystery trader made the investment just days before the bill was passed — and it looks a lot like insider trading to us.**

Over the years, it’s also become clear that Members of Congress have used their access to confidential information to trade stocks and turn a profit. That’s why it’s so important that we pass legislation that bans Members of Congress from trading stocks.

[Getting this done is long overdue, and we need your support to demand that the House pass legislation to ban stock trading by Members of Congress. Will you sign our petition by midnight tonight to demand that we finally ban Members of Congress from trading stocks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64588679/410581717/-2369366?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230609_PT_stocks_0_6MO_SethMagaziner.com_NA_NA_stocks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTMzOWJiYy1mMzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PO7kDZ0wNP7sz9GRPT8sDKS0GfJjErt3fWJ7hZQ_py0=&emci=dc339bbc-f306-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=de339bbc-f306-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15384964)

This is about leveling the playing field and making sure no one can take advantage of the system to get ahead. If you’re with us, [please add your name to our petition before midnight tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64588680/410581718/-2369366?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230609_PT_stocks_0_6MO_SethMagaziner.com_NA_NA_stocks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTMzOWJiYy1mMzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PO7kDZ0wNP7sz9GRPT8sDKS0GfJjErt3fWJ7hZQ_py0=&emci=dc339bbc-f306-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=de339bbc-f306-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15384964)

Thanks,
