Peter –
This week, I introduced legislation to block taxpayer funding for children's hospitals that provide transgender treatments for minors. I also continued to fight back against the push from radical environmentalists to abolish reliable, affordable energy like natural gas.
If you enjoy receiving my newsletters, please consider donating to my campaign. These updates, along with my entire operation, take a team of writers, editors, and content creators. I am only able to continue providing these free, regular updates with the resources provided from patriots like you. [Any amount helps, and you can help me grow our conservative movement by donating to my campaign here. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jW44MN8Fuu954_V0cm1E9lDT9PUjaDlZmMCkUMAklgmaagPnql1W3NLpNb1TlLH_3yVFddaAyOxjgdARWQWzVzGBbzJ3H5kOwzz5MLQNFWsDgBEHNRee18t27OxgjudN4UFnb_EmNT_DxcTOZg0UQrRpOaeg2VztFwhPoL2mDjrHWYwYJTuMoom690CEaDDlKW9MgeANcMzEWSjqEcea5-rmwHRdP6OQBqLSBfXKWFoI8P2WPxFHuC5D7mtSw3OTsjjC8hZM9zXt6J8X0otR1CXA97pewlDfE46o1JSDH9X6khM70rXaLHkBtAV6vOmFlwPBW1JrJGa0MZ11T3VWKWRlCUmwsWyIWAb3fThxOf4=&c=hI7pw4OKgor8FncqA6S-zsrJHHhjo7vxj3YgrFxo8LT6Jc0V2G7yNw==&ch=F0QIBL3s1R2APFI2nN8rhTnuSTvpKlP5f7IGUV9sQYXUJtB0MrYldw==)
As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your Campaign Brief:

| |

| | |

| |
---
| TAXPAYERS SHOULD NOT FUND "TRANSGENDER CARE" FOR MINORS
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jW44MN8Fuu954_V0cm1E9lDT9PUjaDlZmMCkUMAklgmaagPnql1W3NLpNb1TlLH_a18QM-0glzQvtZg6GPHSX7Jvrn2Rw4PiU_psdxD28GQNQ1yT1dM2bxeuMgfgiDPNzh47_va0RdXSpxoqEzpcKJdc35ls1gTi41HcBwkNM4iHJkI3KNTDQCqdSFr42gD6GYPbxaLcpd4_DSYaoi_AWxq2JdG_Fk9Kp2RcGKq43EpwfjE6Fv52l9kfu83i7JCHTyVA83G9iFfbZucYAfHR1sh7r-0a9ucOzP8VdIVsiNqyzaxPV1hkOvV7t1SPXLKXd10imoPbpoRzflInftDFY0UnKunqqqe-_vBCFYouvexpRMRsWYaazatgxWBqjp_UWNN4cOZFdw1gTCy3vkV0hn7ztg_k33YPj7Mro3vzmLw=&c=hI7pw4OKgor8FncqA6S-zsrJHHhjo7vxj3YgrFxo8LT6Jc0V2G7yNw==&ch=F0QIBL3s1R2APFI2nN8rhTnuSTvpKlP5f7IGUV9sQYXUJtB0MrYldw==)

| |

| "Gender affirming care" for minors is indistinguishable from child abuse, and it is quickly becoming the human rights issue of our time. There is no other human rights atrocity in America that is so quickly gaining momentum and validation within the very institutions that should know better. One of these institutions is children's hospitals. In a place where "do no harm" is the ultimate guiding principle, there is no excuse to ever perform treatments that permanently alter a child's physiology.
A lot of the action against this dangerous ideology has taken place at the state level, where strong governors like Greg Abbott have banned these "treatments" for minors. But there is also a role for Congress on this issue, and I'm taking the lead to ensure we are taking action in the House of Representatives to protect our kids.
Congress is getting ready to reauthorize the Children's Hospital Graduate Medical Education Payment Program. This program provides taxpayer funding for our nation's children's hospitals and the money is used to help graduate medical education programs train physicians.
This is the perfect chance to take a stand and protect our children, which is why I am introducing legislation as part of this reauthorization to prohibit any taxpayer funding from going toward children's hospitals that cater to the harmful pseudoscience that is "gender affirming care." My bill ensures that no funding under this program will go to a children's hospital if the institution provided "gender-affirming care" to an individual under 18 years of age.
My committee will hold a hearing on my bill next week, and I'll be sure to provide you with an update following the hearing. I am committed to this fight because our children must be protected from this radical ideology that is sweeping the country.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| DEBUNKING THE LIES FROM RADICAL ENVIRONMENTALISTS
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jW44MN8Fuu954_V0cm1E9lDT9PUjaDlZmMCkUMAklgmaagPnql1W3NLpNb1TlLH_JCreZKekOin6fjfRAu2Ja2aMDJgKH6Sb8BkJrE5JzypkueBaBwdiADacq19oK3oJ6vAxT_slxXszxqWZfTIbXXe5ifytwNBDRFwO_s8RTJE=&c=hI7pw4OKgor8FncqA6S-zsrJHHhjo7vxj3YgrFxo8LT6Jc0V2G7yNw==&ch=F0QIBL3s1R2APFI2nN8rhTnuSTvpKlP5f7IGUV9sQYXUJtB0MrYldw==)

| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jW44MN8Fuu954_V0cm1E9lDT9PUjaDlZmMCkUMAklgmaagPnql1W3NLpNb1TlLH_JCreZKekOin6fjfRAu2Ja2aMDJgKH6Sb8BkJrE5JzypkueBaBwdiADacq19oK3oJ6vAxT_slxXszxqWZfTIbXXe5ifytwNBDRFwO_s8RTJE=&c=hI7pw4OKgor8FncqA6S-zsrJHHhjo7vxj3YgrFxo8LT6Jc0V2G7yNw==&ch=F0QIBL3s1R2APFI2nN8rhTnuSTvpKlP5f7IGUV9sQYXUJtB0MrYldw==)

| |

| This week, the Energy and Commerce Committee held a hearing on the latest effort from Joe Biden's EPA to stifle reliable, affordable energy like natural gas and force unreliable renewables into the electricity market. Watch the clip above from the hearing to see my reaction to this rule and the broader climate narrative from radical environmentalists.
This latest rule from Biden's EPA would impose aggressive carbon dioxide reduction rules for power plants--demanding that coal and natural gas plants immediately upend their entire operations with unproven technology to make these plants "cleaner." The EPA says their goal with this rule is to reduce emissions, but in reality their goal is to reduce investment in building new natural gas plants, and rapidly transition the United States to an electric grid powered only with wind and solar. That is bad for everyone, especially considering American energy demand will increase by about 30% in the coming decades.
Here are the basic facts: we cannot rely on wind and solar for baseload power. We just can't. We are already experiencing grid reliability issues and increased costs because reliable power (like natural gas) is being replaced by these unreliable renewables. This latest rule from the EPA will only make that problem worse.
Americans deserve to have reliable energy--they deserve to be able to heat their homes in the winter and have AC in the summer. And Americans deserve the truth when it comes to this issue--we can provide cheap, dependable energy while also reducing emissions with proven solutions like nuclear energy and natural gas that we can then export to the rest of the world. I will continue to speak the truth and debunk the lies from the left on this issue.

We are already experiencing grid reliability issues and increased costs because reliable power (like natural gas) is being replaced by these unreliable renewables. This latest rule from the EPA will only make that problem worse. Americans deserve to have reliable energy--they deserve to be able to heat their homes in the winter and have AC in the summer. And Americans deserve the truth when it comes to this issue--we can provide cheap, dependable energy while also reducing emissions with proven solutions like nuclear energy and natural gas that we can then export to the rest of the world. I will continue to speak the truth and debunk the lies from the left on this issue. | | | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | == | == | | | | | | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thanks for reading and your support. Was this email forwarded to you? == to get the latest updates on the fight in Washington direct from me. | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | | | == | If you'd like to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. Any questions, comments, or concerns? body:
With all eyes on Saturday’s event, it’s imperative that we pull off our first big event.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=39%2E1163%2EEZtOwo)
Hey, it's Zoë.
In one day, Team Lateefah is bringing our campaign to the community with an official kickoff in the heart of Oakland._
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230609-1?refcode=em20230609-1&refcode2=39_1163_EZtOwo&akid=39%2E1163%2EEZtOwo)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230609-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230609-1&refcode2=39_1163_EZtOwo&akid=39%2E1163%2EEZtOwo)**
The fact is that this event is a _make or break moment_ for our campaign. **Here’s why:**
* The pundits and press are going to be watching very closely, gauging our community’s turnout and the professionalism of our organization as a sign of our momentum.
* Our opponents will be watching too, and we need to show them just how powerful this grassroots movement really is.
* Not to mention, the stakes of this race could not be higher. Congress needs more true public servants like Lateefah. Winning this race is the first step towards continuing a legacy of progressivism that touches the lives of all folks in California’s 12th Congressional District

It’s critical that we kick off an event of this magnitude with a powerful base of grassroots supporters who are ready to be part of the wave carrying Lateefah to Congress. **[Would you do me a big favor and donate $5 before the day ends to help us pull off a successful event and prepare for the next chapter?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230609-1?refcode=em20230609-1&refcode2=39_1163_EZtOwo&akid=39%2E1163%2EEZtOwo)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230609-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230609-1&refcode2=39_1163_EZtOwo&akid=39%2E1163%2EEZtOwo)**
Thanks for chipping in today, and wish us luck on Saturday! 💜
With gratitude,
Zoë Kleinfeld
Campaign Manager
Lateefah Simon for Congress
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-wrapper?refcode=em20230609-1&t=2&refcode2=39_1163_EZtOwo&akid=39%2E1163%2EEZtOwo)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=39%2E1163%2EEZtOwo)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=39%2E1163%2EEZtOwo)

To give by check:
Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438,
Oakland, CA, 94612
Email us: [info@lateefahsimon.com](mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com)
PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Maher?=
subject: Endorsed by Tulare County Sheriff Mike Boudreaux!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/what-is-biden-afraid-of-12607604?e=1722d05e10)
---
| | [ ](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=6274d4bf1c&e=1722d05e10)
---
| |
June 9, 2023

Friend,

**I am proud to announce that my good friend and Tulare County Sheriff Mike Boudreaux has endorsed my campaign for Congress.** He is the current President of the California State Sheriffs' Association.

In his endorsement, Sheriff Boudreaux said, “I have known Michael since his early days in law enforcement. He is a man of faith, values, and leadership. His service in the United States Navy, his business background, and his strong belief in service to the community all make him the best man for the job! That is why I am endorsing Michael Maher for Congress.”

Our campaign is gaining momentum and generating excitement as new endorsements roll in. This surge of support TERRIFIES the Democrats, especially my opponent Jim Costa. We must maintain the growing enthusiasm surrounding my Congressional race to defeat Jim Costa, reclaim the last Democrat district in the Central Valley, and expand the Republican majority in Congress.

To keep the momentum moving forward, I am asking for your help. [Will you pledge a minimum of $5 per month to support my Congressional campaign?](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=5968603c11&e=1722d05e10) If you cannot make a monthly commitment, please consider a one-time donation of $10, $25, $100, or whatever you can do.

---
| [DONATE $5 ON $5 FRIDAY](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=853d090bc6&e=1722d05e10 "DONATE $5 ON $5 FRIDAY")
---
| With your contribution, we can continue building our campaign to defeat Jim Costa.

Thank you for your generous support.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| **Michael Maher**
Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress

---
|
---
| _**Background** : Michael Maher is a former FBI Special Agent and US Navy Veteran who was raised in the Central Valley. Michael and his wife, Ann, are raising their young family in Fresno County, and he owns and operates an aviation business. Michael was the 2022 nominee for California's 21st Congressional District._

| | | Peter,

_The more we learn about the weaponization of the FBI against conservatives, the more I’m alarmed._

_**First,** they labeled parents concerned about the woke indoctrination of schools as a _terrorism risk_._
_**Then,** they admitted to putting FBI informants in _churches_._
_**Now,** we’re finding out that they had practically _NO evidence_ to open their Russia hoax investigation into President Trump._
_**This is the kind of behavior you expect in a communist dictatorship, not a free democracy like the United States. **_
_**_We MUST hold the FBI accountable for their blatant targeting of conservatives._ [Sign on NOW and END the witch hunt!](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=20a241d8baa6406ea8f81b176f0aa4c8&_e=3IsiB5jnTlRj5T47MEja3-w38sXNkJ3zvHj7H5BOBZNU1dm29feZtQ4unY5b3_43hppGxSYBGhkznDP4H9QCWLxPUmqIgagdj1GJ5JPaey8ImMl9uaAhXiBFZJVTVmM4Ni0ZdN-iPiLKvjviebiYkC268kX5UolfGmK_0df_u9DUKEnhUlQGcyrJeQ9OgwhQsvRBgdSAlyGUkhgKhc9Ah5HeWtP8V6cRUh9S5sJchnc0rlpHlJZ_nqCsLSAYDX8iIVUdDVBylYwKXG8BVXOo6Pj_crz3FweqVSDa269qaZ6co7cqvYBkIqEf-bXTMSET4EPtSfluFoYVCu_F6sb3LDjdsZKxNW0MaJuo6F3HaOvcQ_yj0UQ9y53D7GCnRgsy)**_

| | _Hilary Clinton, Barack Obama, and Joe Biden were all complicit in the witch hunt against President Trump._

name: Replace Sinema
subject: NEW VIDEO: Sinema’s shady donors
body:
Watch this video and share | | | Peter –
It turns out that Harlan Crow, the billionaire GOP mega donor who paid for Clarence Thomas’s vacations (and who collects Hitler memorabilia as a hobby) maxed out donations to Kyrsten Sinema. **[Watch more HERE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xPg-we6-6TZiylK6pKfi6BVVNfU8VmXk1qa_HYBm9y80-xuRfbWsdNAo3SeMU-Ii_lY92SJFcIp7vJwwfTRsSJ85aAV-j599RY-Je70DMyDKyzMjjoMOPTES8CG2gX0jCyKtfK3bS7_gjP2HfakkGTxT0hBw3mSUqLo_2BrDebrx5IvJGRGgdUZffFSxYf-33mJdcWnw5ShJJVL1k66S7amuq1dZD4pOC7aa6xnKOLVgZvaFBimJkANh_jp-CVIkFWryVB8qf5uMpzgFqh0xA6lAEB0ObgTJe1y6_QNqEyrg/3ww/lDYhe45tT9iC6rjZhPLddw/h0/3KZnu8OQr4TV0xnROScQwnktn4rXrCx6U5FpVZCsKRc)****:** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xPg-we6-6TZiylK6pKfi6BcfKCAVOdLSul_vyWNm4_2i7OHCBHp19gOOVe-YogGhSNd2KW3LMLGhmOcwG9sBJu05eS7R7IB6DNmjzaKxH4NmrUv-2I-A3nxjvMRkGgNm-aBMcxtdptbgFN2fo9ZYxj-AOlns9pGLvuPP2ltnS471XQzgbC11RlnlB1ricjFHHv5ZY-k-FCkCrtNRzuFR7FzMyAiuGkUvdA2yDdg3iU1TUWvEBdjm3OyJjTnDvqhTAD68JDFJPSPZaRFxexF91tochDITGzXGfj-P4LXNbTfg/3ww/lDYhe45tT9iC6rjZhPLddw/h1/iiSyMnKTNnrFAJBZXZ_DcDSUMOYxpaGv8rev0JyNNFE)**Crow’s right wing connections are well known — including bankrolling lavish vacations for Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas and his wife Ginni Thomas, a far-right activist herself.** Last year Kyrsten Sinema’s PAC received a contribution of $5,000 from Crow, and in 2021, her campaign was even forced to return $2,900 to Crow after he exceeded federal contribution limits. And that’s not all. Crow also gave more than $100,000 to No Labels – which has championed Sinema and recently qualified for a ballot line in Arizona in order to undermine Democrats. Time and again Sinema puts her donors over her constituents. **[Please chip in so we can let everyone in Arizona know before 2024: Sinema sold out and we’re going to fight tooth and nail to replace her.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xPg-we6-6TZiylK6pKfi6B0A0BfuwQyDLj-zib6i27trcsPCPhs3tKdA23K87j7ej-ft6oY9G0Xi4_e6Udbs1n3mJgO74HsLSdhqA2SsRzWvWRDXwx1YfEo8nw6fYkbXK38wmRwX0aYsN5m014cY6Iz8sQrP6mCIhI1JhO7l43xKRT5998mqZdNfjKqq9xxsffFpc-k17Jkg0RCFYUcMbp9Xk5hglttrn-u9hH_1Mjm9VXNLrn-8YQTSVJbZRFcf6gViaEE-AlOYEhhlrlBNBrVAVeQnhtjft9VP3D9AEQmQ/3ww/lDYhe45tT9iC6rjZhPLddw/h2/5kx9QHApkNYKaXeMvveLjudMivtYP_-FaD8b-J1oEK8) ** Thanks for everything you do, -Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024 PAC

body:
Chip in today to be automatically entered for your chance to meet Joe and Jill now. | | |

Hi there, Peter -- I’ve been working with President Biden for a long time. One thing I know for sure is that his absolute favorite part of being on the campaign trail is talking with folks like you one-on-one about the issues that matter to you -- what you're passionate about, what keeps you up at night, and what you want to change in your community. And now’s your chance to have your very own conversation with him! **Today, we're launching a contest where one lucky supporter (and a guest) will get to meet Joe and Jill -- and the flight and hotel stay are on us! You’ll have a chance to chat with the President and Dr. Biden and even grab a photo. clean_body: Chip in today to be automatically entered for your chance to meet Joe and Jill now. | | | Hi there, Peter -- I’ve been working with President Biden for a long time. One thing I know for sure is that his absolute favorite part of being on the campaign trail is talking with folks like you one-on-one about the issues that matter to you -- what you're passionate about, what keeps you up at night, and what you want to change in your community. And now’s your chance to have your very own conversation with him! Today, we're launching a contest where one lucky supporter (and a guest) will get to meet Joe and Jill -- and the flight and hotel stay are on us! You’ll have a chance to chat with the President and Dr. Biden and even grab a photo. Trust me, you won’t want to miss out on this. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Here’s what pitching in today could get you: 🎫 Round-trip plane tickets + an overnight stay at a hotel 📸 Meeting Joe and Jill + a photo you'll cherish for a lifetime ✨ Priceless memories that you’ll be able to share with a friend I know how much Joe wishes he could sit down with everyone on this team, but we’ll have to start with one person (and a guest) for now -- and it could be you, Peter! Julie Julie Chavez Rodriguez Campaign Manager Biden-Harris 2024

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: New Major Threat to Oregon's Land Use Laws!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64594970/410590117/182376337?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwMzExNDBkLWZiMDYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NnH9SKc0DUeWIu27lVshbOmpfcYrHUMWzZrv-Ok81b0=&emci=564cb99d-e506-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0031140d-fb06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) | | | Hi Peter, Yesterday I had to testify at the last minute against an amendment to HB 3414. This bill to address the housing emergency had a last minute amendment introduced to allow for a one time expansion of urban growth boundaries without even showing need for the expansion––a change that makes it a Major Threat now. At this stage of session, bills can move very quickly from a committee to a vote by the entire House. This is why it’s important that your lawmakers hear from you right away. [**Will you take action now to urge your elected officials to vote no on this bill with the proposed amendment?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64594972/410590119/182376337?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwMzExNDBkLWZiMDYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NnH9SKc0DUeWIu27lVshbOmpfcYrHUMWzZrv-Ok81b0=&emci=564cb99d-e506-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0031140d-fb06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) One of the things that makes Oregon exceptional is our innovative land use laws that have created urban growth boundaries––helping preserve the natural beauty and agricultural abundance of our state. Every year we at OLCV along with our partners in the Oregon Conservation Network have to fight to protect our land use laws against big developers and other special interests attempting to pass bills that roll back these laws. They are at it again, with the proposed -19 amendment to a housing bill HB 3414. While we fully support taking urgent action to address Oregon’s housing crisis, we know that expanding our urban growth boundaries without following the existing laws is not how we get there. This amendment would expand outward and lead to more sprawl, making it harder to reduce climate pollution and address climate change. And, crossing into the wildland-urban borders will expose more Oregonians to fire risk. [**Please take action today to stop this terrible amendment from moving forward.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64594974/410590121/182376337?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwMzExNDBkLWZiMDYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NnH9SKc0DUeWIu27lVshbOmpfcYrHUMWzZrv-Ok81b0=&emci=564cb99d-e506-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0031140d-fb06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Developing land outside of urban growth boundaries would be expensive and hard to access for those who need housing the most. The best kind of affordable housing should be on lands within cities where there are existing roads and amenities like schools and supermarkets. [**If anything, our cities and towns need more resources for infrastructure for new climate friendly and affordable housing.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64594976/410590123/182376337?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwMzExNDBkLWZiMDYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NnH9SKc0DUeWIu27lVshbOmpfcYrHUMWzZrv-Ok81b0=&emci=564cb99d-e506-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0031140d-fb06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) We have land inside our cities, such as underused parking lots and strip malls, that could be converted to more kinds of housing and more affordable housing. This kind of development would make the most of our underutilized urban areas while addressing the housing crisis, abiding by our current land use laws, and preserving our green spaces. This housing bill with the -19 amendment would not. [**Please take a moment of your day to urge your elected officials to vote NO on HB 3414 with the -19 amendments.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64594978/410590125/182376337?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwMzExNDBkLWZiMDYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NnH9SKc0DUeWIu27lVshbOmpfcYrHUMWzZrv-Ok81b0=&emci=564cb99d-e506-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0031140d-fb06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Thank you for all that you do! clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, Yesterday I had to testify at the last minute against an amendment to HB 3414. This bill to address the housing emergency had a last minute amendment introduced to allow for a one time expansion of urban growth boundaries without even showing need for the expansion––a change that makes it a Major Threat now. At this stage of session, bills can move very quickly from a committee to a vote by the entire House. This is why it’s important that your lawmakers hear from you right away. One of the things that makes Oregon exceptional is our innovative land use laws that have created urban growth boundaries––helping preserve the natural beauty and agricultural abundance of our state. Every year we at OLCV along with our partners in the Oregon Conservation Network have to fight to protect our land use laws against big developers and other special interests attempting to pass bills that roll back these laws. They are at it again, with the proposed -19 amendment to a housing bill HB 3414. While we fully support taking urgent action to address Oregon’s housing crisis, we know that expanding our urban growth boundaries without following the existing laws is not how we get there. This amendment would expand outward and lead to more sprawl, making it harder to reduce climate pollution and address climate change. And, crossing into the wildland-urban borders will expose more Oregonians to fire risk. Developing land outside of urban growth boundaries would be expensive and hard to access for those who need housing the most. The best kind of affordable housing should be on lands within cities where there are existing roads and amenities like schools and supermarkets. We have land inside our cities, such as underused parking lots and strip malls, that could be converted to more kinds of housing and more affordable housing. This kind of development would make the most of our underutilized urban areas while addressing the housing crisis, abiding by our current land use laws, and preserving our green spaces. This housing bill with the -19 amendment would not. Thank you for all that you do! Julia DeGraw Coalition Director, OLCV | | ---|---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. subject: Looking ahead

body:
37 Democrats are under attack

| |
---
Peter, I know the 2024 elections may not be top of mind for you right now, but the National Republican Congressional Committee just released a list of **37 Democratic-held seats they plan to target** to expand their House majority and further their extremist agenda, so we’ll need all hands on deck in the weeks and months ahead. Time and again, we’ve seen that the GOP will go to great lengths to boost their candidates, including raking in millions from dark money groups and spending even more on ads to tear down Democrats. **With the current GOP majority fighting tooth and nail to obstruct our progress** on critical issues like Black maternal health, skyrocketing college education prices, and reproductive rights — we can’t afford to let them expand their majority any further. That’s why our team at American Mosaic PAC (AMP) is laser-focused on supporting candidates from all walks of life because we’ll make true progress when Congress represents folks from all backgrounds. We work with organizations like United Rural Democrats, a team helping to elect Democrats from rural areas who are often overlooked by politicians in Washington. [**_Ahead of our upcoming end-of-quarter deadline at the end of June, please chip in any amount to power our work to elect leaders who truly reflect the communities that make up our nation. name: Jason Crow
subject: Look at this picture
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
Folks, what do you see in this picture? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596362/410591038/-2136351806?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2JkM2MwNi1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j5bEase8vP9-i4cq5RpW3K2gOU-IPd30KsjCSh4aEyk=) If we ignore the bowl cut, you’ll see a kid who has no clue what life has in store for him. All he wanted was to play with his Legos and run around in the backyard. I grew up in a working-class family, so I know what the struggle is like for so many Americans. It wasn’t easy at times, but if there’s one thing my early life taught me, it’s to never give up. I’ll be honest: There wasn’t always enough money growing up, so I started working at a young age. Paper routes, Arbys, construction — and after high school I enlisted in the National Guard to help pay for college. **Then, right as I was preparing to graduate, 9/11 happened.** It was a defining moment. Like so many others, I felt the call to serve my country. I went active duty and became an Army Ranger, putting my life on the line to defend our nation’s values. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596366/410591039/-2136351806?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2JkM2MwNi1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j5bEase8vP9-i4cq5RpW3K2gOU-IPd30KsjCSh4aEyk=) I came back stateside after serving three tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. I wanted to continue giving back, so I offered pro-bono legal services to help veterans transition to civilian life. Then Donald Trump became president. Extremists began threatening to strip away our health care. Immigrants were being demonized. Even our democracy felt fragile. I felt that call to step up and serve again, so after long discussions, I decided to run for office. Our country _needed_ a new generation of leadership — one that seeks to unite us, not divide. **Coloradans agreed. In 2018, I became the first Democrat to ever represent Colorado’s 6th congressional district. It’s been full speed ahead ever since.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596369/410591040/-2136351806?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2JkM2MwNi1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j5bEase8vP9-i4cq5RpW3K2gOU-IPd30KsjCSh4aEyk=) That’s my story. I’ve always gone where the fight is — no matter the odds. **Progress doesn’t come easy. Progress happens because people put in the work and fight for it. Especially in moments like these.** Democracy is under attack. The right to vote is under assault. A fundamental freedom was recently yanked away for half of Americans. _And the extremism still isn’t over._ I refuse to let them win without a fight. [**I’m counting on your support every step of the way. Please add a $10 donation today to help me bring a new generation of leadership to Congress >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596373/410591041/-2136351806?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2JkM2MwNi1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j5bEase8vP9-i4cq5RpW3K2gOU-IPd30KsjCSh4aEyk=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596379/410591042/-2136351806?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2JkM2MwNi1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j5bEase8vP9-i4cq5RpW3K2gOU-IPd30KsjCSh4aEyk=)

clean_body: | Folks, what do you see in this picture? = If we ignore the bowl cut, you’ll see a kid who has no clue what life has in store for him. All he wanted was to play with his Legos and run around in the backyard. I grew up in a working-class family, so I know what the struggle is like for so many Americans. It wasn’t easy at times, but if there’s one thing my early life taught me, it’s to never give up. I’ll be honest: There wasn’t always enough money growing up, so I started working at a young age. Paper routes, Arbys, construction — and after high school I enlisted in the National Guard to help pay for college. Then, right as I was preparing to graduate, 9/11 happened. It was a defining moment. Like so many others, I felt the call to serve my country. I went active duty and became an Army Ranger, putting my life on the line to defend our nation’s values. = I came back stateside after serving three tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. I wanted to continue giving back, so I offered pro-bono legal services to help veterans transition to civilian life. Then Donald Trump became president. Extremists began threatening to strip away our health care. Immigrants were being demonized. Even our democracy felt fragile. I felt that call to step up and serve again, so after long discussions, I decided to run for office. Our country needed a new generation of leadership — one that seeks to unite us, not divide. Coloradans agreed. In 2018, I became the first Democrat to ever represent Colorado’s 6th congressional district. It’s been full speed ahead ever since. = That’s my story. I’ve always gone where the fight is — no matter the odds. Progress doesn’t come easy. Progress happens because people put in the work and fight for it. Especially in moments like these. Democracy is under attack. The right to vote is under assault. A fundamental freedom was recently yanked away for half of Americans. And the extremism still isn’t over. I refuse to let them win without a fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for reading this email, — Jason | Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us? | = Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: We are campaigning in a different way than the other candidates. Soon, we'll be debating differently too. | | BIG NEWS: Thanks to you, Peter, I've met a major campaign milestone by garnering over 40,000 unique donors. That's enough to qualify for the GOP debate in August. I began this campaign with one vision: build the most successful grassroots campaign from the bottom-up. Even though we have hit the goal to ensure a spot at the debate, I want to make sure our vision for an American revival is front and center on the debate stage. | So what's next? I look forward to debating my Republican competitors and speaking hard truths. As I've said before, if you are afraid to take the debate,how are you going to take on Xi Jinping? This election is not about the "who" or cult of personalities, it will have to be about who has the best stance on the issues. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **__** _One Week Away From Hoosier Hospitality Dinner!_ Friends, we are just one week away from the annual Hoosier Hospitality Dinner featuring Minnesota Governor Tim Walz! This is your chance to meet fellow Hoosier Democrats from all across Indiana, and hear how our state leaders are standing up for Hoosiers. [We’d love to see you there. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596929/410591680/132778211?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlYzQ5MS1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sk5lctO7JdDmbUhUGCNJAIF0K5ILNI-0mVOln94rYmA=) You won’t want to miss the lineup of speakers and special guests. We’ve saved you a seat — [grab your tickets today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596930/410591681/132778211?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlYzQ5MS1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sk5lctO7JdDmbUhUGCNJAIF0K5ILNI-0mVOln94rYmA=) _Mike Pence Launches Presidential Bid Outside Indiana_ Former Indiana Governor and Vice President Mike Pence launched his presidential campaign this week giving a speech in Iowa. After living his entire life in Indiana, why wouldn’t Pence want to launch his campaign in the state he’s called home? Shouldn’t he be proud of the Indiana he created, and want to showcase it to the country? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596932/410591682/-209689514?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlYzQ5MS1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sk5lctO7JdDmbUhUGCNJAIF0K5ILNI-0mVOln94rYmA=&emci=b3774a42-ec06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=afcec491-fc06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596933/410591683/-209689514?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlYzQ5MS1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sk5lctO7JdDmbUhUGCNJAIF0K5ILNI-0mVOln94rYmA=&emci=b3774a42-ec06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=afcec491-fc06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) The simple truth is that Hoosiers know the full story about Pence’s abysmal record. As Congressman, he tried several times to cut Social Security, as Governor he let an HIV outbreak turn into a crisis, and signed one of the country’s most hateful laws targeting LGBTQ people. Now, he’ll try to make people forget about how he cheered on Donald Trump for four years. [Read INDems full release.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596934/410591684/1911332918?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlYzQ5MS1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sk5lctO7JdDmbUhUGCNJAIF0K5ILNI-0mVOln94rYmA=&emci=b3774a42-ec06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=afcec491-fc06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) **** _Micah Beckwith Widens GOP Civil War_ This week, one of the Indiana GOP’s most radical figures announced an unorthodox standalone bid for Lt. Governor. Micah Beckwith holds extreme views on abortion, saying that Indiana’s near-total ban [did not go far enough.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596935/410591687/-111249921?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlYzQ5MS1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sk5lctO7JdDmbUhUGCNJAIF0K5ILNI-0mVOln94rYmA=&emci=b3774a42-ec06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=afcec491-fc06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) And the day after the January 6 insurrection on the US Capital, Beckwith claimed the [events were divinely inspired](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596936/410591688/-984437839?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlYzQ5MS1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sk5lctO7JdDmbUhUGCNJAIF0K5ILNI-0mVOln94rYmA=&emci=b3774a42-ec06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=afcec491-fc06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535). [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596937/410591689/-1764037326?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlYzQ5MS1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sk5lctO7JdDmbUhUGCNJAIF0K5ILNI-0mVOln94rYmA=&emci=b3774a42-ec06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=afcec491-fc06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596938/410591690/-1764037326?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlYzQ5MS1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sk5lctO7JdDmbUhUGCNJAIF0K5ILNI-0mVOln94rYmA=&emci=b3774a42-ec06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=afcec491-fc06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) Now, he’s trying to upend the GOP’s gubernatorial primary civil war and elect hundreds of delegates to their state convention next year to try and win the Lt. Governor nomination, even if the eventual gubernatorial nominee doesn’t want him. Beckwith’s record is clear: if elected, he’ll make the office into his own political playground. [Read our full statement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596939/410591691/1322161320?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlYzQ5MS1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sk5lctO7JdDmbUhUGCNJAIF0K5ILNI-0mVOln94rYmA=&emci=b3774a42-ec06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=afcec491-fc06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596940/410591692/-1827226525?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlYzQ5MS1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sk5lctO7JdDmbUhUGCNJAIF0K5ILNI-0mVOln94rYmA=&emci=b3774a42-ec06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=afcec491-fc06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596941/410591693/-1827226525?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlYzQ5MS1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sk5lctO7JdDmbUhUGCNJAIF0K5ILNI-0mVOln94rYmA=&emci=b3774a42-ec06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=afcec491-fc06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) Our bill of the week is [legislation from Rep. Vernon Smith](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596942/410591694/1654511536?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlYzQ5MS1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sk5lctO7JdDmbUhUGCNJAIF0K5ILNI-0mVOln94rYmA=&emci=b3774a42-ec06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=afcec491-fc06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) that will make it easier for school districts to tackle bullying. Rep. Smith aims to help avoid tragic situations in schools across the state because of bullying. During the legislative session, [Rep. Smith commented](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596943/410591695/1395651286?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlYzQ5MS1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sk5lctO7JdDmbUhUGCNJAIF0K5ILNI-0mVOln94rYmA=&emci=b3774a42-ec06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=afcec491-fc06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535), “We need to make sure kids feel that schools are safe places. They shouldn't not want to go to school because they are getting harassed." **__** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64596944/410591696/835150459?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlYzQ5MS1mYzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sk5lctO7JdDmbUhUGCNJAIF0K5ILNI-0mVOln94rYmA=&emci=b3774a42-ec06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=afcec491-fc06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. One Week Away From Hoosier Hospitality Dinner! Friends, we are just one week away from the annual Hoosier Hospitality Dinner featuring Minnesota Governor Tim Walz! This is your chance to meet fellow Hoosier Democrats from all across Indiana, and hear how our state leaders are standing up for Hoosiers. = You won’t want to miss the lineup of speakers and special guests. We’ve saved you a seat — = Mike Pence Launches Presidential Bid Outside Indiana Former Indiana Governor and Vice President Mike Pence launched his presidential campaign this week giving a speech in Iowa. After living his entire life in Indiana, why wouldn’t Pence want to launch his campaign in the state he’s called home? Shouldn’t he be proud of the Indiana he created, and want to showcase it to the country? The simple truth is that Hoosiers know the full story about Pence’s abysmal record. As Congressman, he tried several times to cut Social Security, as Governor he let an HIV outbreak turn into a crisis, and signed one of the country’s most hateful laws targeting LGBTQ people. Now, he’ll try to make people forget about how he cheered on Donald Trump for four years. ** Micah Beckwith Widens GOP Civil War This week, one of the Indiana GOP’s most radical figures announced an unorthodox standalone bid for Lt. Governor. Micah Beckwith holds extreme views on abortion, saying that Indiana’s near-total ban And the day after the January 6 insurrection on the US Capital, Beckwith claimed the . Now, he’s trying to upend the GOP’s gubernatorial primary civil war and elect hundreds of delegates to their state convention next year to try and win the Lt. Governor nomination, even if the eventual gubernatorial nominee doesn’t want him. Beckwith’s record is clear: if elected, he’ll make the office into his own political playground. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Our bill of the week is that will make it easier for school districts to tackle bullying. Rep. Smith aims to help avoid tragic situations in schools across the state because of bullying. During the legislative session, , “We need to make sure kids feel that schools are safe places. They shouldn't not want to go to school because they are getting harassed." ONE WEEK AWAY - 2023 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner = This year’s Hoosier Hospitality Dinner is set for Friday, June 16 at the Indiana Convention Center — =! You won’t want to miss this chance to see fellow Hoosier Democrats and hear from leaders around the state and country. Get Involved! Opportunities to Volunteer Near You! Upcoming Candidate Trainings Monday, June 12: 12-1 p.m. ET: “Maximize Your Field Strategy Through Precinct Prioritization”: This training will help you understand how to prioritize the precincts in your district based on their size, and data points. This information will help make sure your campaign targets voters efficiently and effectively. Register by Tuesday, June 13, 12-1 p.m. ET: “Data Management for Your Field Program”: Tracking your efforts in the field can make all the difference! This training helps you understand what data pieces to track, and how to use this information in your efforts. Register by Leadership Opportunities: Hoosier Women Forward and Emerging Leaders Project Applications are open for Hoosier Women Forward’s sixth class of leaders! Democratic women with a demonstrated ability to take initiative in their communities or places of work are encouraged to apply. Women selected for HWF must demonstrate an interest in public policy, political advocacy, and advancing Indiana forward with progressive policies and ideas. You can now apply to join the 2023-24 class of the Emerging Leaders Project! Founded in 2011 by party activists Jeff Harris and Carmen Darland, the Emerging Leaders Project was created to bring more young people into the Democratic Party and into public service. This program is open to Hoosier Democrats between the ages of 21-40 looking to get more involved! 2023 IDEA Convention: Book Your Room Today! INDems IN the News NPR: WFYI: ABC News: WANE: Indiana Capital Chronicle: WISHTV: WFYI: IPB News: AP: Yahoo! News: Opportunities with INDems_** To apply for a job with the Indiana Democratic Party, please visit or send a note to mailto:jobs@indems.org. Thank you! name: David Trone
subject: Our veterans need imminent help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Friends,

Brave veterans from across the nation, including our home state of Maryland, are in need of immediate help.

From aggressive cancers to chronic illnesses, veterans who were exposed to toxic substances during active duty are now experiencing horrific health impacts.

That’s why, last year, I was proud to vote in favor of the PACT Act. This law created a pledge known as the Cost of War Toxic Exposures Fund ( TEF ), which directs funding for healthcare and other benefits to veterans exposed to toxic substances like burn pits.

But recently, House Republicans voted for the Default on America Act which abandons this pledge to our veterans and dramatically slashes these critically important funds.

I’ve always believed that we should go above and beyond to support our veterans, and I’m irate that Republicans in Congress would undercut these benefits afforded to those who have served in the military. But, I want to know what you think:

Should Congress do more to protect veterans affected by toxic substances?

YES. Supporting our veterans is critical. >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/myO0P4ciWUW90b6yjpTqLg2

NO. We should not support veterans affected by toxic substances. >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/myO0P4ciWUW90b6yjpTqLg2

Thank you for letting me know!

– David Trone

Take the Survey >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/myO0P4ciWUW90b6yjpTqLg2

Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.
David Trone for Maryland
P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998
United States

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Some news on the vote to censure me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2464%2E5257348%2E-4Hstk ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, I
thought you’d like to hear an update on Republicans’ plan to censure me
and potentially fine me $16 million in a House resolution.

After the MAGA Republican who introduced the resolution went on Steve
Bannon’s podcast to announce the vote to censure me would be happening
this week, their plan was put on hold when MAGA Republicans rebelled
against the debt ceiling agreement and halted all action on the floor for
the week. Of course that didn’t stop the resolution’s author from using it
to position herself to become the next Marjorie Taylor Greene.

Seriously, check out this image from a fundraising email sent by the
resolution’s sponsor, Rep. Anna Paulina Luna of Florida’s campaign:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jun2023_abs_em.FUvtzW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2464%2E5257348%2E-4Hstk ] [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jun2023_abs_em.FUvtzW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2464%2E5257348%2E-4Hstk ][IMG]

That’s right — her campaign is riling up the MAGA base by using me as
their Public Enemy No. 1.

Why?

Because no one in Congress has been more effective than I have at holding
her dear leader Donald Trump accountable for his multiple, egregious
abuses of power.

I did it as Chair of the House Intelligence Committee. I did it as the
lead manager of Trump’s first presidential impeachment. And I did it again
as a member of the January 6th Committee investigating the insurrection he
incited on us at the Capitol.

And I will continue to protect our democracy as California’s next Senator.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jun2023_abs_em.FUvtzW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2464%2E5257348%2E-4Hstk ]If you’re as sick and tired as I am of MAGA Republicans’ dangerous
political games, please chip in $10 to help me fight back and win this
Senate race.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9HINAX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2464%2E5257348%2E-4Hstk ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2023_abs_em.RWa6IA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2464%2E5257348%2E-4Hstk ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9Bj7kB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2464%2E5257348%2E-4Hstk ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=jun2023_abs_em.wTG104&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2464%2E5257348%2E-4Hstk ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2464%2E5257348%2E-4Hstk ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Republicans in the House majority have abused their position of power in
order to motivate their extreme MAGA supporters — while the real issues
the American people are facing go unaddressed.

Folks across the East Coast this week are learning the horror we routinely
experience in California, with wildfires burning thousands of acres,
clouding cities from Boston to DC in smog, and intensifying the climate
crisis.

I met with families in San Joaquin last week that have polluted water the
color of charcoal coming out of their faucet taps — right in Kevin
McCarthy’s backyard. And he isn’t lifting a finger to do anything about
it.

These are the kinds of issues we need to be addressing. Instead, MAGA
Republicans decide to come after me over, and over, and over again.

They gum up the works of Congress and can’t even get their $#!+ together
to bring it to a vote. But boy, does it excite their MAGA base.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jun2023_abs_em.FUvtzW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230609_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=2464%2E5257348%2E-4Hstk ]The vote to censure me will now likely come up next week, and I’m
going to need your help to fight back — no matter how that vote goes. So
before you go, I’d really appreciate it if you could chip in a few bucks
to support our campaign.

Thanks for reading. More soon.

Adam

name: Team Lucas
subject: re: baby Harvey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Did you catch this important message from Lucas yesterday, Peter?
#
Hey Peter, did you catch this message from Lucas yesterday?
**If you haven’t already, please take a few moments today to read about the arrival of his new son, Harvey.[Then consider chipping in $10 or more to help our grassroots campaign stay on track while he and Marilyn spend time with Harvey in the NICU.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33966?refcode=em20230609-3240&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3240%2E614464%2EBoH07K)**
Supporters like you have fueled this campaign since day one — and we’re so grateful to be able to count on your support when we need it most.
Thanks for everything,
Team Kunce
\------Forwarded Message-----
Sent: Thursday, June 8, 2023, 1:46 p.m.
From: Lucas Kunce
Subject: An important personal update
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce reaching out with an important personal update.
**On Monday at 9:47AM, my wife Marilyn delivered our newborn son, Harvey.**
7 weeks early. 3.3 lbs. An emergency c-section. I didn’t think I could be more amazed by Marilyn’s resilience — she started working as a kid to help her family survive, came to a new country for opportunity with no money and no friends, and became a successful professional at an environmental non-profit — but witnessing her strength, love, and fortitude during Harvey’s first couple of days in the NICU and her recovery has been incredible.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33966?refcode=em20230609-3240&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3240%2E614464%2EBoH07K)
Marilyn is recovering faster than expected and, for the most part, Harvey is doing well. He still has some time to spend in the NICU, but he is proving to be just as feisty as his mom and getting stronger every day.
Everything that happened this week has reminded me more than ever that the campaign we’re building here in Missouri isn’t about personal ambition or getting into office — it’s about making sure families like yours and mine are ok.
It’s about making sure we have a health care system where mothers — especially women of color like Marilyn — in Missouri, a state with one of the highest maternal mortality rates in the country, are safe in childbirth.
It’s about making sure people like me and you can have kids and afford to provide for our families afterwards without getting burdened by medical bills — like the ones that forced my own family into bankruptcy growing up.
And it’s about fighting for a Missouri where we can raise our children to live and thrive for generations with strong communities, opportunities, and good pay.
So yes, I’m running for U.S. Senate. But for my family, I still need to be the most attentive father and husband I can be — especially during this time.
That’s why I’m asking for your help, Peter.
Over the next few weeks, I won’t be able to make as many calls as I usually would to raise our campaign money during this end-of-quarter push — and there’s a real chance that if we don’t make up for it in online donations, our total fundraising number could take a serious hit.
I'm asking you to help me now so that I'm not in a position where I have to choose between spending time with Marilyn and Harvey when they need me and raising the resources to defeat Josh Hawley for all of us. With your help, we can do both.
**Supporters like you have always had my back — and now I’m counting on you to be there for me again.[So please, will you help my campaign stay on track while I take some time to be a father by chipping in $10, $25, or whatever you can afford today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33966?refcode=em20230609-3240&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3240%2E614464%2EBoH07K)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33967?refcode=em20230609-3240&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3240%2E614464%2EBoH07K) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33967?refcode=em20230609-3240&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3240%2E614464%2EBoH07K) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33967?refcode=em20230609-3240&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3240%2E614464%2EBoH07K) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33967?refcode=em20230609-3240&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3240%2E614464%2EBoH07K) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33967?refcode=em20230609-3240&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3240%2E614464%2EBoH07K) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33967?refcode=em20230609-3240&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3240%2E614464%2EBoH07K) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33966?refcode=em20230609-3240&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3240%2E614464%2EBoH07K)
---
Josh Hawley hasn’t done a thing to make Missouri better for parents and our children — from refusing to raise wages so we can take care of our families to voting against health care to even using his own position and power to control the lives of everyday people all across our state.
These issues are personal to me, just like they are to you. And I’m proud to be fighting for all of us in this race for U.S. Senate.
Thank you so much for having my back, Peter.
Talk soon,
Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230609-3240-footer&t=11&refcode2=3240_614464_BoH07K&akid=3240%2E614464%2EBoH07K)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=3240%2E614464%2EBoH07K). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Fair Fight
subject: You may not know who these extremists are now, but you will by the end of this email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
In state legislatures across the nation, the GOP is ramping up their coordinated attack on Democratic lawmakers who challenge their oppressive agenda. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64598693/410592978/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230609_f_hallofshame2_v1s3_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGQ1NGM3MS1mZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqzNcxk5jNZmBr1Zbm2Z_qno9MVK2gZUYURLOsCdkyc=&emci=0d112cc5-fd06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ddd54c71-fe06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | You may not know who these GOP extremists are right now, but by the end of this email, we’re hoping we can convince you to help stop them. In state legislatures across the nation, the GOP is ramping up their coordinated attack on Democratic lawmakers who challenge their oppressive agenda. For a group that constantly touts their commitment to free speech, these GOP extremists are going to great lengths to formally silence Democrats — and the people who voted for them — when they simply don’t like what they have to say. They’re making every possible effort to maintain and gain power ahead of the 2024 election cycle, regardless of the will of the people. **Let us introduce you to three of the GOP extremists who have recently silenced Democratic lawmakers and subverted our democracy:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64598694/410592980/518075514?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230609_f_hallofshame2_v1s3_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGQ1NGM3MS1mZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqzNcxk5jNZmBr1Zbm2Z_qno9MVK2gZUYURLOsCdkyc=) These are just a few examples of the extremism we’re up against, and we can’t allow it to fly under the radar. Less than one year from now, extremists like these will be on the ballot yet again. clean_body: In state legislatures across the nation, the GOP is ramping up their coordinated attack on Democratic lawmakers who challenge their oppressive agenda. | | | You may not know who these GOP extremists are right now, but by the end of this email, we’re hoping we can convince you to help stop them. In state legislatures across the nation, the GOP is ramping up their coordinated attack on Democratic lawmakers who challenge their oppressive agenda. For a group that constantly touts their commitment to free speech, these GOP extremists are going to great lengths to formally silence Democrats — and the people who voted for them — when they simply don’t like what they have to say. They’re making every possible effort to maintain and gain power ahead of the 2024 election cycle, regardless of the will of the people. Let us introduce you to three of the GOP extremists who have recently silenced Democratic lawmakers and subverted our democracy: = These are just a few examples of the extremism we’re up against, and we can’t allow it to fly under the radar. Less than one year from now, extremists like these will be on the ballot yet again. As this critical election cycle rapidly approaches, we’re committed to training and empowering the next generation of pro-democracy champions and protecting access to the ballot box so that voters have a fair say in who represents them. It will take a unified movement to fight back against the right-wing agenda — and that’s the work Fair Fight is committed to doing right now. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation to Fair Fight will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thank you, The Fair Fight Team | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_060923_ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_060923_]
Team,
It’s no secret that I’m concerned about the state of our democracy.
Too often, our leaders are focused on winning partisan fights or media attention, rather than protecting the norms and principles that have built our republic. Case in point: Donald Trump.
Despite his indictment on federal charges yesterday, his impact on our democracy and voting rights in this country remains.
Yet I’m happy to say that this week there was a notable victory in the fight for our future.
Yesterday, the Supreme Court ruled against blatant racial gerrymandering in Alabama. The state must redraw the district lines, giving Democrats a fighting chance at multiple House seats.
In a democracy, every voice should matter. No one should be prevented from having an impact because of dark money, gerrymandering, or voter suppression.
I’m truly pleased by this Supreme Court decision. But our fight doesn’t end here.
We must continue to work to protect voting rights nationally and get dark money out of our elections. Our democracy hangs in the balance.
W [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_060523_lgbtqrights] ill you take a second to sign our petition in support of voting rights? By capitalizing on the momentum of this Supreme Court decision, we can fight back against those attacking the basic values of our government [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_060823_votingrights] .
SIGN ON NOW [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_060823_votingrights]
Thank you for being a part of this, friend.
— Michael

name: Madeleine Dean
subject: a year without Roe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
This month marks the first anniversary since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade. **** This month marks the first anniversary since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade._

And since then, we’ve seen draconian restrictions in statehouses across the country — circumstances that were once written off as alarmist are now the reality in places like Texas where women are being denied life-saving surgeries, or in Ohio where a 10-year-old girl had to flee the state for an abortion after she was raped by an adult family member.

If there were ever a doubt as to whether further restrictions might come forth, that should be gone now.

Women and girls in America today have fewer rights than they did just one year ago — I find that frightening, but with three granddaughters and three daughters-in-law, I can’t let it dishearten me. _The danger of this moment must move us all to action._

**The stakes are astronomical — and we must do all we can to fight back against the extreme right’s assault on our bodily autonomy. Sadly, it only gets more dangerous the longer the GOP is in the majority —[add your name and stand with me to protect abortion rights now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64598886/410595623/953630675?refcode=06092023_md_repro_en_1&refcode2=50545133-0007-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDU0NTEzMy0wMDA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdqOnhActTKF2ScpCW3i1VSnjkkmBmmcAqFugTDa95w=)** | | [ **ADD YOUR NAME** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64598887/410595625/953630675?refcode=06092023_md_repro_en_1&refcode2=50545133-0007-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDU0NTEzMy0wMDA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdqOnhActTKF2ScpCW3i1VSnjkkmBmmcAqFugTDa95w=)

Friend,

Before we ask you to **[chip in a donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64599467/410598393/1924984212?refcode=em-6.9.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTE3ODU4ZTEtMDAwNy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KO6DsznYAl7lu_2sI656hagJMUN_TyqRL4M463C5UYQ=)** to Marlene’s grassroots campaign, we wanted to give a side-by-side look at the choice AZ-01 voters could have in 2024.

On the one hand, you’ve got **David Schweikert** – a far-right career politician and one of the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64599468/410598400/1924984212?refcode=em-6.9.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTE3ODU4ZTEtMDAwNy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KO6DsznYAl7lu_2sI656hagJMUN_TyqRL4M463C5UYQ=)
_Our opponent has become good friends with MAGA darling Marjorie Taylor Greene._
Schweikert is best known for breaking nearly a dozen ethics rules and campaign finance laws. Two oversight committees have found him guilty of misusing funds and tax dollars for luxuries such as Super Bowl tickets, flying first class, dry cleaning bills, babysitting, and “consulting,” which became code for dinners in DC.

He’s also in the pocket of the likes of Marjorie Taylor Greene -- a major fundraiser for the party who keeps vulnerable Republicans like Schweikert afloat. It’s no wonder he voted to toss out the 2020 presidential results, attacks abortion and birth control access, and wants to weaken protections for Medicare and Social Security.

That’s why we're doing everything we can to elect **Marlene Galán-Woods** instead.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64599470/410598408/1924984212?refcode=em-6.9.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTE3ODU4ZTEtMDAwNy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KO6DsznYAl7lu_2sI656hagJMUN_TyqRL4M463C5UYQ=)
Marlene spent her career fighting for the truth for the people of Arizona. While Schweikert tried to skirt the law, Marlene was reporting facts to inform our community of misdoings and crimes committed locally and by the powerful.

**Election experts are already calling AZ-01 one of the country's most consequential House races, and Marlene is our _best chance_ at defeating Schweikert.** To do that, we must be ready to defend ourselves from attacks and grow our campaign on the ground.

**[The end of this month will be our first FEC deadline and a first look for pundits to evaluate our strength. Please chip in $10, $35, or whatever you can to support Marlene’s campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64599472/410598416/1924984212?refcode=em-6.9.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTE3ODU4ZTEtMDAwNy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KO6DsznYAl7lu_2sI656hagJMUN_TyqRL4M463C5UYQ=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, Before we ask you to = to Marlene’s grassroots campaign, we wanted to give a side-by-side look at the choice AZ-01 voters could have in 2024. On the one hand, you’ve got David Schweikert – a far-right career politician and one of the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress. = Our opponent has become good friends with MAGA darling Marjorie Taylor Greene. Schweikert is best known for breaking nearly a dozen ethics rules and campaign finance laws. Two oversight committees have found him guilty of misusing funds and tax dollars for luxuries such as Super Bowl tickets, flying first class, dry cleaning bills, babysitting, and “consulting,” which became code for dinners in DC. He’s also in the pocket of the likes of Marjorie Taylor Greene -- a major fundraiser for the party who keeps vulnerable Republicans like Schweikert afloat. It’s no wonder he voted to toss out the 2020 presidential results, attacks abortion and birth control access, and wants to weaken protections for Medicare and Social Security. That’s why we're doing everything we can to elect Marlene Galán-Woods instead. = Marlene spent her career fighting for the truth for the people of Arizona. While Schweikert tried to skirt the law, Marlene was reporting facts to inform our community of misdoings and crimes committed locally and by the powerful. Election experts are already calling AZ-01 one of the country's most consequential House races, and Marlene is our best chance at defeating Schweikert. To do that, we must be ready to defend ourselves from attacks and grow our campaign on the ground. = Thank you, Team Marlene | **=** | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: The EMILYs List Campaigns Team
subject: Kansas voters want abortion to remain legal. That hasn't stopped GOP lawmakers →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
