| | Republicans don't care about the will of the people. Period. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64599673/410599271/-1524463920?sourceid=1050178&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWRmMDhkYS0wMDA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BQMVhOO_7Qw4iQ9e6AQBdm-wPqlYzeuPiAsDE83gWDE=&emci=946a4dde-fb06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9edf08da-0007-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Last year, Kansas voters _rejected_ a ballot referendum that would have **eliminated the right to abortion** from the state constitution. The referendum was defeated by a wider margin than almost anyone expected — nearly **18 points**.

The people of Kansas were crystal clear: they want abortion to remain legal in their state.

**But that hasn't stopped Kansas Republicans from passing one anti-choice law after another this legislative session.** They passed a law mandating that providers must tell their patients lies about the abortion pill. They passed a ridiculous, scientifically unfounded "born alive" law that we don't even want to get into — except to say that it peddles a dangerous false narrative about "failed abortions."

And most recently, they passed a devastating law that offers tuition assistance to Kansas medical students — in an attempt to reverse the state's shortage of OB-GYNs — but **NOT to any medical student trained to perform abortions**. Pregnancy termination is, of course, a safe, effective, and common medical procedure — and one that is _still legal_ in Kansas.

The lesson here? Republicans don't care about the will of the people. They _only_ care about power, control, and limiting our freedoms. **And since we can't count on Republicans to do the right thing, ever, no matter what their constituents want or need — we need to elect more Democratic pro-choice women _everywhere_ , at every level of government. Donate now to help make it happen:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-Women-This-June](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64599686/410599319/-1524463920?sourceid=1050178&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWRmMDhkYS0wMDA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BQMVhOO_7Qw4iQ9e6AQBdm-wPqlYzeuPiAsDE83gWDE=&emci=946a4dde-fb06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9edf08da-0007-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Thank you,

name: K. Gillibrand
subject: I was lucky
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I gave birth to my second son, Henry, after putting in a 13-hour day on the floor of the House.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64599794/410600136/1423499192?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4208-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjkyYTZlNy0wMDA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Au5ROQCWk04nx-CJ7IQAY5szk9ZYOtYNV-F9bX_4iiw=&emci=66b77c13-4d05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8b92a6e7-0007-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
I was proud to work right up until the day I gave birth, but in the months after Henry was born, 13-hour days simply weren't possible. I needed time at home to recover and care for my newborn son. Luckily, as a congresswoman at the time, I had a job that allowed me to take the time I needed to care for myself and my family.
But the fact is, millions of Americans don't have the basic protection of paid leave. Instead, they're forced to make impossible decisions. No working American should have to choose between a paycheck and caring for a loved one, between their job security and taking the time to recover from a serious illness.

**We're the only industrialized nation in the world that fails to provide paid family leave. It's far past time that changes.**
That's why, ten years ago, I first introduced a bill to create guaranteed paid leave for _every single American_. Over the years, I've introduced this bill again and again, working hard to build coalitions and fight for progress.
**Just a few weeks ago, I raised this issue again. And to enact real change, I need grassroots Americans like you to stand with me.[Please, will you add your name to my petition before midnight tonight to show your support for paid family leave?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64599795/410600137/1423499192?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4208-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjkyYTZlNy0wMDA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Au5ROQCWk04nx-CJ7IQAY5szk9ZYOtYNV-F9bX_4iiw=&emci=66b77c13-4d05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8b92a6e7-0007-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
| | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64599796/410600138/1423499192?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4208-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjkyYTZlNy0wMDA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Au5ROQCWk04nx-CJ7IQAY5szk9ZYOtYNV-F9bX_4iiw=&emci=66b77c13-4d05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8b92a6e7-0007-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
---
It's impossible to overstate just how truly transformative this legislation would be for working American families.
We need a comprehensive national paid leave program, providing workers with ample support for family or medical leave. Parents shouldn't have to decide between their paycheck and staying home with their sick child. Workers deserve job security, even if they need to take time off for themselves or care for a loved one.
But that's not all: Studies have shown over and over that paid family leave would actually _benefit_ our economy, making life better for _all_ of us.
**Paid leave should be a national priority. And I won't stop fighting until it becomes a reality.[Please, will you join me by adding your name to my petition before midnight tonight? I'm counting on 5,000 engaged Democrats to sign on, so your support here would mean so much.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64599797/410600139/1423499192?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4208-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjkyYTZlNy0wMDA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Au5ROQCWk04nx-CJ7IQAY5szk9ZYOtYNV-F9bX_4iiw=&emci=66b77c13-4d05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=8b92a6e7-0007-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

Kirsten

clean_body: | | | Friend, I gave birth to my second son, Henry, after putting in a 13-hour day on the floor of the House. I was proud to work right up until the day I gave birth, but in the months after Henry was born, 13-hour days simply weren't possible. I needed time at home to recover and care for my newborn son. Luckily, as a congresswoman at the time, I had a job that allowed me to take the time I needed to care for myself and my family. But the fact is, millions of Americans don't have the basic protection of paid leave. Instead, they're forced to make impossible decisions. No working American should have to choose between a paycheck and caring for a loved one, between their job security and taking the time to recover from a serious illness. We're the only industrialized nation in the world that fails to provide paid family leave. It's far past time that changes. That's why, ten years ago, I first introduced a bill to create guaranteed paid leave for every single American. Over the years, I've introduced this bill again and again, working hard to build coalitions and fight for progress. Just a few weeks ago, I raised this issue again. And to enact real change, I need grassroots Americans like you to stand with me. | | It's impossible to overstate just how truly transformative this legislation would be for working American families. We need a comprehensive national paid leave program, providing workers with ample support for family or medical leave. Parents shouldn't have to decide between their paycheck and staying home with their sick child. Workers deserve job security, even if they need to take time off for themselves or care for a loved one. But that's not all: Studies have shown over and over that paid family leave would actually benefit our economy, making life better for all of us. Paid leave should be a national priority. And I won't stop fighting until it becomes a reality. | | With gratitude and love, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: | | | | | Fellow conservative, When I hear radical Leftists talk about making America a socialist country, I’m absolutely sick. My parents didn’t risk their lives escaping socialism in Cuba just for America to go down the same road. Socialism is nothing but poverty, censorship, and political violence, and I’ll do everything in my power to stop it from coming to our great country. But with the Left spending MILLIONS to indoctrinate the next generation, I need your help. I’m proud to be an American, Fellow conservative. I love the freedom we have in this great country, and I’ve learned to NEVER take it for granted. You know, it’s ironic: no one who’s ever experienced real socialism EVER advocates for it when they get to America. The only people who love socialism are those who have never lived through it. But unfortunately, their message is starting to carry, and more and more people are falling for their lives. Thank you, | | | | Maria Elvira Salazar | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

clean_body: | | Derek- We are just 8 days away from the 2023 YDA Convention and we are making one last call for convention sponsors. We anticipate nearly a thousand young Democrats from across America to join us in Las Vegas, Nevada , at the MGM Grand Hotel from June 18-21 — we can only help energize and prepare young Democrats heading into the 2024 elections with your support. We're doing a last call for persons interested in supporting the Young Democrats of America at our Friend of YDA ($250) and YDA Alumni ($500) sponsorship levels. | Friend of YDA ($250) Name listed in the program Social media recognition | YDA Alumni ($500) 1 VIP convention pass, including access to the VIP and Alumni reception Name listed in the program Social media recognition ---|--- Your investment goes towards the mission of YDA, which is to engage young people across the country to train the next generation of Democratic leaders, elect Democrats, and advocate for progressive issues. name: Team Cori
subject: LGBTQ+ rights and the Equal Rights Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Enshrining LGBTQ+ rights in the Constitution | |
---
Peter, In Rep. Cori Bush’s home state of Missouri and across the country, transgender people are under attack. Hate crimes and hateful policies are on the rise as right-wing leaders attempt to erase trans people. **This Pride Month, we again want to affirm for our LGBTQ+ readers that we value you, we know you matter, and we’ve got your back.** Cori is committed to justice for people of marginalized genders, which is one of the reasons why she’s championing the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA). The ERA is a powerful tool to protect our rights and to push back against discrimination based on sex or gender -- including discrimination based on people’s sexual orientation or gender identity. name: Barbara Boxer via Blue Amp Action
subject: Retaking the House runs through CA-41, a true swing seat. It’s the type of district Democrats MUST WIN to regain Congress.
body:
Democrats must win this district
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfdeb5053-d3d7-4c3c-8f16-ff07a7e697cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te7321454-6890-45c0-b546-6a4d45712ced/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I’ve got a huge announcement that should bring a smile to your face and hope to your heart: former federal prosecutor, Will Rollins just announced his campaign for Congress in California’s 41st district -- one of the most important races in the country in the effort by Democrats to retake the House. Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal. There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign. I have committed my energy, time and money to this race and today I am asking you to start Will off with a show of support that will send him a message that we are behind him 100 percent. [I’ll share more about why I'm backing Will, but first, I have an important request: Could you split a $10 donation between Will’s campaign and Blue Amp Action to help him launch with strength? Will can win this thing, so please donate now.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta86e687f-2783-4344-9cc4-33e85969337b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f239228-a7a9-4857-93bb-e0e7b5566a11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Here’s why Democrats across the country should pay close attention to this race: 1\. We need candidates like Will in Congress. As a former federal prosecutor, he understands the ongoing danger that extremism poses to our democracy. He brought justice to insurrectionists, and I know he'll take the oath to defend democracy as seriously now as he did in the Justice Department. 2\. Retaking the House runs through CA-41. After the new lines were drawn, CA-41 became a true swing seat. It’s the type of district Democrats MUST WIN to regain Congress. 3\. GOP super PACs. Despite the tough midterm environment in 2022, Will was the third most “overperforming” Dem challenger in the country. He was also heavily outspent by the GOP’s dark money machine. If Democrats help Will keep pace, he can flip this seat! 4\. Will’s opponent Ken Calvert has got to go. Calvert voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election. He backs the extreme ban on abortion -- including for instances of rape, and wants doctors who perform them to go to jail. CA-41 is home to one of the most LGBTQ-friendly cities in Palm Springs, yet Calvert staunchly opposes gay marriage. The rematch is on, folks. Will came so close to winning in 2022, and this is our chance to finish the job. But it depends on widespread, grassroots support. [Please split a $10 contribution between Will Rollins’ campaign for Congress and Blue Amp Action today. I’m telling you, this will be one of the most critical races in the country, so don’t sit this one out! We need lots of Democrats to step up right out of the gate.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb03498f7-2b6b-4737-b643-bed874ac4904/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks, Barbara Boxer Former U.S. Senator, California
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc34a54e5-20db-4f1a-bb3d-d95b49b4fd54/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/barbaraboxerforwillrollins6-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=a1375280-8781-4fa2-a9c8-f1ec62ab9697&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=a1375280-8781-4fa2-a9c8-f1ec62ab9697&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Friend,
Earlier this year, Steve Bannon asked me if I _still_ would have run for President had I known how viciously the Deep State would attack me.
_**But even now – even after *everything* they’ve done to me – my answer has not changed one bit: I ABSOLUTELY STILL WOULD HAVE RUN.**_

Right now — in Pride Month — we need you to join Josh Shapiro and our team in this fight.

name: Carole King
subject: My friend, Sherrod Brown
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64601863/410607962/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk252-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTVjY2JmYy0wOTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ea_yvPrxvK2ErMfv6Udw7acopVh7sFBQg9MPDnYLHNE=)
Hi friend, it's Carole King.
My friend Sherrod Brown is facing a tough reelection, and he needs ALL of us to pitch in. YOU have grassroots power, and together, we ARE grassroots power.

**[Will you join me in supporting Senator Brown with a donation of $](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64601864/410607964/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk252-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTVjY2JmYy0wOTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ea_yvPrxvK2ErMfv6Udw7acopVh7sFBQg9MPDnYLHNE=)**[**5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64601865/410607965/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk252-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTVjY2JmYy0wOTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ea_yvPrxvK2ErMfv6Udw7acopVh7sFBQg9MPDnYLHNE=)**[, or whatever you can afford?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64601866/410607966/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk252-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTVjY2JmYy0wOTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ea_yvPrxvK2ErMfv6Udw7acopVh7sFBQg9MPDnYLHNE=)**

**Here’s why Sherrod is worthy of your support. **
When I was growing up, my mom taught speech in public school, and my dad was a firefighter. They taught me the value of hard work, and most importantly, the _dignity_ of work. Today, I’m still a proud member of three unions.
I’m inspired by Sherrod’s campaign because he's a proven champion for workers' rights. He’s spent his life in the trenches advocating for everything from higher wages to the right to unionize.
And Sherrod has always been a fearless leader at the forefront of protecting civil rights, LGBTQ+ rights, voting rights, and reproductive rights.

**Sherrod will always stand up for working families like the one in which I grew up. That’s why I’m asking you to use your grassroots power to make sure that a significant majority of Buckeye Staters turn out and vote to keep him in the U.S. Senate.**
[**Will you donate right now to keep our “dignity of work” champion Sherrod Brown in the U.S. Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64601867/410607967/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk252-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTVjY2JmYy0wOTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ea_yvPrxvK2ErMfv6Udw7acopVh7sFBQg9MPDnYLHNE=)
Sherrod has run on these issues and won elections in the past, but Ohio has become increasingly challenging for a Democrat to win statewide. Sherrod is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection – and Ohio’s race for his seat could decide Senate control.
Friend, with Republicans getting millions of dollars from billionaires who pay less in taxes than American workers do, **grassroots power** is the most effective way to keep Sherrod Brown as our champion in the Senate and ensure that our hopes, our dreams, and our rights are the law of the land.
[**So please, will you please join me RIGHT NOW in chipping in $5, or whatever you can afford, to reelect Sherrod in Ohio so he can continue fighting for working families across the country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64601868/410607968/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk252-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTVjY2JmYy0wOTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ea_yvPrxvK2ErMfv6Udw7acopVh7sFBQg9MPDnYLHNE=)
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64601870/410607969/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk252-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTVjY2JmYy0wOTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ea_yvPrxvK2ErMfv6Udw7acopVh7sFBQg9MPDnYLHNE=)
---
Thank you so much for being engaged in this fight. Your support really matters. We can do this!

Wishing you and your family all the best,

– Carole
Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award, a Kennedy Center Honor, and double-induction into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. Now Carole is using her platform to help elect an expanded Democratic Senate majority. And she really did write this email.

If you’d like to receive fewer emails, please [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64601871/410607970/1932668150?refcode=jtk252-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTVjY2JmYy0wOTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ea_yvPrxvK2ErMfv6Udw7acopVh7sFBQg9MPDnYLHNE=&emci=4d0aa640-5005-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a95ccbfc-0907-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626). | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN

Sherrod is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection – and Ohio’s race for his seat could decide Senate control. Friend, with Republicans getting millions of dollars from billionaires who pay less in taxes than American workers do, grassroots power is the most effective way to keep Sherrod Brown as our champion in the Senate and ensure that our hopes, our dreams, and our rights are the law of the land. = | | = Thank you so much for being engaged in this fight. Your support really matters. We can do this! Wishing you and your family all the best, – Carole Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award, a Kennedy Center Honor, and double-induction into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. Now Carole is using her platform to help elect an expanded Democratic Senate majority. And she really did write this email. | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States If you’d like to receive fewer emails, please . | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN

name: Team Wexton
subject: Re: This Pride Month, we must show solidarity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
Jennifer is determined to push back against the wave of anti-LGBTQ+ rhetoric and legislation.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64601973/410608282/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230609EA_N_TW_FULL_11_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDE0MTI2OS0wYTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfaJd2y36oMdB4eNThzSn9_h-nfdGIQXZ4etEaJpJrM=)
---
Hi, did you see Jennifer's message about Pride Month?

To show our solidarity — and push back against the tide of anti-LGBTQ+ legislation and rhetoric being advanced by the GOP — we're determined to help reinvigorate the push for the Equality Act.

[**To stay on pace, we're hoping for another 2,000 people to sign on to support the Equality Act before this week ends. Please, will you add your name today? Every voice matters in the fight for justice.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64601974/410608283/1576266104?ms=EM_PET_230609EA_N_TW_FULL_11_NG_N_L3&refcode=EM_PET_230609EA_N_TW_FULL_11_NG_N_L3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDE0MTI2OS0wYTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfaJd2y36oMdB4eNThzSn9_h-nfdGIQXZ4etEaJpJrM=&emci=46c3f4cf-fa06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e0141269-0a07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)

Thank you,

Team Wexton

_**— Begin Forwarded Message —**_
> Friend,
>
> Pride Month is a time to celebrate the LGBTQ+ community, promote their visibility and dignity, and recommit to fighting for their equal rights. We honor the countless LGBTQ+ activists and trailblazers who've led the way — from the first brick thrown at Stonewall to the legal recognition of same-sex marriage.
>
> But as we celebrate greater inclusion and all the progress we've made, we must remember that the fight is far from over. And it's clear we're facing many new obstacles to equality.
>
> I'm alarmed by the wave of anti-LGBTQ+ legislation being passed in Republican-led states (particularly bills targeting trans youth). I'm very concerned by the recent rise of harsh and often threatening rhetoric about LGBTQ+ people that's been platformed by GOP politicians and media outlets like Fox News. **So this Pride Month, we need to demonstrate solidarity and make it clear that hate cannot and will not win.**
>
> One of the most effective ways to do that is by demonstrating the broad support that exists for policies that _expand_ LGBTQ+ rights. So I am renewing my call for Congress to pass the Equality Act, which would ensure that sexual orientation and gender identity are covered under federal civil rights laws.
>
> **I was proud to co-sponsor this bill when I first got to Congress, and I will not rest until it becomes law — no matter how long that takes.** [**Will you add your name and help me get 15,000 citizen co-signers this month in support of the Equality Act? Together, we can send a powerful message that a strong majority in this country stands with the LGBTQ+ community and wants active measures taken to protect their rights and respect their dignity.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64601975/410608284/1576266104?ms=EM_PET_230609EA_N_TW_FULL_11_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230609EA_N_TW_FULL_11_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDE0MTI2OS0wYTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfaJd2y36oMdB4eNThzSn9_h-nfdGIQXZ4etEaJpJrM=&emci=46c3f4cf-fa06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e0141269-0a07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64601976/410608285/1576266104?ms=EM_PET_230609EA_N_TW_FULL_11_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230609EA_N_TW_FULL_11_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDE0MTI2OS0wYTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfaJd2y36oMdB4eNThzSn9_h-nfdGIQXZ4etEaJpJrM=&emci=46c3f4cf-fa06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e0141269-0a07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) Right now, Americans in a majority of states can be fired from their jobs, denied credit, or evicted from their homes just because of who they are and who they love.
>
> Passing the Equality Act will advance fairness and justice, and it will improve the lives of millions of Americans. I'm under no illusions about the obstacles we face, but we have a moral imperative to keep the pressure on. **The message we send now matters down the line — whether in two months or two years.**
>
> [**I'm proud to fight for my family and friends in the LGBTQ+ community — this month and every month. Please join me and sign on to support the Equality Act →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64601977/410608286/1576266104?ms=EM_PET_230609EA_N_TW_FULL_11_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230609EA_N_TW_FULL_11_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDE0MTI2OS0wYTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfaJd2y36oMdB4eNThzSn9_h-nfdGIQXZ4etEaJpJrM=&emci=46c3f4cf-fa06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e0141269-0a07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)
>
> Thank you,
>
> Jennifer
| **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64601978/410608287/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230609EA_N_TW_FULL_11_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDE0MTI2OS0wYTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfaJd2y36oMdB4eNThzSn9_h-nfdGIQXZ4etEaJpJrM=)****
---

Sterling, VA 20165
United States

name: Darcy Draeger, Executive Director
subject: Districts for Democracy Weekly Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | Happy Friday, Friends!

We’d like to start our weekly update with some good news! **Hanover Township BOE Revises Policy That Could Out LGBTQ Students** On June 6, the Hanover Township Board of Education voted to repeal a recently adopted policy that would have required teachers to out LGBTQ students to their parents. The board replaced it with a [revised version](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64602203/410609053/-570000971?policyid=8463&id=310ce6b7ddfe43338f7b16dada41d682&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230609_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDMwNmRiNy0wYjA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_bof5oQYpOmJhNmK_wmzDADg9DBPS2v89N3SC3lhRU=&emci=5599f8a3-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) after critics argued it would violate a child’s right to privacy and state Attorney General Matt Platkin sued the district to stop implementation.

The original policy [laid out specific criteria](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64602204/410609054/2012331623?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230609_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDMwNmRiNy0wYjA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_bof5oQYpOmJhNmK_wmzDADg9DBPS2v89N3SC3lhRU=&emci=5599f8a3-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) that teachers were expected to use to inform parents about “concerning behavior” that included sexual orientation and gender identity. Gender identity is considered confidential information if a child decides to discuss it with a teacher or counselor.

As we highlighted last week, extremist school boards across New Jersey have been working to introduce similar anti-LGBTQ policies. This action should make it more difficult for other boards, including those in Colts Neck, Marlboro, and Middlesex, to successfully implement them.

We’d like to emphasize that progress like this would not be possible without concerned people showing up and pushing back on bad faith policies that harm teachers, students and schools. We urge everyone to make a point of regularly attending your local school board meetings this year. **Roxbury Places 11 Books Under Review** Speaking of showing up, if you live in the Roxbury area of Morris County we encourage you to wear red and attend the BOE meetings on June 12 and June 26 at 7:30PM. Locations vary; [you can check here to confirm.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64602205/410609055/1131391446?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230609_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDMwNmRiNy0wYjA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_bof5oQYpOmJhNmK_wmzDADg9DBPS2v89N3SC3lhRU=&emci=5599f8a3-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)

Amid the ongoing fight to remove books from Roxbury’s classrooms and libraries, the board of education has put 11 books under review. Many of these titles center LGBTQ+ stories and are being challenged in other districts across New Jersey. Click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64602206/410609056/-50940523?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230609_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDMwNmRiNy0wYjA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_bof5oQYpOmJhNmK_wmzDADg9DBPS2v89N3SC3lhRU=&emci=5599f8a3-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) to learn more about these books.

Local volunteers tell us that Moms for Liberty activists are planning to again show up in force to these meetings because they see an opportunity to take these books out of our kid’s hands. The Roxbury BOE still has a non-partisan majority; it’s vital we show up to support them and [school librarian Roxana Caivano.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64602207/410609057/697062833?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230609_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDMwNmRiNy0wYjA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_bof5oQYpOmJhNmK_wmzDADg9DBPS2v89N3SC3lhRU=&emci=5599f8a3-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) **The Education Culture Wars Are Coming for Climate Change** This week, New Jersey skies turned orange, outdoor sports and activities were canceled, and residents were advised to stay inside because of air quality issues. Why? Smoke from [wildfires burning across Canada](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64602208/410609058/994241829?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230609_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDMwNmRiNy0wYjA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_bof5oQYpOmJhNmK_wmzDADg9DBPS2v89N3SC3lhRU=&emci=5599f8a3-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) drifted down and smothered the Northeast. And while wildfires are a regular occurrence in Canada, their frequency and intensity is exacerbated by climate change.

Did you know New Jersey is the first state in America to adopt [standards for learning about climate change](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64602209/410609059/-370740815?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230609_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDMwNmRiNy0wYjA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_bof5oQYpOmJhNmK_wmzDADg9DBPS2v89N3SC3lhRU=&emci=5599f8a3-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)? They’re designed to prepare students to understand how and why climate change happens, the impact it has on our local and global communities and to act in informed and sustainable ways.

But, [as reporter Anya Kamenetz writes in _Grist_ this week](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64602210/410609060/-1244338358?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230609_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDMwNmRiNy0wYjA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_bof5oQYpOmJhNmK_wmzDADg9DBPS2v89N3SC3lhRU=&emci=5599f8a3-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294), it looks like climate change is next up in the war on education.

At the May 3 New Jersey Department of Education public hearing, organized right-wing activists testified against teaching the new climate change standards, including several who identified themselves as part of [Team Protect Your Children](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64602211/410609061/1299517435?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230609_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDMwNmRiNy0wYjA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_bof5oQYpOmJhNmK_wmzDADg9DBPS2v89N3SC3lhRU=&emci=5599f8a3-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c4306db7-0b07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) (Team PYC). This New Jersey-based group has spent years organizing against “the unsuitable normalization and glorification of abortion and the homosexual lifestyle” in public schools, in the words of one woman who spoke.

“Climate change is based on weak science,” said a Team PYC member named Kathleen Kirk, citing a roster of discredited scientists and a climate-denying documentary available on YouTube. “This global warming theory is very scary for little children.”

We’ll be watching this emerging issue closely, and hope you will do the same. **How Can You Help?** _**Boards can't do good work without good members:**_ Are there candidates who reflect your values running for school in your town? If not, can you help recruit some? Would you consider running for school board yourself? clean_body: | | Happy Friday, Friends! We’d like to start our weekly update with some good news! Hanover Township BOE Revises Policy That Could Out LGBTQ Students On June 6, the Hanover Township Board of Education voted to repeal a recently adopted policy that would have required teachers to out LGBTQ students to their parents. The board replaced it with a after critics argued it would violate a child’s right to privacy and state Attorney General Matt Platkin sued the district to stop implementation. The original policy that teachers were expected to use to inform parents about “concerning behavior” that included sexual orientation and gender identity. Gender identity is considered confidential information if a child decides to discuss it with a teacher or counselor. As we highlighted last week, extremist school boards across New Jersey have been working to introduce similar anti-LGBTQ policies. This action should make it more difficult for other boards, including those in Colts Neck, Marlboro, and Middlesex, to successfully implement them. We’d like to emphasize that progress like this would not be possible without concerned people showing up and pushing back on bad faith policies that harm teachers, students and schools. We urge everyone to make a point of regularly attending your local school board meetings this year. Roxbury Places 11 Books Under Review Speaking of showing up, if you live in the Roxbury area of Morris County we encourage you to wear red and attend the BOE meetings on June 12 and June 26 at 7:30PM. Locations vary; Amid the ongoing fight to remove books from Roxbury’s classrooms and libraries, the board of education has put 11 books under review. Many of these titles center LGBTQ+ stories and are being challenged in other districts across New Jersey. Click to learn more about these books. Local volunteers tell us that Moms for Liberty activists are planning to again show up in force to these meetings because they see an opportunity to take these books out of our kid’s hands. name: Working Families Party
subject: West coast air quality crisis reaches East coast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
clean_body: The cost of inaction is mounting, and as a country, we need to act now and deliver deep cuts to emissions. | | | Peter, This week, 98 million people in the U.S. were under ‘Code Red’ air quality alerts after hazardous smoke from over 400 Canadian wildfires drifted south, blanketing parts of the Northeast, Mid-Atlantic, Ohio Valley, and Midwest in a thick, orange haze. Overnight, New York City had the worst air quality of any major city on Earth** — and amid the acrid smoke and ominous Mars-like skies, people in over 18 states got a devastating wake-up call: The climate crisis is not coming. It is here now. And it impacts everyone, everywhere. . What people on the East Coast experienced this week is a version of what some of the rest of the country, and parts of the world, have already been dealing with for years. On Pacific islands , indigenous people are already bearing the brunt of tidal changes. In the Global South , Black and brown folks are already undergoing climate-forced migration. And on our very own West Coast , record-breaking heat and wildfires are already scorching homes and leaving low-income families with nowhere to go. The weather extremes and climate disasters we are** allalready living through make it clear that we’re out of time. This is an emergency. And we need to treat it as one. We have already locked in a hotter future, but we still have a chance to prevent the most devastating outcomes and create a livable future for all. Declaring a National Climate Emergency would enable President Biden to unlock the tools and resources to tackle this crisis head on and safeguard our planet, including the ability to: Halt crude oil exports; Suspend offshore oil and gas drilling; Restrict international trade in fossil fuels; Order the construction of renewable energy systems in climate-vulnerable communities; And leverage Defense Production Act (DPA) funds to manufacture clean energy tech.1 The cost of inaction is mounting, and as a country, we need to act now and deliver deep cuts to emissions. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , The New York Times, July 21, 2022 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Trump indictment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Less than an hour after being indicted on 7 federal charges yesterday, Trump sent out a fundraising email.
He did the same thing in March after being indicted for sexual abuse. Trump’s base donated over $4 million in less than 24 hours. That is a lot of money to spread hate.
[We need to be ready to fight back. Will you chip in $3 today to keep our movement going strong? Every contribution helps to power our grassroots campaign for progress.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230609.538MzQ&refcode=em20230609-4453-P_FND_RES_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4453%2E2526796%2EzZ-INZ)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230609.538MzQ&refcode=em20230609-4453-P_FND_RES_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4453%2E2526796%2EzZ-INZ)**
House Speaker Kevin McCarthy released a statement last night defending Trump and promising that ‘House Republicans will hold this brazen weaponization of power accountable.’ Republican leaders have made it clear — **they are going to do whatever is necessary to protect Donald Trump.**
On the Oversight Committee, where Alexandria holds the #2 spot for Democrats, Republicans are starting completely baseless investigations into President Biden. Their goal is to dirty the waters and create a false sense of equivalency between him and President Trump. We can’t let that happen.
[Democrats on every level, from Congress to the statehouse, are going to have to fight back against Trump’s efforts to get back into the White House. Will you make a contribution of $3 today to power our movement against Trump's extremism?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230609.538MzQ&refcode=em20230609-4453-P_FND_RES_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4453%2E2526796%2EzZ-INZ)
From all of us here on the campaign, we thank you for your support.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230609?refcode=em20230609-4453-P_FND_RES_GOL&t=22&refcode2=4453_2526796_zZ-INZ&akid=4453%2E2526796%2EzZ-INZ)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230609-4453-P_FND_RES_GOL&t=23&akid=4453%2E2526796%2EzZ-INZ)**

Their goal is to dirty the waters and create a false sense of equivalency between him and President Trump. We can’t let that happen. From all of us here on the campaign, we thank you for your support. Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Will Rollins
subject: re: Trump’s indictment.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64602724/410610965/1321783056?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWIwZDlmNy0wZjA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gXXHUjgwV4WeSAl9gpwRPPWZRJdGob78L3kGNyEJJ5k=)
Peter,

In case you missed yesterday’s news, the 45th President of the United States has been indicted for the second time this year.

This time, the charges relate to highly classified documents recovered from his Mar-a-Lago resort in Florida.

There will be a lot of attempts to politicize these charges in the coming days, weeks, and months ahead. But as a former federal prosecutor who specialized in national security, I will tell you this: **no one is above the law, and everyone charged with a crime deserves a fair and speedy trial.**

The rule of law is a bedrock of American society. But Peter, here’s what’s concerning me: our current congressman, Ken Calvert, is blindly loyal to far right radicals in Washington who defend their own no matter what the evidence will prove. We _know_ that Calvert doesn’t have the spine to stand up to President Trump, even in the most extreme cases. In fact, when the Mar-a-Lago investigation was first announced, Calvert attacked law enforcement, claiming that the FBI had been infiltrated by “rot.”

Calvert is a full-blown MAGA extremist. In 2022, he heavily touted Trump’s endorsement. Here’s what Trump had to say about Calvert:

_**“Congressman Ken Calvert is doing a fantastic job representing the people of California in Congress...Ken is a leader on National Security and Strongly Supports our Brave Military and Vets.” — President Trump**_

Just months later, Calvert voted for Kevin McCarthy’s debt ceiling proposal that would have defunded border security, defunded our local law enforcement agencies, and cut veterans’ health care benefits.

That’s right — Calvert is all partisan politics, no results for Riverside County. No respect for the law enforcement and intelligence community officers who put their lives on the line to protect our national security secrets. Now, I believe we can finally end his 30-year political career in 2024, but it’s going to take a lot of work.

[**Calvert has already raised over $1 million towards his 2024 campaign, and we can’t fall too far behind, even though we started later. That’s why I’m asking if you’ll chip in $3 or whatever you can spare towards our campaign to flip this seat next November >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64602725/410610968/1321783056?refcode=em-6.9.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWIwZDlmNy0wZjA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gXXHUjgwV4WeSAl9gpwRPPWZRJdGob78L3kGNyEJJ5k=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64602726/410610969/1321783056?refcode=em-6.9.23-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWIwZDlmNy0wZjA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gXXHUjgwV4WeSAl9gpwRPPWZRJdGob78L3kGNyEJJ5k=)

clean_body: | = Peter, In case you missed yesterday’s news, the 45th President of the United States has been indicted for the second time this year. This time, the charges relate to highly classified documents recovered from his Mar-a-Lago resort in Florida. There will be a lot of attempts to politicize these charges in the coming days, weeks, and months ahead. But as a former federal prosecutor who specialized in national security, I will tell you this: no one is above the law, and everyone charged with a crime deserves a fair and speedy trial. The rule of law is a bedrock of American society. But Peter, here’s what’s concerning me: our current congressman, Ken Calvert, is blindly loyal to far right radicals in Washington who defend their own no matter what the evidence will prove. We know that Calvert doesn’t have the spine to stand up to President Trump, even in the most extreme cases. In fact, when the Mar-a-Lago investigation was first announced, Calvert attacked law enforcement, claiming that the FBI had been infiltrated by “rot.” Calvert is a full-blown MAGA extremist. In 2022, he heavily touted Trump’s endorsement. Here’s what Trump had to say about Calvert: “Congressman Ken Calvert is doing a fantastic job representing the people of California in Congress...Ken is a leader on National Security and Strongly Supports our Brave Military and Vets.” — President Trump Just months later, Calvert voted for Kevin McCarthy’s debt ceiling proposal that would have defunded border security, defunded our local law enforcement agencies, and cut veterans’ health care benefits. That’s right — Calvert is all partisan politics, no results for Riverside County. No respect for the law enforcement and intelligence community officers who put their lives on the line to protect our national security secrets. Now, I believe we can finally end his 30-year political career in 2024, but it’s going to take a lot of work. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Now more than ever, our country needs us standing strong. Together. — Will | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. subject: Hey Joe! That's Unconstitutional.
body:
Trump says he has been indicted on federal charges. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-alkhre-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkhre-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Friday! Former President Trump says [_he has been indicted on federal charges._](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkhre-trhiujldw-y/)**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkhre-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkhre-trhiujldw-t/) **China Wants to Spy on US** **[Beijing is set to build an electronic eavesdropping facility in Cuba](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkhre-trhiujldw-i/), **just 100 miles from the coast of Florida, that will be able to gather US military secrets. **28th Amendment** Gavin** [Newsom unveiled a proposed 28th Amendment to the Constitution](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkhre-trhiujldw-d/) **that would implement "common sense" gun safety measures he claims have widespread bipartisan support. **Hey Biden! That's Unconstitutional.** **[Biden vetoed the bill that would have scrapped his $400 billion student loan handout](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkhre-trhiujldw-h/)** and vowed he was not "going to back down" when it came to forgiving the college debt of millions nationwide.

**You Don't Say** A self-proclaimed "liberal woman" went viral on TikTok recently**[for posting a video complaining about not being able to find a masculine man who is "not conservative."](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkhre-trhiujldw-k/)** **Let Them Sing** Former President Donald Trump **[offered a children's choir center stage](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkhre-trhiujldw-u/)** at his next rally in South Carolina after Capital Police muzzled them. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkhre-trhiujldw-o/)!**
* **[Habanero](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkhre-trhiujldw-x/)**.
* The **[rest of the story](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkhre-trhiujldw-m/).**
* What's**[your sign](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkhre-trhiujldw-c/)?**
* Where is the**[dipstick](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkhre-trhiujldw-q/)?**

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: Celebrating this victory, but our work isn’t done in North Carolina.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
As we celebrate this victory, we cannot turn away from the challenges we’re facing in North Carolina.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64603001/410612020/-342827316?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230609-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzZmZjAyNC0xMTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P8If7basWjJfjrh2ql5O1ALh2N7mZpwaCaFfAH1OCuc=)
---
| Peter,

Just yesterday, the Supreme Court ruled in favor of Alabama voters in a case that was set to challenge equal access to the ballot.

In a political environment that is growing increasingly comfortable with challenging our fundamental right to vote, this represents an enormous victory for democracy and voting rights, not just in Alabama, but across the country.

This reaffirms what we’ve known all along – every voter should have the ability to participate in the democratic process free of discriminatory barriers. But as we celebrate this victory, we cannot turn away from the challenges we’re facing in North Carolina.

**From restrictive voter ID laws to gerrymandering, our state has experienced attempts to suppress the voices of marginalized communities, particularly communities of color. With North Carolina’s new GOP majority in the Supreme Court, Republicans are more emboldened than ever to exercise power grabs at the expense of North Carolina voters.**

We cannot afford to let this happen.

I’m working every day in Congress to protect and expand access to the ballot box, advocate for fair districting, and combat voter suppression tactics. But I need your support to keep up the momentum. [_**Will you support my campaign with a $10 contribution today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64603004/410612022/-342827316?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230609-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzZmZjAyNC0xMTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P8If7basWjJfjrh2ql5O1ALh2N7mZpwaCaFfAH1OCuc=)
---

Onward,

Valerie

clean_body: As we celebrate this victory, we cannot turn away from the challenges we’re facing in North Carolina. | = | Peter, Just yesterday, the Supreme Court ruled in favor of Alabama voters in a case that was set to challenge equal access to the ballot. In a political environment that is growing increasingly comfortable with challenging our fundamental right to vote, this represents an enormous victory for democracy and voting rights, not just in Alabama, but across the country. This reaffirms what we’ve known all along – every voter should have the ability to participate in the democratic process free of discriminatory barriers. But as we celebrate this victory, we cannot turn away from the challenges we’re facing in North Carolina. From restrictive voter ID laws to gerrymandering, our state has experienced attempts to suppress the voices of marginalized communities, particularly communities of color. With North Carolina’s new GOP majority in the Supreme Court, Republicans are more emboldened than ever to exercise power grabs at the expense of North Carolina voters. We cannot afford to let this happen. I’m working every day in Congress to protect and expand access to the ballot box, advocate for fair districting, and combat voter suppression tactics. But I need your support to keep up the momentum. = | = I know you hear this a lot, but your support truly does go a long way. Onward, Valerie * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Crushing debt is a crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
At a time when people feel the squeeze from inflation and high interest rates, we absolutely cannot afford to saddle graduates with this burden.
#
Peter, I’m extremely concerned.
After holding our economy hostage, the GOP forced through a debt ceiling deal that codifies the end of the student-loan payment pause that’s been ongoing since the pandemic started.
At a time when people feel the squeeze from inflation and high interest rates, we absolutely cannot afford to saddle graduates with this burden. Student debt was a crisis before the pandemic started – and it’s still one now. We can’t stop fighting to deliver relief for the more than 40 million Americans with crushing debt.
**That’s why I’m rallying members of the Progressive Caucus to demand we extend the pause now and keep fighting to deliver the life-changing relief we promised borrowers.**
Peter, my ability to lead these central fights in Congress is contingent on getting re-elected and showing strong fundraising numbers. I’m writing today because our end-of-quarter deadline is coming up fast and I need your help to meet our online fundraising goals.
[**Will you make a $3 donation to keep us in Congress leading these important fights? Whether you give $5 or $50, it makes a big difference — especially heading into our EOQ deadline.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42418?refcode=em20230609-2585&t=1&akid=2585%2E420207%2EbP7Ie3)
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42418?refcode=em20230609-2585&t=20&akid=2585%2E420207%2EbP7Ie3)**
Democrats need to show working people we stand up for them. The eyes of the nation are on us right now. We can’t let them down.
Thanks for making a donation today. It means a lot.
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230609-2585-footer&t=21&refcode2=2585_420207_bP7Ie3&akid=2585%2E420207%2EbP7Ie3)**

name: Jane Fonda
subject: We need a climate leader
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Holding our elected leaders accountable for their role in perpetuating this crisis, no matter what office they hold or what party they support.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64603176/410612670/-1917331050?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiMGYyZjhhLTExMDctZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XuLEFqiK11PqybgiKKXykJtuzFfaIaFZNAUpK_KcT34=&emci=390f2f8a-1107-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3b0f2f8a-1107-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)
---
| Hi team, Jane Fonda here.

I wanted to take a moment to share some information about recent developments in the fight against fossil fuels and an urgent call to action. You may know already that over the last few years, I have dedicated my life to ending the era of fossil fuels. [_**Read on for more information about how you can join me in that fight, but if you’re in a hurry, RSVP now to join me on Thursday, June 15 at 8 PM ET to be among the first to plug in to our plan to March to End Fossil Fuels.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64603177/410612671/493326363?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiMGYyZjhhLTExMDctZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XuLEFqiK11PqybgiKKXykJtuzFfaIaFZNAUpK_KcT34=&emci=390f2f8a-1107-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3b0f2f8a-1107-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)
---
| [RSVP ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64603178/410612672/493326363?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiMGYyZjhhLTExMDctZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XuLEFqiK11PqybgiKKXykJtuzFfaIaFZNAUpK_KcT34=&emci=390f2f8a-1107-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3b0f2f8a-1107-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)
---
**That means holding our elected leaders accountable** for their role in perpetuating this crisis, no matter what office they hold or what party they support. Recently, I have been increasingly concerned about President Biden’s leadership on this issue. Since he took office, he has approved one new oil and gas project after another – the Willow project in Alaska, offshore drilling in the Gulf of Mexico, and a constellation of new gas export terminals.

At each step along the way, the Administration has tried to defer accountability – citing one legal or political excuse after another to defer accountability as long as possible.

**We have reached a turning point.** To secure the votes necessary to pass the Debt Ceiling Bill, the president agreed to green light the Mountain Valley Pipeline, a dangerous and unnecessary fossil fuel project, and to weaken broader environmental protections moving forward.

He pushed through this deal after intense and vocal opposition from many sides – from frontline communities directly in the pipeline path to even more “moderate” members of his own party in the House and Senate. This is an alarming sign the president is prioritizing the interests of the fossil fuel industry and fringe elements of both parties over the people he was elected to serve.

**Now, the whole world is watching what comes next.** The UN Secretary-General is convening a climate summit in September, and it is expected that the “ticket to entry” for world leaders may be a commitment to move away from fossil fuels. We’re going to take that opportunity to demand the president and other world leaders commit to do the hard work it will take to transition all of our communities off fossil fuels for good. [_**This is where you come in. Join me and other special guests on June 15 at the 8 PM ET Kickoff Call for the March to End Fossil Fuels to be the first to know how you can get involved.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64603179/410612673/493326363?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiMGYyZjhhLTExMDctZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XuLEFqiK11PqybgiKKXykJtuzFfaIaFZNAUpK_KcT34=&emci=390f2f8a-1107-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3b0f2f8a-1107-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)
| [RSVP ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64603180/410612674/493326363?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiMGYyZjhhLTExMDctZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XuLEFqiK11PqybgiKKXykJtuzFfaIaFZNAUpK_KcT34=&emci=390f2f8a-1107-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3b0f2f8a-1107-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)
---
We will mobilize an unprecedented number of people in New York City in September, but we know not everyone will be able to be there in person. Whether you can travel to New York or not, we need your help! Join our kickoff call to learn more about how anyone can get involved right away.

I believe together, we will be able to hold our leaders accountable and change our course before it is too late, but we need to act now. I hope to see you on Thursday!

With Gratitude,
Jane Fonda [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64603181/410612675/493326363?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiMGYyZjhhLTExMDctZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XuLEFqiK11PqybgiKKXykJtuzFfaIaFZNAUpK_KcT34=&emci=390f2f8a-1107-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3b0f2f8a-1107-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: the current threat to our planet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
This is no fluke, this is the climate crisis in action.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64603313/410613323/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230609-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2Y5NTNlYTctMTIwNy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EliX5sSXZcV1Z2M8tpq4JOsCFEKav671qPkoE8Ojocs=)
---
| Peter,

As I’m sure you’ve seen, smoke from raging wildfires in Canada has wafted into our communities, causing air quality to plummet to dangerous levels and our vision to be obscured by an unsettling haze.

The northern blaze has contaminated the air we breathe to unprecedented levels. As the chair of the Conservation and Forestry subcommittee in Congress, I spent the last four years seeing the impact of climate change as our own fire “seasons” increasingly spanned longer and longer, putting lives, livelihoods, and health in danger. _**This is no fluke, this is the climate crisis in action.**_

In Congress, I’ve made it a top priority to address the climate crisis. The future of our children’s planet is at stake, and we still have time to reverse the harm climate change has done before that impact becomes permanent.

I’m answering that call by advocating for sustainable climate policy and securing key investments to create climate-conscious jobs and build a greener Virginia for tomorrow.

The scale of these wildfires is the latest in a long string of signs pointing toward the need for climate action. clean_body: This is no fluke, this is the climate crisis in action. | = | Peter, As I’m sure you’ve seen, smoke from raging wildfires in Canada has wafted into our communities, causing air quality to plummet to dangerous levels and our vision to be obscured by an unsettling haze. The northern blaze has contaminated the air we breathe to unprecedented levels. As the chair of the Conservation and Forestry subcommittee in Congress, I spent the last four years seeing the impact of climate change as our own fire “seasons” increasingly spanned longer and longer, putting lives, livelihoods, and health in danger. This is no fluke, this is the climate crisis in action. In Congress, I’ve made it a top priority to address the climate crisis. The future of our children’s planet is at stake, and we still have time to reverse the harm climate change has done before that impact becomes permanent. I’m answering that call by advocating for sustainable climate policy and securing key investments to create climate-conscious jobs and build a greener Virginia for tomorrow. The scale of these wildfires is the latest in a long string of signs pointing toward the need for climate action. = | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support for climate action, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. I wanted to catch you before the weekend, friend. Earlier this week, President Biden signed the Fiscal Responsibility Act of 2023 into law. We got to this point because my colleagues and I took a critical vote to lift America’s debt ceiling. Meanwhile, my MAGA colleagues sat on the sidelines as they openly admitted they were willing to let America default on its debt — for the first time ever. **_Then there is Marjorie Taylor Greene._ Congresswoman Greene openly admitted she was ONLY voting to rightly pay America’s bills because she would get “dessert” out of this “sh*t sandwich” piece of legislation.** | [GET OFF THE DESSERT MENU!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64603806/410614709/-1733728394?refcode=E21690-20230609-MTGSandwich-SB-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWRlYzA3Ny0xNDA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wbz1AN37Nxu0_oi9P0GdOMGVZ6zzDm8etlzXkHIOOrY=)

---
| **I’m excited to announce that Washington Senator Keith Wagoner has endorsed my campaign to serve in Congress!**

>From the defense of our Constitutional rights to the boots on the ground advocacy Senator Wagoner has engaged in, _he has shown that he is a genuine citizen legislator_.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=a4d319ca14&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| **Senator Wagoner shared the following statement: **

_“Carmen will provide balanced and thoughtful leadership to the 8th Congressional District. I strongly endorse her for this critical position.”_

_**I am deeply honored to receive the endorsement of Senator Wagoner**_ , as it symbolizes our shared commitment to tackle the critical issues that are affecting the people of Washington.

Throughout his tenure as a state senator, Keith Wagoner has been a tireless advocate for the people of Washington, fighting for a variety of crucial issues that directly impact lives. His unwavering commitment to finding innovative solutions for safe and affordable housing, as well as his dedication to supporting veterans, has earned him respect and admiration from his constituents.

Senator Wagoner's endeavors to ensure access to behavioral and mental health facilities have been instrumental in offering pathways to life improvement for struggling Washingtonians. His ongoing efforts to address the growing opioid epidemic have also demonstrated his commitment to tackling critical public health challenges.

Senator Wagoner has also been a vocal proponent of protecting private property rights, a cornerstone of individual freedom.

**Peter, we have so much work to do to turn around our dire situation in Washington from surging crime, to drug addiction, fentanyl overdoses and homelessness!**

**As a Congresswoman representing Washingtonians,** I look forward to rolling up my sleeves and joining in collaborative efforts with leaders such as Senator Wagoner to bring solutions to our biggest problems.

[**With these incredible endorsements, I hope I can count on your support of my commitment to serve as a problem solver who will answer to the people of Washington from the halls of Congress?**](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=06c92d6322&e=0e51d1e991)

Friend,
You only have to ask one question...
_**Why is it ONLY our movement that is targeted, persecuted, and dragged through witch hunt after witch hunt?**_
It’s very simple, this is **ELECTION INTERFERENCE** of the highest order.
The Deep State happily turns a blind eye to Crooked Joe Biden – the most corrupt politician in HISTORY – all while they spin up one hoax after another to try and “get Trump” and destroy our campaign that puts YOU first.
_It’s never been about justice to them, it’s about concocting a Soviet-style plot to try and force us out of the 2024 election._
They think that if they bury me in enough lies, smears, and**INDICTMENTS** , then I’ll throw up my hands and give up on our beautiful movement.
_**They are sorely mistaken.**_
I will **NEVER SURRENDER** our country to the radical Left!
The Democrats and the Deep State seem to think that with each passing witch hunt they are chipping away at our resolve, breaking down our spirit...
**Friend, my resolve to SAVE our country has _never_ been stronger!**
And it’s all because of YOU.
_You are my courage, my strength, and my hope that we can and we WILL save America in the face of this Third World tyranny._
Together, we are taking a stand for TRUE justice.

clean_body: Just ask yourself this... | | | Friend, You only have to ask one question... Why is it ONLY our movement that is targeted, persecuted, and dragged through witch hunt after witch hunt? It’s very simple, this is ELECTION INTERFERENCE of the highest order. The Deep State happily turns a blind eye to Crooked Joe Biden – the most corrupt politician in HISTORY – all while they spin up one hoax after another to try and “get Trump” and destroy our campaign that puts YOU first. It’s never been about justice to them, it’s about concocting a Soviet-style plot to try and force us out of the 2024 election. They think that if they bury me in enough lies, smears, andINDICTMENTS , then I’ll throw up my hands and give up on our beautiful movement. They are sorely mistaken. I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left! The Democrats and the Deep State seem to think that with each passing witch hunt they are chipping away at our resolve, breaking down our spirit... Friend, my resolve to SAVE our country has never been stronger! And it’s all because of YOU. You are my courage, my strength, and my hope that we can and we WILL save America in the face of this Third World tyranny. Together, we are taking a stand for TRUE justice. | | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J.
