body:
Together, we can make a lasting impact and ensure a brighter, more sustainable future for all.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64604110/410615535/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDBmM2RlZGMtMTUwNy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GbgdMyUil7wBbB70MQ8ZpMCXe7N6bOz1lLLPWKv-040=&emci=df0aed2d-0e07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=00f3dedc-1507-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

This week, we celebrated World Oceans Day, Peter!

As someone who was born and raised on the Olympic Peninsula, Derek understands the critical role our natural resources play in our daily lives.

**That's why we wanted to take a moment to reflect on the incredible investments and victories Derek's helped achieve — _with your support!_ — in our ongoing mission to protect our oceans and ensure the resilience of our coastal communities:**

✅ Secured a remarkable $448.2 million in infrastructure investments to help protect our homes, businesses, and vital infrastructure from the effects of climate change

✅ Established the Puget Sound Federal Leadership Task Force to coordinate the federal government’s efforts to restore Puget Sound and address Tribal treaty rights

✅ Secured record funding for salmon restoration and Puget Sound recovery with new grants to remove fish barriers, restore salmon habitats, and boost orca populations

✅ Led the introduction of the Blue Economy Innovation Act, legislation to combat the climate crisis through ocean-based energy.

clean_body: Together, we can make a lasting impact and ensure a brighter, more sustainable future for all. This week, we celebrated World Oceans Day, Peter! As someone who was born and raised on the Olympic Peninsula, Derek understands the critical role our natural resources play in our daily lives. That's why we wanted to take a moment to reflect on the incredible investments and victories Derek's helped achieve — with your support! — in our ongoing mission to protect our oceans and ensure the resilience of our coastal communities: ✅ Secured a remarkable $448.2 million in infrastructure investments to help protect our homes, businesses, and vital infrastructure from the effects of climate change ✅ Established the Puget Sound Federal Leadership Task Force to coordinate the federal government’s efforts to restore Puget Sound and address Tribal treaty rights ✅ Secured record funding for salmon restoration and Puget Sound recovery with new grants to remove fish barriers, restore salmon habitats, and boost orca populations ✅ Led the introduction of the Blue Economy Innovation Act, legislation to combat the climate crisis through ocean-based energy. There's only one Earth, and it is our moral obligation to continue the fight for real solutions that safeguard our environment and the well-being of its inhabitants. By working together, we can leave a lasting legacy of a healthier, more resilient planet for future generations. Thank you, Team Kilmer Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma, WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. | =

name: Our Revolution
subject: Biden has the power to cancel student debt

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Khanna_Student_Debt_Plan/?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_PT_OR_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_KhannaStudentDebtPlan&t=1009&akid=4358%2E5885482%2E7WuX_a ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

45 million Americans are anxiously awaiting
clarity on their student loan payments, causing lots of sleepless nights
and avoidable stress.

A condition in the debt-ceiling negotiations will end the student loan
payment pause on August 30, and the Supreme Court could overturn student
loan forgiveness altogether this month.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Khanna_Student_Debt_Plan/?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_PT_OR_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_KhannaStudentDebtPlan&t=1010&akid=4358%2E5885482%2E7WuX_a ]That’s why we’re joining Ro Khanna to call on President Biden to take
immediate action to forgive $50,000 in student loan debt, expand relief
programs, and extend the payment pause. Add your name if you agree!

Resuming these payments in the middle of an affordability crisis will be
crushing.

Americans deserve more financial freedom, not less. They deserve the
freedom to buy homes and build wealth. They deserve the freedom to pursue
their dreams.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Khanna_Student_Debt_Plan/?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_PT_OR_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_KhannaStudentDebtPlan&t=1011&akid=4358%2E5885482%2E7WuX_a ]Sign here to join Our Revolution and Ro Khanna in demanding President
Biden take action to protect and expand student debt relief.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

establishment by committing as a 2023 Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $10 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_PT_OR_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_KhannaStudentDebtPlan.bc9Glq&t=1003&akid=4358%2E5885482%2E7WuX_a ]GIVE MONTHLY

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64604516/410617151/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQxYWY1Yy0xOTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSygKDXJFEMwVfruYJJ6AiTvdi7C6n2gX-ycXPySHCg=)

Peter— _Happy Pride Month!_ 🏳️🌈🏳️🌈🏳️🌈

Pride Month is a time to celebrate the wonderful contributions that LGBTQ people have made to our communities, and reflect on how close we are to realizing the vision of equality.

**However, the mission is far from accomplished as LGBTQ people nationwide remain unprotected from discrimination.** | [So to kick off Pride month, I’m calling on 5,000 Democrats to call on Congress to pass the Equality Act. It’s past time to extend federal anti-discrimination protections to LGBTQ Americans. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64604517/410617152/-2010328507?refcode=RTFC_20230609_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQxYWY1Yy0xOTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSygKDXJFEMwVfruYJJ6AiTvdi7C6n2gX-ycXPySHCg=&emci=3b52e689-f406-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=54d1af5c-1907-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=34594689) **GOAL: 5,000 SIGNATURES BY MIDNIGHT** | [ADD MY NAME: PASS THE EQUALITY ACT »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64604519/410617153/-2010328507?refcode=RTFC_20230609_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQxYWY1Yy0xOTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSygKDXJFEMwVfruYJJ6AiTvdi7C6n2gX-ycXPySHCg=&emci=3b52e689-f406-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=54d1af5c-1907-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=34594689)

The Equality Act has already passed the House of Representatives twice, but thanks to Republican stonewalling, it has languished in the Senate every time.

It now needs to be introduced in the House again and gain 60 votes in the Senate in order to be sent to President Biden’s desk.

**As the first LGBTQ Afro-Latino member of Congress, I feel the weight of history on my shoulders. On behalf of my community, I am here to claim what discrimination denies – equal protection under the law.**

As we watch dozens of states pass legislation codifying discrimination into law, it’s clear that we need the Equality Act more than EVER.
[Please, Peter: Call on Congress to pass the Equality Act »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64604520/410617154/-2010328507?refcode=RTFC_20230609_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQxYWY1Yy0xOTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSygKDXJFEMwVfruYJJ6AiTvdi7C6n2gX-ycXPySHCg=&emci=3b52e689-f406-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=54d1af5c-1907-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=34594689) **GOAL: 5,000 SIGNATURES BY MIDNIGHT** | [ADD MY NAME: PASS THE EQUALITY ACT »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64604521/410617155/-2010328507?refcode=RTFC_20230609_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQxYWY1Yy0xOTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSygKDXJFEMwVfruYJJ6AiTvdi7C6n2gX-ycXPySHCg=&emci=3b52e689-f406-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=54d1af5c-1907-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=34594689)

Thank you,

_Ritchie_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Jon Tester
subject: “most likely to flip”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stop Gun Violence PAC
body:
The target on our backs will only get bigger as we grow this campaign.

| Peter — Everywhere you look, the media and political pundits say I’m one of the “**most vulnerable** ” Democratic senators and this seat is one of the “**most likely to flip** ” in 2024.

The target on our backs will only get bigger as we grow this campaign—Mitch McConnell and national Republicans will stop at nothing to take this seat and gain back their majority. ICYMI: Last weekend, President Biden signed into law a bipartisan budget agreement that prevents a first-ever default while reducing the deficit, safeguarding critical programs, and fulfilling our sacred obligation to our veterans. **Now, we can continue the work of building the strongest economy in the world. Read on to learn more about what the Bipartisan Budget Agreement includes ↓**
* * *
**PROTECTING CLEAN ENERGY** Since President Biden and Vice President Harris have been in office, clean energy and advanced manufacturing have brought in $470 billion in private investments, creating thousands of good-paying jobs all across the country and helping the environment at the same time. The Bipartisan Budget Agreement also allows the U.S. to get energy projects online even faster while maintaining those same environmental protections.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEA0Es8AR8U9h_eL5jzwmAKy8CPWXmMSKb979xq4aFRMyIokDW9Y4EzhZwyVLh-yyLFt6vZyl9FdIJF4lCtQZS054uMsIAqjO9xggHu1UJc-7OK-bmab-V1NZSzJYINPVFXzv02jW5aOI-jyKC1hKd0Vfi2-OArBnzoBX90i4c6hT9myRoqoO7YY_AXHpd-obLo61khFajHNMR7torOkWz7JKJWx_Kk_UcSGQ602USgH59WfSnylW02w77uJ2OYh4fsH8KSxZLn1yNHypOA9BkTGDUFAjfp_TmVVGHd2GvMRCd1PMNNZnfz7Tqg-u1iNkx8imwtcApALIpJWeL9_3iVFltweCkuDXyqh-h06PmFF-ubDt-8vT4I7u2mUy9BoS5RSlaDbm2zGaaWHOARz8avw93ZxL9nRp3-3iD9tcv7W/3ww/gjVSLAk1QhKBERuIF3VXOg/h0/G_SGFn62JDcrwRvWhcjGecSrD95_ri1BHJPptWxMYYA)

* * *
**PROTECTING AGGRESSIVE CLIMATE ACTIONS** Last year, the Biden-Harris administration passed the biggest investment in combating climate change in our nation’s history. Thanks to the Bipartisan Budget Agreement, that investment is protected.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEA0Es8AR8U9h_eL5jzwmAKy8CPWXmMSKb979xq4aFRMyIokDW9Y4EzhZwyVLh-yyLFt6vZyl9FdIJF4lCtQZS054uMsIAqjO9xggHu1UJc-7OK-bmab-V1NZSzJYINPVFXzv02jW5aOI-jyKC1hKd0Vfi2-OArBnzoBX90i4c6hT9myRoqoO7YY_AXHpd-obE9Wy6YIOeIFMqcjrAce_ioYQ_4uys75agF5LWdz4rXBF9yS0XV2kc9Eo08epu3QakbhA4CBgOSizLFvSNHDVKJoKlKbcdqJya9NoHmC2arAzPxvaYecAdwS20bqpwz9HXpdE85perzKwNH1NZll8zXMUovxGzNhcREiULJ6xu2HQbIiXYRABx7xJDhyTxq-SB__I2Z9Z_dshJ0DsTlGikmkiH5RDyIGBUmy_AyxW8j-/3ww/gjVSLAk1QhKBERuIF3VXOg/h1/23x4o8SaENN0O_f8sqlqU0MWiopsTMhpJBf2A-9XiR0)

* * *
**PROTECTING AMERICANS’ HEALTH CARE AND RETIREMENT SECURITY** The Bipartisan Budget Agreement protects the progress the Biden-Harris administration has made on health care -- and rejects proposals that would have put Medicaid coverage at risk for 21 million Americans. In addition, this bill fully funds the bipartisan PACT Act, the most significant law in decades for veterans exposed to toxic burn pits and for their families. It expands veterans’ access to health care and to disability benefits.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEA0Es8AR8U9h_eL5jzwmAKy8CPWXmMSKb979xq4aFRMyIokDW9Y4EzhZwyVLh-yyLFt6vZyl9FdIJF4lCtQZS054uMsIAqjO9xggHu1UJc-7OK-bmab-V1NZSzJYINPVFXzv02jW5aOI-jyKC1hKd0Vfi2-OArBnzoBX90i4c6hT9myRoqoO7YY_AXHpd-obCJlsZLyRGpiHhRZjPR48bCBFNf2hcgm_Q3nk7dUfCxLvkQWhGxmnMn4OqooPL_YQKbGHsBYVhKS3GnDgeIz-UQGrMW9kYoQnB4RrfLB_gjBYNnPDcYCVfsxI3TasE1tgRtkG5wzZrr2z_VBTvVLg5JGXMbW650p6B4lq9BqEq86qD8thBw8xRGU2fqdTkNk5sz1Ea1XWFMxKCJqDF7GqbYO32CB5Ow6rzUuYVtumXxX/3ww/gjVSLAk1QhKBERuIF3VXOg/h2/zMiSIpzZYKintGMBYS2OJOPCCbd7_nXV2Lc2daB5mS0)

* * *

clean_body: Read on to learn more about what the Bipartisan Budget Agreement includes ↓ | | | ICYMI: Last weekend, President Biden signed into law a bipartisan budget agreement that prevents a first-ever default while reducing the deficit, safeguarding critical programs, and fulfilling our sacred obligation to our veterans. Now, we can continue the work of building the strongest economy in the world. Read on to learn more about what the Bipartisan Budget Agreement includes ↓ PROTECTING CLEAN ENERGY Since President Biden and Vice President Harris have been in office, clean energy and advanced manufacturing have brought in $470 billion in private investments, creating thousands of good-paying jobs all across the country and helping the environment at the same time. The Bipartisan Budget Agreement also allows the U.S. to get energy projects online even faster while maintaining those same environmental protections. PROTECTING AGGRESSIVE CLIMATE ACTIONS Last year, the Biden-Harris administration passed the biggest investment in combating climate change in our nation’s history. Thanks to the Bipartisan Budget Agreement, that investment is protected. PROTECTING AMERICANS’ HEALTH CARE AND RETIREMENT SECURITY The Bipartisan Budget Agreement protects the progress the Biden-Harris administration has made on health care -- and rejects proposals that would have put Medicaid coverage at risk for 21 million Americans. In addition, this bill fully funds the bipartisan PACT Act, the most significant law in decades for veterans exposed to toxic burn pits and for their families. It expands veterans’ access to health care and to disability benefits. EXCLUSIVE PRIDE MERCH 🏳️🌈 Pride month is here, Peter! No matter how you identify or who you love, everyone deserves to be treated equally and afforded the same rights. To celebrate, we’ve released some new Pride-themed merch: | | | YOUR ROLE IN THE BIDEN-HARRIS CAMPAIGN We mean it when we say there is no better time to get involved in this campaign. It’s going to take a massive grassroots movement to reelect President Biden and Vice President Harris, and we’re counting on supporters like you to help us build a strong campaign for the long haul. Thousands of supporters have already stepped up to invest in this campaign -- will you join them? If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | See you next week! Team Joe | ---|---

clean_body: | | | | \- - - - - - | The Official Super PAC Supporting Chris Christie for President Dear Friend, If you’re reading this—you're considered a Governor Chris Christie alum, friend, family member, or someone on this list included your name because they want you to be in the know. As you know, Governor Christie and I have been longtime close friends, and I'm honored to Chair the Super PAC, "Tell It Like It Is." Like you, I am eager to take Trump head-on, and I know the Gov is the ONLY person who can get the job done. I don’t have to tell you that if Trump is the nominee, Biden will remain President. But I believe together; we can stop that from happening. I'm emailing you today to ask for your help. The RNC announced its debate criteria, and our first goal is to get the campaign to 40,000 individual donors. Any amount counts toward this goal— even $1. If you’ve already donated, thank you! If you haven’t, I need you to do that RIGHT AWAY. | I also need you to forward this email to friends, family, colleagues, and anyone else you can think of who wants to ensure Trump and Biden are former presidents, not returning presidents! We need your cell phone number—we are going to send out regular text messages asking for help, and I want you on that text string. Lastly, I’m inviting you to be aggressive. Follow our "Facebook Page" and "Twitter Feed". Share and retweet. Forward emails, text your friends, and tell them to donate. TALK ABOUT THE CAMPAIGN and what the Gov is setting out to do. One thing is certain, the people on this email can make this happen. Reach out to me with questions. Thank you for taking action ASAP, | | Bill Palatucci Chairman, Tell It Like It Is PAC | Why Chris Christie: Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Trump Indictment Update!
body:
Terror Threat at Border!

[INSIDE JW]

Trump Indictment is More Biden Abuse of Power

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=29660&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL2ZpdHRvbnMtZXhjbHVzaXZlLWdyYW5kLWp1cnktc3RvcnkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=93698523e94cff5a6d34a1a157a712b10fc668dbf8f18aa3dff6a1083b03c980]

Yesterday, the Biden Justice Department indicted former President
Trump. That day will go down in infamy.

The unprecedented and corrupt indictment of Trump is built on sand and
is brazen election interference. It is an indictment about nothing.
Biden’s further transforming of the FBI and Justice Department into
political enforcers in order to jail his leading political opponent
could lead to the end of our constitutional republic. The indictment
has followed years of prosecutorial misconduct, harassment, and abuse
victimizing Trump. Not only is Trump innocent but he is a crime
victim.

Joe Biden wants to distract from his own personal corruption and join
the ranks of foreign dictators by jailing and turning Trump into a
political prisoner. Congress should act immediately and do everything
possible under the law to undo this attempt to wreck our republican
form of government. Every candidate for public office should denounce
this attack on our elections.

Let’s hope the courts recognize this sham indictment for what it is
and shut it down. In the meantime, Judicial Watch will continue to
hold the Biden administration accountable for its role in the worst
corruption scandal in American history – the effort to abuse and
destroy President Trump!

DELAWARE SUPREME COURT HEARING IN BIDEN SENATE RECORDS LAWSUIT

We’ll move a step forward next week in our effort to undo the
coverup of Joe Biden’s Senate records held in secret by the
University of Delaware.

A hearing will be held in the Supreme Court of Delaware on Wednesday,
June 14, 2023, in the FOIA lawsuit we filed on behalf of the Daily
Caller News Foundation regarding the secret deal keeping President
Biden’s Senate records from being made public (_Judicial Watch, Inc.
v. University of Delaware_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=19548&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p1ZGljaWFsLXdhdGNoLXYtZGVsYXdhcmUtZG9qLXUtb2YtZGVsYXdhcmUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=7be9ecf76f40b9d907d18e0e71fcc48edca58d4e8d244726c3e699896c51b7f9]
(No. N20A-07-001)).

The Supreme Court of Delaware proceeding will be available for viewing
here:
https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=29657&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9saXZlc3RyZWFtLmNvbS9kZWxhd2FyZXN1cHJlbWVjb3VydC9ldmVudHMvMTA4NDI0ODU/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=4f542d0be7cbb8d0b50be301776fdba6d8b1c7ab5503b84989935d97738f3a69

We filed an April 30, 2020, FOIA request for:

* All records regarding the proposed release of the records
pertaining to former Vice President Joe Biden’s tenure as a Senator
that has been housed at the University of Delaware Library since 2012.
This request includes all related records of communication between the
University of Delaware and any other records created pertaining to any
meeting of the Board of Trustees during which the proposed release of
the records was discussed.
* All records of communication between any representative of the
University of Delaware and former Vice President Biden or any other
individual acting on his behalf between January 1, 2018, and the
present.

On April 30, the Daily Caller News Foundation submitted its FOIA
request to the University for:

* All agreements concerning the storage of more than 1,850 boxes of
archival records and 415 gigabytes of electronic records from Joe
Biden’s senate career from 1973 through 2009.
* Communications between the staff of the University of Delaware
Library and Joe Biden or his senatorial, vice-presidential or
political campaign staff, or for anyone representing any of those
entities between 2010 [April 30, 2020] about Joe Biden’s senate
records.
* Any logs or sign-in sheets recording any individuals who have
visited the special-collections department where records from Joe
Biden’s senate career are stored between 2010 to the date of this
request.
* All records from Joe Biden’s Senate career that have been
submitted to the University of Delaware Library.

In response to both requests, the university claimed, without
corroboration, that public funds are not used to support the Joseph R.
Biden, Jr. Senate papers.

In January 2023, we and the Daily Caller News Foundation filed an
appeal brief
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=28733&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tc2VuYXRlLXBhcGVycy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=55c573b452014de1247c15ee9989c34ca5e3d7995af8f7d7c7b15e22c9346320]
in
the Delaware Supreme Court after the Superior Court sided with the
university.

Later that same month, we asked the Supreme Court of Delaware for
limited discovery
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=28803&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvam9lLWJpZGVuLXNlbmF0ZS1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=9f7ddcfdd0f55f1ec76669db296c72f4e9462ececdea69dadf956d86887f665d],
including,
at a minimum, deposing a university representative. The brief argued:

> Despite FOIA’s acknowledgment that “public entities, as
> instruments of government, should not have the power to decide what
> is good for the public to know,” over the multi-year course of
> this FOIA proceeding, the University’s efforts to satisfy its
> statutory burden of proof have been parceled out piecemeal, in
> minuscule increments, and only in response to court orders, entered
> after briefing by Appellants. When the shortcomings of the
> University’s effort are noted in briefing, the University calls
> “foul.” The University’s umbrage at these proceedings is
> misplaced. To date, the FOIA Coordinator’s efforts (and her
> recollections of what steps she took) remain untested by cross
> examination. Appellants have every right to challenge what they
> believe has been a lackluster effort by the University to satisfy
> its statutory burden.
While in the Senate, Biden served as chairman and ranking member of
the Foreign Relations Committee, which would have given him access to
classified records. Bob Bauer, Biden’s personal attorney, stated
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=29658&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JzbmV3cy5jb20vbmV3cy9kb2otZmluZHMtNi1tb3JlLWNsYXNzaWZpZWQtZG9jdW1lbnRzLXNlYXJjaC1iaWRlbi1kZWxhd2FyZS1ob21lLWF0dG9ybmV5LXNheXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=99b38c92fd9a34a626121b2455cb05c6f976b848b325525971eb6cc48bf8ece7]
in January 2023 that classified Senate records were discovered during
a search at Biden’s Wilmington, DE, home:

> The Justice Department “took possession of materials it deemed
> within the scope of its inquiry, including six items consisting of
> documents with classification markings and surrounding materials,
> some of which were from the President's service in the Senate ...”
In January 2023, Special Counsel Robert Hur
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=29659&F=T&&hash=bd817918bbcf073df50a926f23143380487aadc003a92848e9ff7bc78a171205]
was appointed by Attorney General Merrick Garland to investigate
Biden’s potential mishandling of classified documents.

“No more obfuscation. No more excuses. It’s time for the
University of Delaware to answer for its refusal to release Biden’s
Senate records,” said Michael Bastasch, editor-in-chief of the Daily
Caller News Foundation.

The sketchy secrecy on the Biden Senate records and his deal with the
University of Delaware need to end. And President Biden could end the
dispute by simply releasing the details about his Senate records. What
is Biden hiding?

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES JUSTICE FOR DETAILS ON SPECIAL COUNSEL SMITH’S
STAFF

Jack Smith just indicted President Trump but he and his Justice
Department don’t want to tell us who is working on the special
counsel team abusing Trump and other innocents!

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against Joe
Biden’s Justice Department for records disclosing the names of
staffers working in Special Counsel Smith’s office on two
investigations targeting former President Donald Trump and other
Americans (_Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Justice_ (
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=29661&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWphY2stc21pdGgtc3RhZmYtY29tcGxhaW50LTAxNDg1L11Obz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=f639a20ffe192cdf4ba8eb8301c5c9e8e81cb605f7f073a7b2d136ec3a2fd15e.
1:23-cv-01485)).

Given the overwhelming evidence of anti-Trump bias disclosed in the
Durham Report, it is urgent that Americans be able to find out who is
again investigating Trump from the Garland Justice Department and his
appointee Jack Smith. Special Prosecutor Smith isn’t above the law,
and the American people have the right to know about just who is
working on his unprecedented and politicized anti-Trump investigation.

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
the Justice Department rejected a December 9, 2022, FOIA request
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=29388&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvamFjay1zbWl0aHMtc3RhZmYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=dfd59cb9347945b45c2fd19b19f1052811e91efdda16fd66a1a8497e6c6cdd27]
for staff rosters
or similar records that would identify the names of Smith’s
employees.

Justice responded on April 12, stating that records responsive to our
request have been located but are being withheld “pursuant to
Exemptions 6 and 7(A)” of FOIA:

Exemption 6 pertains to information the release of which would
constitute a clearly unwarranted invasion of personal privacy.
Exemption 7(A) pertains to records or information compiled for law
enforcement purposes, the release of which could reasonably be
expected to interfere with enforcement proceedings.

Attorney General Merrick Garland appointed Smith
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=29370&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmV1dGVycy5jb20vd29ybGQvdXMvdXMtanVzdGljZS1kZXBhcnRtZW50LWFwcG9pbnRzLXNwZWNpYWwtcHJvc2VjdXRvci10cnVtcC1wcm9iZXMtMjAyMi0xMS0xOC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=ddba73375cd42f2fcc262ee90de1883f8fddb9198f5985bf4a2a4146b16ffa01]
in November to take over two investigations involving Trump, who is
running for president in 2024.

The first investigation involves Trump’s handling of classified
documents he retained at his Mar-a-Lago, Florida, residence after
leaving the White House in January 2021.

The second investigation regards Trump’s challenge of the 2020
presidential election results, which allegedly included a plan to
submit separate slates of electors to block Congress from certifying
Democrat Joe Biden’s victory.

Garland named
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=29637&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BhL3ByL2FwcG9pbnRtZW50LXNwZWNpYWwtY291bnNlbC0wP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=58b0c9fad3fb9116b26f174f342deafa1f9684562308c299664fe7edfb4374fa]
Smith
to the position three days
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=29370&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmV1dGVycy5jb20vd29ybGQvdXMvdXMtanVzdGljZS1kZXBhcnRtZW50LWFwcG9pbnRzLXNwZWNpYWwtcHJvc2VjdXRvci10cnVtcC1wcm9iZXMtMjAyMi0xMS0xOC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=ddba73375cd42f2fcc262ee90de1883f8fddb9198f5985bf4a2a4146b16ffa01]
after Trump announced he would run for president again in 2024. Smith
previously was at the center of several controversial issues, the IRS
scandal
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=28485&F=T&&hash=7d304403d871da9d079a66ed9ab4db4e2cf362db0486ad344a7df1a16d0ee34a]
among them.

This isn’t our first effort to shine some light on agency staffs.
Through FOIA, we uncovered information
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=29638&F=T&&hash=b31af72a204d7fa3aa6823be22cfed89d6e9b2bddcc62c349330c021aff39ef8]
about Special Counsel’s Mueller’s budget and staff
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=29639&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3NwLWNvdW5zZWwtbXVlbGxlci1zdGFmZi1pbmZvLXNlcHRlbWJlci0yMDIwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=42eefed5cb693f02a8f04cbd2a57816fcd94dfe509020eb2e43f0490f93f480f].
We also sued for and obtained records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=29040&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZHVyaGFtcy1meS0yMDIyLWJ1ZGdldC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=3ee8559b3416383b9823925e3aef8fdb36c53b5e6ca82b2f3e35f1b5a48dfb87]
for the budget
of Special Counsel John Durham. We also uncovered calendar entries of
Mueller special counsel prosecutor Andrew Weissmann
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=29371&F=T&&hash=000cfaecd1218af22a0b7202413d66fd6e92aa24fd2d2a6b959cd7f1a3cda69f]
showing that he led the hiring effort for the investigation that
targeted President Trump.

In 2014, a Judicial Watch investigation
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=28716&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctZ3VpZGUtdG8tY29uZ3Jlc3Npb25hbC1pbnZlc3RpZ2F0aW9ucy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=3cb9ceabc2b051a3443b24c8ce0623fb5229f954135b4a914b33c6f71413008e]
revealed that top IRS officials had been in communication with
Smith’s then-Public Integrity Section at Justice about a plan to
launch criminal investigations into conservative tax-exempt groups.
Government officials were looking to step up a probe
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=28485&F=T&&hash=7d304403d871da9d079a66ed9ab4db4e2cf362db0486ad344a7df1a16d0ee34a]
into requests for tax-exemption from organizations with conservative
sounding names like “Tea Party” and other “political sounding
names,” according to a later report by the Treasury Department’s
inspector general. Smith appears to have been a key player in this
attempt to silence conservative voices.

According to the documents we obtained, Smith directed the head of the
Justice Department’s Election Crimes Branch, Richard Pilger, to meet
with the director of the IRS’s Tax-Exempt Organizations division,
Lois Lerner. In one email we obtained, Lerner discusses an idea that
the Justice Department could build “false-statement cases” against
tax-exempt conservative groups.

We later obtained additional documents detailing a planning meeting
between Justice Department, FBI and IRS officials about possible
criminal prosecutions. Thanks to our disclosures, House investigators
discovered that the IRS improperly turned over confidential tax
records of non-profit organizations to the FBI—sparking a public
uproar and forcing the return of the records to the IRS. Read more
about the case here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=28702&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYWJjcy1pcnMtbWVzcy1qdXN0aWNlLWRlcHQtdGFpbnRlZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=9ed8deea73b100efa959715399410668bbe1ab82033f763fc7deb8d74f0e300b].

I’ll keep you apprised as events warrant on this important lawsuit.

RECORD NUMBER ON FBI TERROR WATCHLIST CAUGHT CROSSING INTO U.S. VIA
MEXICO

If you’re going to throw the border wide open, you can expect all
kinds of scoundrels to come rushing over. Our _Corruption Chronicles_
blog describes
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=29649&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZm9yZWlnbmVycy1jYXVnaHQtYXQtYm9yZGVyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=9c8616c93101d669832fb1a55291c53dd94f37500b0cbd4fe815d624d4f96636]
a very
serious class of illegals.

> have been caught trying to enter the U.S. through Mexico. Not
> surprisingly, mainstream news reports have focused on the positive

>

The
> TSDB contains thousands of records that are updated daily and shared

>

>
> The unprecedented figures have caused incredible alarm in Congress

>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=29665&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ob21lbGFuZC5ob3VzZS5nb3YvbWVkaWEvMjAyMy8wNS9MZXR0ZXItdG8tREhTLXJlLVRlcnJvcmlzdC1FbmNvdW50ZXJzLTEucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=a753e02467df0694b4bd00774b1ddc4bb240e07890a648c4be539910605f8b8e]

> A few days later, a separate group of legislators demanded

>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63714&L=29666&F=T&&hash=7dc683da5f2c3cda0ee0e51c60906c1850daa2afa52f43a73a070ceefe43507d]
> to Mayorkas and FBI Director Christopher Wray members of the House

Until next week ...

clean_body: Terror Threat at Border! [INSIDE JW] Trump Indictment is More Biden Abuse of Power [] Yesterday, the Biden Justice Department indicted former President Trump. That day will go down in infamy. The unprecedented and corrupt indictment of Trump is built on sand and is brazen election interference. It is an indictment about nothing. Biden’s further transforming of the FBI and Justice Department into political enforcers in order to jail his leading political opponent could lead to the end of our constitutional republic. The indictment has followed years of prosecutorial misconduct, harassment, and abuse victimizing Trump. Not only is Trump innocent but he is a crime victim. Joe Biden wants to distract from his own personal corruption and join the ranks of foreign dictators by jailing and turning Trump into a political prisoner. Congress should act immediately and do everything possible under the law to undo this attempt to wreck our republican form of government. Every candidate for public office should denounce this attack on our elections. Let’s hope the courts recognize this sham indictment for what it is and shut it down. In the meantime, Judicial Watch will continue to hold the Biden administration accountable for its role in the worst corruption scandal in American history – the effort to abuse and destroy President Trump! DELAWARE SUPREME COURT HEARING IN BIDEN SENATE RECORDS LAWSUIT We’ll move a step forward next week in our effort to undo the coverup of Joe Biden’s Senate records held in secret by the University of Delaware. A hearing will be held in the Supreme Court of Delaware on Wednesday, June 14, 2023, in the FOIA lawsuit we filed on behalf of the Daily Caller News Foundation regarding the secret deal keeping President Biden’s Senate records from being made public (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. University of Delaware [] (No. N20A-07-001)). The Supreme Court of Delaware proceeding will be available for viewing here: We filed an April 30, 2020, FOIA request for: All records regarding the proposed release of the records pertaining to former Vice President Joe Biden’s tenure as a Senator that has been housed at the University of Delaware Library since 2012. This request includes all related records of communication between the University of Delaware and any other records created pertaining to any meeting of the Board of Trustees during which the proposed release of the records was discussed. All records of communication between any representative of the University of Delaware and former Vice President Biden or any other individual acting on his behalf between January 1, 2018, and the present. On April 30, the Daily Caller News Foundation submitted its FOIA request to the University for: All agreements concerning the storage of more than 1,850 boxes of archival records and 415 gigabytes of electronic records from Joe Biden’s senate career from 1973 through 2009. Communications between the staff of the University of Delaware Library and Joe Biden or his senatorial, vice-presidential or political campaign staff, or for anyone representing any of those entities between 2010 [April 30, 2020] about Joe Biden’s senate records. Any logs or sign-in sheets recording any individuals who have visited the special-collections department where records from Joe Biden’s senate career are stored between 2010 to the date of this request. All records from Joe Biden’s Senate career that have been submitted to the University of Delaware Library. In response to both requests, the university claimed, without corroboration, that public funds are not used to support the Joseph R. Biden, Jr. Senate papers. In January 2023, we and the Daily Caller News Foundation filed an appeal brief [] in the Delaware Supreme Court after the Superior Court sided with the university. Later that same month, we asked the Supreme Court of Delaware for limited discovery [], including, at a minimum, deposing a university representative. The brief argued: Despite FOIA’s acknowledgment that “public entities, as instruments of government, should not have the power to decide what is good for the public to know,” over the multi-year course of this FOIA proceeding, the University’s efforts to satisfy its statutory burden of proof have been parceled out piecemeal, in minuscule increments, and only in response to court orders, entered after briefing by Appellants. When the shortcomings of the University’s effort are noted in briefing, the University calls “foul.” The University’s umbrage at these proceedings is misplaced. To date, the FOIA Coordinator’s efforts (and her recollections of what steps she took) remain untested by cross examination. Appellants have every right to challenge what they believe has been a lackluster effort by the University to satisfy its statutory burden. While in the Senate, Biden served as chairman and ranking member of the Foreign Relations Committee, which would have given him access to classified records. Bob Bauer, Biden’s personal attorney, stated [] in January 2023 that classified Senate records were discovered during a search at Biden’s Wilmington, DE, home: The Justice Department “took possession of materials it deemed within the scope of its inquiry, including six items consisting of documents with classification markings and surrounding materials, some of which were from the President's service in the Senate ...” In January 2023, Special Counsel Robert Hur [] was appointed by Attorney General Merrick Garland to investigate Biden’s potential mishandling of classified documents. “No more obfuscation. No more excuses. It’s time for the University of Delaware to answer for its refusal to release Biden’s Senate records,” said Michael Bastasch, editor-in-chief of the Daily Caller News Foundation. The sketchy secrecy on the Biden Senate records and his deal with the University of Delaware need to end. And President Biden could end the dispute by simply releasing the details about his Senate records. What is Biden hiding? JUDICIAL WATCH SUES JUSTICE FOR DETAILS ON SPECIAL COUNSEL SMITH’S STAFF Jack Smith just indicted President Trump but he and his Justice Department don’t want to tell us who is working on the special counsel team abusing Trump and other innocents! We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against Joe Biden’s Justice Department for records disclosing the names of staffers working in Special Counsel Smith’s office on two investigations targeting former President Donald Trump and other Americans (Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Justice ( [. 1:23-cv-01485)). Given the overwhelming evidence of anti-Trump bias disclosed in the Durham Report, it is urgent that Americans be able to find out who is again investigating Trump from the Garland Justice Department and his appointee Jack Smith. Special Prosecutor Smith isn’t above the law, and the American people have the right to know about just who is working on his unprecedented and politicized anti-Trump investigation. We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Justice Department rejected a December 9, 2022, FOIA request [] for staff rosters or similar records that would identify the names of Smith’s employees. Justice responded on April 12, stating that records responsive to our request have been located but are being withheld “pursuant to Exemptions 6 and 7(A)” of FOIA: Exemption 6 pertains to information the release of which would constitute a clearly unwarranted invasion of personal privacy. Exemption 7(A) pertains to records or information compiled for law enforcement purposes, the release of which could reasonably be expected to interfere with enforcement proceedings. Attorney General Merrick Garland appointed Smith [] in November to take over two investigations involving Trump, who is running for president in 2024. The first investigation involves Trump’s handling of classified documents he retained at his Mar-a-Lago, Florida, residence after leaving the White House in January 2021. The second investigation regards Trump’s challenge of the 2020 presidential election results, which allegedly included a plan to submit separate slates of electors to block Congress from certifying Democrat Joe Biden’s victory. Garland named [] Smith to the position three days [] after Trump announced he would run for president again in 2024. Smith previously was at the center of several controversial issues, the IRS scandal [] among them. This isn’t our first effort to shine some light on agency staffs. Through FOIA, we uncovered information [] about Special Counsel’s Mueller’s budget and staff []. We also sued for and obtained records [] for the budget of Special Counsel John Durham. We also uncovered calendar entries of Mueller special counsel prosecutor Andrew Weissmann [] showing that he led the hiring effort for the investigation that targeted President Trump. In 2014, a Judicial Watch investigation [] revealed that top IRS officials had been in communication with Smith’s then-Public Integrity Section at Justice about a plan to launch criminal investigations into conservative tax-exempt groups. Government officials were looking to step up a probe [] into requests for tax-exemption from organizations with conservative sounding names like “Tea Party” and other “political sounding names,” according to a later report by the Treasury Department’s inspector general. Smith appears to have been a key player in this attempt to silence conservative voices. According to the documents we obtained, Smith directed the head of the Justice Department’s Election Crimes Branch, Richard Pilger, to meet with the director of the IRS’s Tax-Exempt Organizations division, Lois Lerner. In one email we obtained, Lerner discusses an idea that the Justice Department could build “false-statement cases” against tax-exempt conservative groups. We later obtained additional documents detailing a planning meeting between Justice Department, FBI and IRS officials about possible criminal prosecutions. Thanks to our disclosures, House investigators discovered that the IRS improperly turned over confidential tax records of non-profit organizations to the FBI—sparking a public uproar and forcing the return of the records to the IRS. Read more about the case here []. I’ll keep you apprised as events warrant on this important lawsuit. RECORD NUMBER ON FBI TERROR WATCHLIST CAUGHT CROSSING INTO U.S. VIA MEXICO If you’re going to throw the border wide open, you can expect all kinds of scoundrels to come rushing over. Our Corruption Chronicles blog describes [] a very serious class of illegals. While the Biden administration and its media allies highlight that illegal immigration has dropped considerably since the termination of a Trump-era restriction, a record number of suspected terrorists have been caught trying to enter the U.S. through Mexico. Not surprisingly, mainstream news reports have focused on the positive effect that the expiration of a COVID-related rule known as Title 42 has had on migration. One story [] claims encounters between federal agents and illegal aliens have dropped by half since the administration nixed the emergency public health order implemented by Trump to quickly expel migrants from the country. Another celebrates that the measure’s expiration has “brought fewer migrant arrivals than expected” [] and quotes Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas saying that the number of migrants at the southwest border is “markedly down over what they were prior to the end of Title 42.” In the meantime, a record number of people who appear on the Federal Bureau of Investigation’s (FBI) terror watchlist have been apprehended by Border Patrol agents this fiscal year. In April alone, the frontline Homeland Security agency caught 16 foreigners who appear on the nation’s Terrorist Screening Database (TSDB) trying to enter the country through the southern border, according to the latest government figures []. The TSDB contains thousands of records that are updated daily and shared with federal state, local, territorial, and tribal law enforcement as well as the intelligence community and international partners to “ensure that individuals with links to terrorism are appropriately screened,” [] according to the FBI. The April figure is more than the total terrorists caught in four previous years—2017, 2018, 2019 and 2020 combined. With more than three months till the end of the fiscal year, Border Patrol agents have already encountered 98 migrants that appear on the TSDB list. The unprecedented figures have caused incredible alarm in Congress and lawmakers who serve on several committees—including Homeland Security, Counterterrorism, Judiciary and Oversight—have launched investigations. Last month they fired off letters demanding answers from Mayorkas, who was shamefully ousted as a Bill Clinton federal prosecutor after orchestrating the pardon of a big-time southern California drug dealer. The first letter [] warns the DHS secretary that the House Oversight, Judiciary and Homeland Security committees are investigating how his agency is handling “the elevated national security risk presented by an increasing number of aliens with terrorist ties illegally crossing the southwest border into the United States.” Since Biden began reversing policies deterring illegal border crossings the nation has faced historic levels of illegal immigration and the number of individuals with “derogatory information in terrorist screening databases illegally crossing the southwest border has also skyrocketed,” the lawmakers write. They are seeking documents of those apprehended on the southwest border with terrorist ties to assess the national security risk created by terrorist infiltration and determine if DHS handles the cases correctly. A few days later, a separate group of legislators demanded information on the arrest of two men—an Afghan and a Pakistani—on the FBI’s terrorist watchlist who crossed the U.S.-Mexico border in mid-May. The Afghan national was apprehended near San Diego, California along with a group that had just crossed the border illegally. The Pakistani national was arrested by federal agents in southeastern Arizona one day after the celebrated expiration of Title 42. In a letter [] to Mayorkas and FBI Director Christopher Wray members of the House Homeland Security, Intelligence and Counterterrorism committees demand to know where the individuals are being held, what terrorist groups they are associated with, when DHS and the FBI became aware of their intentions to travel to the U.S., what was their path of travel and what financial support they received. “These reported arrests raise serious questions about the security of our Southwest border and the potential for terrorists to take advantage of the glaring vulnerabilities due to the Biden-Harris administration’s open-border policies,” the letter states, adding that witnesses warned at a recent congressional hearing that the U.S. withdraw from Afghanistan has left a security vacuum in the region that could result in further terrorist encounters at the southern border.
